Geeska Afrika marxalad cusub ayuu galay. Dhaqdhaqaaqyo diblomaasiyadeed, isbahaysiyo is beddelaya, iyo tartan istaraatiiji ah ayaa si xowli ah u socda. Gobolka si dhow ha loola socdo — waxa maanta la go’aamiyo ayaa sawiraya khariidadda berri.                                                               Itoobiya, Eritrea, Sudan, arrinta aqoonsiga Israa’iil ee Somaliland iyo diidmada Jamhuuriyadda Federaalka Soomaaliya, iyo sidoo kale doorka Turkiga, Sacuudiga, Imaaraadka, Israa’iil iyo Masar — dhammaantood waxay qayb ka yihiin isbeddel ballaaran oo ka socda gobolka.

Dhaqdhaqaaqyo xowli ah ayaa socda. Safarro is-daba joog ah, diyaarado iyo maraakiib dhaqdhaqaaqaya, kulamo diblomaasiyadeed oo isku mar ka dhacaya magaalooyin kala duwan, iyo hawlgallo sirdoon oo aan muuqan balse leh saameyn culus. Waxaa jira gorgortan adag, is-riix siyaasadeed, is-dhaafsi dano istaraatiiji ah, saaxiibo cusub oo la samaysanayo, iyo kuwo hore oo kala fogaanaya.

Xaaladda Geeska Afrika way sii baaxadeysanaysaa. Waxaa ka socda isbeddello qoto-dheer oo beddeli kara mustaqbalka gobolka iyo qaab-dhismeedkiisa juquraafiyeed iyo midka siyaasadeedba.

Marxaladdan cusub waxay u baahan tahay feejignaan, faham istaraatiiji ah, iyo dulqaad siyaasadeed.

Ugu dambayn, guushu waxay raacdaa kan ugu adkaysta una diyaarsan qorshe fog-guusha waxaa iska leh qofka qosolka ku dambeeya.

𝗕𝗜𝗦𝗠𝗜𝗟𝗟𝗔𝗛 
Ra’iisul-Wasaaraha Xukuumadda Federaalka Soomaaliya, Mudane Xamse Cabdi Barre, ayaa  caawa booqasho iigu yimid hoygeega, si uu iiga raali geliyo hor istaagii ay ciidamada NISA igu sameeyeen gelitaankeyga Garoonka Aadan Cadde.

Waxaan qorshaynayey inaan ka qeyb galo shir aan u balansaneen Golaha Mustaqbalka Soomaaliyeed. Balse falkaasi wuxuu ahaa mid ka hor imanaya dhaqanka suubban, hab-maamuuska dowladeed, iyo mabaadi’da dowladnimada hufan.

Sannadkii 2015, Nigeria waxay gashay doorasho ka duwan kuwii ka horreeyay. Madaxweynaha markaas talada hayay, Goodluck Jonathan, wuxuu haystay awoodda dowladeed, hay’ado shaqaynaya iyo taageero muuqata.

Hase yeeshee, hoosta waxaa ka socday laba dareen oo si tartiib ah isu biirsanayay, bulsho daallan iyo kalsooni sii laciiftay. Dadku ma ahayn kuwo kacdoon wada, balse waxay muujiyeen daal siyaasadeed iyo rabitaan isbeddel.

Mucaaradku wuu jiray, laakiin muddo dheer wuu kala daadsanaa. Xisbiyo badan, hoggaamiyeyaal badan, mid walbana damac gaar ah ayuu watay. Intii ay sidaas ahaayeen, xisbiga talada haya si fudud ayuu mar kasta u soo laaban jiray.

Markii la gaaray 2015, su’aal culus ayaa hortimid mucaaradka, ma sii wadnaa tartan kala go’an oo guuldarro ku dhammaada, mise hal mar ayaan isu keennaa awoodda si aan u noqono beddel dhab ah?
Go’aankaas ayaa dhaliyay isbeddelka. Waxaa la dhisay dalad mideysa mucaaradka, waxaana hormuud ka noqday Muhammadu Buhari , nin hore dhowr jeer u tartamay, oo ku guul-darraystay.

Markan, wuu ka duwanaa. Wuxuu ka bartay khaladaadkii hore, wuxuuna aqbalay in tanaasul la sameeyo si midnimo loo helo.

Waxay ku guuleysteen saddex arrimood oo muhiim ah;

•Mid, waxay hoos u dhigeen loollankii gudaha ee hoggaaminta.

•Laba, waxay dhiseen fariin mideysan oo dadku si fudud u fahmi karaan , taa oo ah ; la dagaallanka musuqmaasuqa iyo soo celinta amniga.

•Saddex, waxay muujiyeen inay yihiin beddel nidaamsan, oo aan ku dhisnayn caro iyo buuq, balse ku dhisan qorshe iyo kala dambeyn.

Doorashadii 2015, markii ugu horreysay taariikhda dalkaas, mucaarad mideysan ayaa si dimuqraadi ah uga adkaaday xisbiga talada hayay. Taasi ma ahayn mucjiso,waxay ahayd natiijo ka dhalatay midnimo iyo qorshe cad.

Marka xaalad noocaas ah laga eego meel kasta oo kale, waxaa muuqata in doorashadu aysan ahayn tartan kursi oo keliya. Waa imtixaan ku saabsan sida loo maareeyo kala guur.

Mucaarad haddii uu ku mashquulo cidda hoggaamineysa halkii uu ka mideyn lahaa fariinta, wuu daciifayaa. Laakiin haddii uu isu arko hal awood oo nidaamsan, wuxuu isu rogaa beddel la qaadan karo.

Dowlad xilka haysa haddii ay ku mashquusho difaac joogto ah iyo dib u dhigid, shaki ayay abuureysaa. Haddii ay si kalsooni leh u maareyso kala guurka, waxay xajisan kartaa taageerada.

Musharraxiinta sugaya daqiiqadda, iyaguna waa inay feejignaadaan. Qof kasta oo ku boodda muran kasta oo taagan, si fudud ayuu ugu milmaa buuq. 

Laakiin kan si miyir leh u suga, oo si tartiib ah u dhisa sawir ah ; waan maareyn karaa marxaladdan,wuxuu isu baddalaa midka wax dheellitira. 

Casharka ugu weyn ee laga qaadan karo waa; xilliyada kala guurka, dadku waxay raacaan qofka u muuqda mid dejin kara xaaladda oo u horseedi kara jihada saxda ah.

Caasimad kasta oo ay ku wada sugan yihiin hoggaamiyeyaal mustaqbal doon ah, qofka qiimaha leh ma aha kan hadalka ugu badan jeediya. Waa kan fahma sida loo mideeyo dad kala aragti duwan, sida loo dejiyo xiisad, iyo sida loo kasbado kalsoonida.

Doorashadu waa maalin kooban. Laakiin sida loo maareeyo maalmaha ka horreeya ayaa go’aamisa cidda ka faa’iideysan doonta marka maalintaasi timaaddo.

Siyaasi kasta oo maanta ku jira masraxa waa inuu is weydiiyaa su’aal sahlan balse qoto dheer; ma doonayaa inaan noqdo mid buuqa ku kordhiya, mise mid dadka isu soo dhoweeya?

Taariikhdu inta badan waxay xustaa kuwii isu keenay, ee aan kala fogeyn.

Ra'iisal-wasaare Hamze Abdi barre,   Bugaan waxaa lagu Qoaray Waqooyi beri Kenya.

Loolan iyo Lugooyo

Khilaaf siyaasadeed oo culus ayaa ka dhex qarxay Sacuudiga iyo Imaaraadka, laba dal oo muddo dheer ahaa xulafada ugu muhiimsan ee Bariga Dhexe. Inkasta oo xaaladda gobolka ay u muuqato mid u fudud labada dal — maadaama Iran ay daciif tahay, wakiilladeediina ay dib u dhac ku yimaadeen — haddana halkii ay wada shaqeyn lahaayeen, waxaa soo baxay muran sii xoogeysanaya oo khatar gelin kara xasilloonida gobolka. Khilaafku wuxuu ka bilowday aragtiyo kala duwan oo ku saabsan sida loo soo afjari lahaa dagaalka Yemen. 

Sacuudiga iyo Imaaraadka oo markii hore si wadajir ah ula dagaallamay Xuutiyiinta, ayaa markii dambe ku kala fogaaday taageerada kooxaha gudaha Yemen. Xiisaddu waxay sii korortay markii Sacuudigu duqeeyay xoogag la safan Imaaraadka, taasoo dhalisay dareen ah “khiyaano” labada dhinacba.

Marka laga soo tago Yemen, labada dal waxay isku hayaan arrimo kale oo ay ka mid yihiin Sudan, Suuriya, Liibiya iyo Soomaaliya, halkaas oo ay taageero kala duwan siiyaan dhinacyo iska soo horjeeda. Sidoo kale, waxaa jira loollan ku saabsan cidda hoggaaminaysa Khaliijka iyo jihada siyaasadeed ee gobolka.

Khilaafku wuxuu u gudbay baraha bulshada, halkaas oo olole eedeyn iyo sumcad-dil ah uu ka socdo. Imaaraadka ayaa lagu eedeeyay inuu yahay “wakiilka Israel” sababo la xiriira heshiisyadii Abraham, halka warar kale ay isku dayeen inay ku xiraan magacyo Imaaraad ah fadeexado hore. Imaaraadku wuxuu rumeysan yahay in Sacuudigu dhiirrigelinayo weerarradaas warbaahineed.

Arrintan waxay si toos ah u taabatay danaha Mareykanka, maadaama Washington ay ku tiirsan tahay labada dal si ay uga hortagto Iran, u maareyso xaaladda Gaza, ugana shaqeyso ballaarinta xiriirka Israel ee gobolka. Waxaa la sheegay in Mareykanku isku dayay dhexdhexaadin, balse labada dhinac ay diideen.

Xudunta khilaafku ma aha oo keliya siyaasad dibadeed, balse wuxuu la xiriiraa tartan awood, madax-bannaani siyaasadeed, iyo dareen ku saabsan cidda hoggaaminaysa gobolka. Haddii xiisaddan aan la dejin, waxay sababi kartaa kala qaybsanaan cusub oo Bariga Dhexe ah xilli uu gobolka horeyba ugu jiray xaalad nugul.

Gunaanud
Khilaafka Sacuudiga iyo Imaaraadka ma aha muran degdeg ah oo ku kooban Yemen, balse waa loollan istaraatiiji ah oo ku saabsan hoggaaminta Khaliijka iyo jihada mustaqbalka Bariga Dhexe iyo dalalka sida Sudan, Yemen, Liibiya iyo Soomaaliya.

Sacuudigu wuxuu isu arkaa awoodda ugu weyn ee gobolka, wuxuuna doonayaa in dalalka yaryar ay la jaanqaadaan aragtidiisa amni iyo siyaasad. Dhanka kale, Imaaraadku wuxuu ku dadaalayaa inuu noqdo awood madax-bannaan oo leh xiriirro kala duwan (oo ay ku jirto Israel) si uu u ilaashado danihiisa gaarka ah.

Tarique Rahman oo 60 jir ah ayaa ku guuleystay doorashadii u horreysay oo ka dhacday dalka  Bangladesh , kaddib markii kacdoon dhallinyaro oo ay billaabeen ardayda lagu beddelay nidaamkii kaligii taliska ahaa ee ay hoggaaminaysay haweenayda Sheekh Xasiina, isagoo noqonaya ra’iisul wasaaraha dalkaa , markii xisbiga qaran ee Bangladesh (BNP), ay ku dhawaaqeen inay ku guuleystay doorashada. 

Rahman, oo ay iska dhaleen Zaiur Raxmaan oo soo noqday madaxweynaha Bangladesh oo toogasho lagu dilay sannadkii 1981 iyo hooyadii Khaalida Zia oo labo mar Ra’iisul wasaare ka noqotay Bangladesh, oo isbitaal ku geeriyootay bishii December,2025 ayaa dib ugu laabtay Bangladesh 17 sanno oo masaafuris uu ku joogay dibadda, markii xabsi uu ugu xirnaa nidaamkii Xasiina laga sii daayay,wuxuuna dib ugu laabtay Bangladesh markii isbeddelka uu ka dhacay. 

Maxay ka dhigantahay doorashadan ? 

Doorashadan waxay tilmaam u tahay sida bulshada ay dib gacantooda ugu soo celin karaan ayaahooda, haddii ay xataa ka hortagayaan nidaam awood leh , sida Sheekh Xasiina oo gacan adag ku heysay nidaamka Bangladesh. Dhallinyarada lagu yeero jiil Z , oo ay ardayda u horreeyaan ayaa ka kacay musuqa iyo ku takri-falka awoodeed ee nidaamka Xasiina , taa oo dhalisay inay isaga baxsato dalka.

Intaa ugama harin dhallinyarada waxay diideen inay cid kale si fudud xukunka gacantooda ugu dhaco, iyagoo xataa ka hortagay iskuday milatariga uu ku doonayay inay xukunka la wareegaan,markaa oo guddi ay dhallinyarada kacdoonka hoggaaminayay sameysteen ay u yeereen ganacsadaha Muhammad Yunus oo xilligaa dibad joog ahaa , si uu dalka doorasho u gaarsiiyo. 

Waxa xigay xaaladan in xisbiga qaran ee Bangladesh (BNP) oo muddo 20 sanno ah siyaasadda Bangladesh ka maqnaa inuu dib usoo laabto, taa oo ay ka dhalatay doorashada dhacday inuu ku guuleysto Tarique Rahman, markii uu soo bandhigay qorshayaal la jaanqaadaya baahida dhallinyarada ay ka bannaanbaxayeen. Wuxuu ballanqaaday inuu dastuurka ku dari doorano labo muddo xileed ka badan inan la qaban karin xilka Ra’iisul wasaaraha oo ah jagada ay awoodda ku aruursantahay, waxaa kaloo uu soo bandhigay qorshayaal sharraxaad cad leh oo uu sheegay inuu wax kaga qabanayo horumarinta wax soo saarka gudaha , si dhaqaalaha Bangladesh uu noqdo mid ka mid ah kuwa ugu sarreeya koonfurta Aasiya iyo taageerro la siinayo qoysaska saboolka ah si dadka Bangladesh ay uga soo kacaan xariiqda saboolnimada. Arrimahan kale ee waxtarka ah oo si faahfaahsan uu usoo bandhigay waxaa ka mid ah siyaasadda arrimaha dibadda inay noqonayso mid ku dhisan danaha Bangladesh, oo meesha laga saarayo siyaasad ku tiirsan Hindiya , taa oo dhalisay in doorashadiisa hambalyo ka hesho Pakistan iyo Mareykanka. 

Waxaa lagu sheegay doorashada Bangladesh, mid taariikhi ah , sabab la xiriirta sida doorashadan ay tusaale ugu noqotay inay dadweynaha badbaadin karaan qarankooda,waxayna dadka Bangladesh iyagoo aan sugin beel caalam iyo siyaasiyiin danahooda ka hormariya tan qaranka u kaceen oo ay adkeysi u yeesheen dhimasho kasta oo ay la kulmeen , illaa ay xaqiijiyee aayaha qarankooda inay gacanka ku dhaliyaan. Tan oo ah wax ku filan bulshada Soomaalida ee ku jira wareeg dheer oo aan isbeddel lahayn oo ka dhalanaysa dalka inuusan lahayn shuruuc gacmaha qabata hoggaamiyeyaasha oo ay weheliso inaysan jirin cid xambaarsan qarshayaal qaran oo baahiyaha dalka la jaanqaadaysa inaan xukunka lagu simin, sabab la xiriirta hoggaamiyeyaasha Soomaalida waxay soo bandhigaan ballanqaadyo afka barkiis ah oo aan lahayn qorshayaal , mana jirto falcelinta bulsho oo xafiisyada musuqa , ku takrifalka iyo awood ku dhaqanka caadeystay ay u welwelayaan, taa oo dhalisay nidaam kasta inuu waqtigiisa ku qaato iyadoo wax walba si gaabis ah ay ku soconayaan illaa hadda faragelinta dibadda ay noqotay mid ka soo tagtay waraaq oo joogitaan milatari isku beddelaysa, taa oo tilmaam ka bixinaysa sida madax bannaanida iyo jiritaanka qaranka uu halis ugu jiro. Ummadaha iyagoo doorta ku dhex jirka burburka iyo ku noolashaha qaran sharaf leh oo ka dhalan kara marka dadku fahmaan inaysan jirin cid meel kale uga imaanaysa oo u dhiseysa qaran awood leh.
Xamse amuu kaalintiisa kasoo bixi rabaa. Odagii xassan ahaa lagu booday.

Culimada Soomaaliyeed ayaa bayaan ay soo saareen ugu baaqay madaxda dalka inay ilaaliyaan midnimada iyo wadajirka ummadda, isla markaana doorashada soo socota lagu galo hannaan heshiis lagu wada yahay si looga fogaado khilaaf siyaasadeed.

Shirka Heerka Wasiirrada A3 ee Xoojinta Doorka Afrika ee Golaha Ammaanka ee Qaramada Midoobay.

Addis Ababa,Itoobiya | 13 Febraayo 2026 

Iyadoo ay barbar socoto qabsoomidda Shir-Madaxeedka 39-aad ee Midowga Afrika, Wasiirka Arrimaha Dibadda iyo Iskaashiga Caalamiga ah ee Jamhuuriyadda Federaalka Soomaaliya, Mudane Abdisalam Ali, isaga oo ah Isu-duwaha Kooxda A3, ayaa guddoomiyay Shirkii Lixaad ee Heerka Wasiirrada A3.

Shirka waxaa ka soo qaybgalay Wasiirka Arrimaha Dibadda ee Jamhuuriyadda Liberia, Marwo Sara Beysolow Nyanti; Wasiir-ku-xigeenka Arrimaha Dibadda ee Jamhuuriyadda Dimuqraadiga ah ee Koongo, Marwo Noëlla Ayeganagato Nakwipone; Guddoomiyaha Midowga Afrika ee Arrimaha Siyaasadda, Nabadda iyo Ammaanka, Danjire Bankole Adeoye; iyo Kormeeraha Joogtada ah ee Midowga Afrika u fadhiya Qaramada Midoobay, Danjire Mohamed Fathi Edrees.

Wasiirradu waxay mar kale xaqiijiyeen sida ay uga go’an tahay horumarinta mudnaanta iyo danaha Afrika ee Golaha Ammaanka ee Qaramada Midoobay, iyaga oo adkeeyay baahida loo qabo xoojinta wada-shaqeynta iyo isku-duwidda u dhexeysa Golaha Nabadda iyo Ammaanka ee Midowga Afrika iyo Kooxda A3, si loo mideeyo codka Afrika loona kordhiyo saamaynteeda istaraatiijiyadeed ee heer caalami.

Sidoo kale, waxay carrabka ku adkeeyeen muhiimadda midnimada Afrika oo ku dhisan aragti istaraatiiji ah oo cad iyo mabda’ wada-tashi ku saleysan, xilli ay jirto hubanti la’aan sii kordhaysa oo ka jirta nidaamka caalamiga ah, iyaga oo ku baaqay in la dhowro lana xoojiyo nidaamka wada-jirnimada caalamiga ah (multilateralism).

**BAYAANKA CULUMADA SOOMAALIYEED EE KU AADAN XAALADDA DALKA**

**February 12, 2026**

Mahad dhammaanteed waxaa iska leh Allaha weyn, suubanheenii Nebi Muxammed, nabadgelyo iyo naxariis korkiisa ha ahaato, Intaas kadib:

Culumada Soomaaliyeed iyagoo ka duulaya waajibka ka saran ilaalinta danaha guud ee umadda, kana ambaqaadaya xaaladaha qallafsan ee dalku maanta marayo sida: Khilaafka siyaasadeed, midnimada dhaawacan, faragelinta siyaasadeed, xaaladaha amni, abaaraha baahsan ee jira, duruufaha dhaqaale, tahriibka faraha ka baxaya, qalalaasaha siyaasadeed ee 35 sano soo jiitamayey, kalaguurka iyo fawdada adduunku u jiheystey, waxay soo saareen bayaankan ku wajahan madaxda Soomaaliyeed ee u ballansan shirka lagu qabanayo magaalada Muqdisho, kuwa deegaannada kale jooga, hoggaamiyaasha bulshada iyo guud ahaan shacabka Soomaaliyeed, iyadoo ujeedka bayaanku yahay tilmaan iyo toosin.

#### **Qodobada bayaanka**

1. **Ugu horrayn** dhammaan umadda Muslimka ah ee baaqani uu gaaro, gaar ahaan Soomaalida, waxaan xasuusinaynaa ku dhagganaanta cabsida Rabbi, iyo in maanka lagu hayo inay inaku soo aadantahay maalin la hortagi doono Maxkamadda Rabbi, xisaab iyo abaalmarinna ay jiri doonto.
2. **Culayska mas’uuliyadda:** Si gaar ah waxaan xusuusinaynaa madaxda Soomaaliyeed heer federal iyo heer State, culayska uu leeyahay xilka ay uqaadeen ummaddan, dhaartii ay magaca Allah ku mareen, xisaabta aakhiro ee sugaysa iyo inay u turaan bulshada ay mas’uulka ka yihiin, ogadaanna haddii xaaladahaas qallafsan ee dalku maanta marayo aysan ka badbaadin inay eeddeeda qaadi doonaan adduunka iyo aakhiroba.
3. **Midnimada dalka:** Madaxda dalku waa inay u midoobaan ilaalinta midnimada dalka, aan la oggolaan wax kasta oo dhaawacaya midnimada iyo wadajirka dalka, arrimaha yimaadana lagu wajaho midnimo iyo wadatashi.
4. **Madaxbannaanida dalka:** Ilaalinta madaxbannaanida dalka waa waajib saran muwaadin kasta, gaar ahaan madaxda udhaaratay xilkaas culus, haddaba waa inaan marnaba la oggolaan, wax kasta oo farogelin dibadeed ah.
5. **Khilaafka Siyaasadeed:** Waxaan ku baaqaynaa in khilaafaadka siyaasadeed ee jira heshiis dhab ah laga gaaro, qodobada la isku hayona laga heshiiyo, haddii ay dhici weydana xalka qayb laga siiyo hoggaanka bulshada, si meesha looga saaro damacyada ku dhisan sad-bursiga iyo kala aragti duwanaanta, loona helo jiho kale oo dhexdhexaad noqon karta.
6. **Doorashooyinka dalka:** Maadaama xilli kooban ka harsan yahay muddo xileedka xukuumadda hadda talada haysa, aysanna ilaa iyo hadda jirin hannaan doorasho oo heshiis lagu yahay oo dalku aaday, waxaa lagama maarmaan ah, in dhinacyadu isla qaataan hannaan doorasho oo hufan sharci ahaan iyo hannaan ahaan labadaba, una adeegaya danaha shacabka, meeshana laga saaro kalsooni xumada, talo marooqsiga iyo jillaafooyinka siyaasadeed, dalkana looga turo inuu galo qalalaaso siyaasadeed.
7. **Madaxweynaha:** Culumadu waxay si gaar ah u xusuusinayaan madaxweynaha dalka Dr Xasan Sheekh Maxamuud, mudane madaxweyne maanta dalku wuxuu marayaa marxalad aad u adag, culaysyo badan ayaana jira, sida aan ku tilmaannay ararta bayaanka, sidaas awgeed waa inaad qaadataa kaalin odaynimo oo leh dulqaad, tanaasul iyo keenid xal dalka iyo dadkaba badbaadin kara, maantana waa maalin taariikhda kuu galeysa, aakhirona Allah ku weydiin doono, haddii aad ku guuleysatona ajar weyn aad ka heli doontid, marka fursaddaasi yeysan ku dhaafin.
8. **Hoggaanka bulshada:** Waxaan cod dheer ugu baaqaynaa odayaasha dhaqanka, ganacsatada, culumada, aqoonyahanka kale iyo dhammaan qaybaha bulshada inay dareemaan marxaladda adag ee dalku marayo, ayna ka yeeshaan kulamo gaar ah, inta aan xaaladdu faraha ka bixin, madaxda Dowladdana kula xisaabtamaan xilka ay u igmadeen.
9. **Abaaraha jira:** Sidaa aan wada ogsoonnahay dalka maanta waxaa ka jirta abaar baahsan, deegannada qaarkoodna culays siyaado ah ayaa laga soo sheegayaa, haddaba waxaan ugu baaqaynaa dowlad iyo shacab labadaba in si wada jir ah loogu istaago arrinkaas gurmad weynna la fidiyo, dowalad ahaanna heer fedaraal iyo heer state-ba xil-weyn la iska saaro badbaadin dadka iyo duunyadaba.
10. **Gunaanad:** Culumadu waxay ka rajeynayaan dhammaan dhinacyada baaqani ku socdo inay Allaah uga cabsadaan mas’uuliyadaha kala duwan ee ay umadda uhayaan, qof kastana uu kaalintiisa ka qaato xal uhelidda arrimaha ku xusan baaqa culumada, waxaana Allaah weydiisanaynaa inuu dhammaateen inagu aadiyo tubta iyo talada toosan. Aamiin.

Muxaadara uu jeediyey 𝐏𝐫𝐨𝐟. 𝐃𝐫. 𝐀𝐛𝐝𝐢 𝐎𝐦𝐚𝐫 𝐒𝐡𝐮𝐫𝐢𝐲𝐞 oo cinwaankeedu ahaa “𝐊𝐡𝐚𝐭𝐚𝐫𝐚𝐡𝐚 𝐃𝐚𝐠𝐚𝐚𝐥𝐤𝐚 𝐒𝐚𝐝𝐝𝐞𝐱𝐚𝐚𝐝 𝐞𝐞 𝐀𝐝𝐝𝐮𝐮𝐧𝐤𝐚: 𝐃𝐨𝐨𝐫𝐤𝐚 𝐢𝐲𝐨 𝐈𝐬𝐭𝐚𝐫𝐚𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐢𝐣𝐢𝐲𝐚𝐝𝐝𝐚 𝐔𝐦𝐚𝐝𝐝𝐚 𝐌𝐮𝐬𝐥𝐢𝐦𝐤𝐚”, taas oo lagu qabtay munaasabaddii saxiixa Heshiiska Is-afgaradka (MoU) ee u dhexeeyey Hormuud University iyo 𝐔𝐧𝐢𝐯𝐞𝐫𝐬𝐢𝐭𝐚𝐬 𝐌𝐮𝐡𝐚𝐦𝐦𝐚𝐝𝐢𝐲𝐚𝐡 𝐑𝐢𝐚𝐮, waxay lahayd muhiimad gaar ah, diblomaasiyadeed, iyo istaraatiijiyeed oo muuqata.

Mowduuca la falanqeeyey wuxuu taabtay arrin caalami ah oo casri ah, taas oo si gaar ah muhiim ugu ah jaamacadaha oo ah xarumo lagu falanqeeyo fikiradaha qota-dheer, dood cilmiyeed, iyo falanqayn siyaasadeed. Doorashada mawduucan waxay munaasabadda MoU-ga ka dhigtay mid ka sarreysa heshiis maamul oo keliya, kuna beddeshay dhacdo aqooneed oo dhiirrigelisay amniga caalamiga ah, anshaxa, iyo xiriirrada caalamiga ah. Waxa kale oo ay muujisay in iskaashiga labada ha’yadood aanu ku koobnayn wada-shaqayn hay’adeed oo kaliya, balse uu ku dhisan yahay baaritaan aqooneed wadajir ah iyo hoggaan fikir oo la wadaago.

Heshiiska MoU ee u dhexeeya jaamacadda Hormuud iyo UMRI badanaa wuxuu xooga saarai doonaa iskaashi dhinacyada cilmi-baarista, waxbarashada, iyo horumarinta bulshada. Muxaadaradani waxay si toos ah ula jaanqaadday himilooyinkaas, iyadoo iftiimisay masuuliyadda hay’adaha tacliinta sare ee ku aaddan kobcinta wacyiga caalamiga ah iyo dejinta istaraatiijiyado nabadeed. Waxa ay astaan u noqotay in labadaba 𝐉𝐚𝐚𝐚𝐦𝐚𝐜𝐚𝐝𝐝𝐚 Hormuud iyo 𝐔𝐧𝐢𝐯𝐞𝐫𝐬𝐢𝐭𝐚𝐬 𝐌𝐮𝐡𝐚𝐦𝐦𝐚𝐝𝐢𝐲𝐚𝐡 𝐑𝐢𝐚𝐮 ay higsanayaan inay kaalin muuqata ka qaataan doodaha caalamiga ah, ayna ka gudbaan xuduudaha doorka maxalliga ama goboleed ee tacliinta.

The lecture delivered by 𝐏𝐫𝐨𝐟. 𝐃𝐫. 𝐀𝐛𝐝𝐢 𝐎𝐦𝐚𝐫 𝐒𝐡𝐮𝐫𝐢𝐲𝐞 on “𝐓𝐡𝐞 𝐓𝐡𝐫𝐞𝐚𝐭 𝐨𝐟 𝗪𝐨𝐫𝐥𝐝 𝗪𝐚𝐫 𝐈𝐈𝐈: 𝐓𝐡𝐞 𝐑𝐨𝐥𝐞 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐒𝐭𝐫𝐚𝐭𝐞𝐠𝐢𝐞𝐬 𝐨𝐟 𝐭𝐡𝐞 𝐌𝐮𝐬𝐥𝐢𝐦 𝐔𝐦𝐦𝐚𝐡” held alongside the MoU signing ceremony between Hormuud University and 𝐔𝐧𝐢𝐯𝐞𝐫𝐬𝐢𝐭𝐚𝐬 𝐌𝐮𝐡𝐚𝐦𝐦𝐚𝐝𝐢𝐲𝐚𝐡 𝐑𝐢𝐚𝐮 carried significant academic, diplomatic, and strategic importance for several reasons including  the topic addressed a contemporary global issues which is highly relevant to universities as centers of critical thinking and policy discourse. By choosing such a theme, the lecture elevated the MoU ceremony from being merely an administrative agreement to an intellectual event that stimulated scholarly reflection on global security, ethics, and international relations. It demonstrated that the partnership between the two universities is rooted not only in institutional cooperation but also in shared academic inquiry and thought leadership.

An MoU between two universities often emphasizes collaboration in research, education, and societal development. The lecture aligned with these objectives by highlighting the responsibility of academic institutions in shaping global awareness and peaceful strategies. It symbolized that both Hormuud University and 𝐔𝐧𝐢𝐯𝐞𝐫𝐬𝐢𝐭𝐚𝐬 𝐌𝐮𝐡𝐚𝐦𝐦𝐚𝐝𝐢𝐲𝐚𝐡 𝐑𝐢𝐚𝐮 aim to contribute to global discourse and not remain confined to local or regional academic roles.

Madaxweyneha Soomaaliya, Xasan Sheekh Maxamuud, ayaa socdaal ku tagay Addis Ababa si uu uga qaybgalo shirka madaxda Afrika ee halkaas ka furmaya. Xasan Sheekh ayaa ka dhoofay Muqdisho oo ay isugu yimaaddeen mucaaridkiisa isku bahaystay Madasha Mustaqbalka Soomaaliya si ay ula yeesheen Xukuumadda Federaalka wadahadallo aan fududeyn oo ku saabsan hannaanka doorashada ay bilaha koobani ka hadhsan yihiin. 

Madaxweyne Xasan ayaa lagu eedeynayaa in uu ka cagajiidayo xal siyaasadeed oo lagu furdaamiyo muranka, isla markaana uu wada-hadalka loo madlan yahay barbar wado xagaldaacin joogto ah oo ay ka mid yihiin beddelka dastuurka oo uu dhawaan sii karaariyay, iyo falal canjarafeyn ah oo ay xukuumaddiisu ku waddo hoggaamiyeyaasha mucaaradka sida xannibaado socodka ah iyo carqaladeyn ku aaddan kulamadooda.

Socdaalka Madaxweyne Xasan ee Addis Ababa ayaa uu uga gol leeyihiin in uu kula kulmo madax Afrikaan ah si uu taageero ugu raadiyo hannaanka nabad ilaalinta Afrika ee Soomaaliya iyo baajinta in dalal Afrikaan ahi aqoonsadaan Somaliland, iyaga oo maraya dhabbihii Israa'iil. Dhawaan ayaa wareysi uu siiyay wareyska al-Sharq al-Awsad waxa uu Madaxweyne Xasan ku sheegay in dalal gobolka ahi ay ku hawllan yihiin sidii ay u aqoonsan lahaayeen Somaliland. Ma uu carrabaabin dalalkaas, waxa se ay dad badani u turjunteen Itoobiya.

✓ Ugu horrayn sooyaalkii Somaliland aynu isla naqaanney illaa midnimadii Soomaaliyadii Talyaaniga ayay ku bilaabeen.

✓ Waxay sheegeen in deriskooda Somaaliya iyada oo taageero aan kala go' lahayn la siiyo, misana illaa weli nidaamkoodu burbursanyahay, dagaal-beeleed, Argagixiso dhulka inta badan haysata iyo budhcad-badeednimo ka jirto.

🏛️ Cashuurta Wasaaradda Maaliyadda Dowladda Dhexe (maamulka W Bari )

Tani waa cashuurta ay qaaddo dowlad goboleedka Waqooyi Bari, sida Wasaaradda Maaliyadda W Bari 
Waxay inta badan qaaddaa:

Cashuurta Dakhliga (Income Tax) – shirkadaha iyo shaqsiyaadka dakhliga leh

Cashuurta Badeecadaha laga keeno dibadda (Customs Duty) – alaabta dekedaha iyo garoomada laga soo dejiyo

VAT (Value Added Tax) – canshuurta qiimaha lagu daro badeecadaha iyo adeegyada

Cashuurta shirkadaha waaweyn iyo bangiyada
Cashuurta isgaarsiinta iyo adeegyada qaranka

👉 Lacagtan waxaa loo adeegsadaa: mushaharka ciidamada, hay’adaha qaranka, mashaariic waaweyn, iyo adeegyada guud ee dalka.

🏘️ Cashuurta Dowladda Hoose (Degmooyinka)

Tani waa cashuurta ay qaaddo maamulka degmada, tusaale ahaan degmo ka tirsan Maamulka Goboledka W Bari 

Waxay qaaddaan:

Cashuurta Guryaha (Property Tax)
Rukhsadaha Ganacsiga (Business License Fee)
Cashuurta Suuqa iyo Istaanka
Cashuurta Nadaafadda iyo adeegyada degmada
Cashuurta Baabuurta ee degmada ka diiwaangashan

👉 Lacagtan waxaa loo adeegsadaa: nadaafadda magaalada, dayactirka waddooyinka yaryar, nalalka waddooyinka, iyo adeegyada bulshada ee degmada.

🔎 Farqiga Ugu Weyn
Dowladda Dhexe → Cashuur qarameed (dal oo dhan khuseeya).
Dowladda Hoose → Cashuur deegaan (degmo gaar ah khuseeya).

Dalkeenu wuxuu u baahan yahay xasilooni siyaasadeed iyo doorasho lagu heshiiyo ka hor 15-05-2026, taasoo ku eg muddada xilka Madaxweynaha Jamhuuriyadda Mudane Xasan Sheekh Maxamuud.

Dhinaca kale, sida uu Madaxweynuhu dalka ku hagayo, waxaa ay keeni kartaa Khilaaf sii dheeraada Iyo hubanti la’aan siyaasadeed, oo cadowgu ka faa’iidaysan karo, iyadoo dunidu ay soo food saartay qalalaase siyaasadeed iyo mid colaadeed Oo looga bixi Karo midnimo Iyo wadajir.

Madaxweynaha waxaan kula talin lahaa in uu fududeeyo shirka loo balansan yahay in uu u furmo Dowlada Iyo Golaha mustaqbal si ay uga wada hadlaan xaaladda dalka iyo doorashada la filayo in ay dalka ka dhacdo inta aan la gaarin Mudada xil haynta madaxweynaha si looga fogaado qalalaasaha siyaasadeed iyo hubanti la’aanta iyada cadow shisheeyo Ku soo duulay Dalka.

Mucaaridku waxaanu rajaynaynaa inay ka shaqeeyaan danta dalkeena oo aanay dalka dhibaato u keenin.
Ololaha Doorashada Federaalka oo ka bilowday Puntland & Musharrax Xildhibaan Cabdulqaadir Cilmi isu sharraxay Golaha Shacabka, iyada oo ay taageereen waxgaradka.
Degdeg:-Dalka oo maanta yeelanaya laba Baarlamaan iyo kulan lamida kan kasocda Villa hargeysa oo u furmaya Xildhibaanada labaxay (Baarlamaanka Xorta ah).!

Waxaa nasiib darro ah in mar kasta oo khilaaf siyaasadeed ama aragtiyeed yimaado, dadka qaarkood ay isku dayaan inay dhaawacaan sumcadda culimada, halkii ay ka doodi lahaayeen fikirka la isku hayo. Wadaad kasta oo Muslim ah, sida qof kasta oo kale, wuxuu leeyahay ijtihaad iyo faham uu ka gaaro arrimaha diinta iyo nolosha casriga ah, taas oo mararka qaar is beddeli karta iyadoo ku xiran duruufaha iyo waayaha taagan. Taasi ma aha gef ama munaafaqnimo, balse waa dabeecad cilmi iyo faham ku dhisan.

Arrinta lagu dhaliilayo sheekha ee ku saabsan muusig ama hees siyaasadeed, haddii ay jirto, waxay u baahan tahay in si caddaalad ah loo fahmo: culimada Islaamka dhexdeeda waxaa ka jira khilaaf qadiimi ah oo ku saabsan muusigga iyo adeegsigiisa. Qof culimo ah oo aragti qaata maanta ama duruufo gaar ah ku saleeya fatwo ma noqonayo mid lagu durayo diintiisa ama lagu tuhmayo ujeeddo xun. Khilaafku waa wax la aqbalay oo ummadda dhexdeeda ka jiray qarniyo badan.

Sidoo kale, arrimaha sida qiblada ama masaajidda lagu tukado waa arrimo u baahan caddeyn sax ah iyo markhaati la hubo, mana habboona in lagu tuuro eed culus qof Muslim ah iyada oo aan xaqiiqooyin la hubin la hayn. Shareecadu waxay ina fartay in la hubsado wararka gaar ahaan marka ay quseeyaan sharaf iyo diin qof kale.

“Afkii been sheegi jiray, ma hadduu runta baranayaa?”
Madaxweyne Xasan Sheekh Maxamuud markii uu mucaaradka ahaa, wuxuu si joogto ah u oran jiray: “Villa Soomaaliya kama duwana darbiyada iyo dhismayaasha kale; waxa keliya ee ka dhigaya meel gaar ah waa in uu deggan yahay madaxweyne sharci ah.” Hadalkaas wuxuu xambaarsanaa fariin cad — in sharciyaddu tahay tiirka kaliya ee awoodda.
Haddaba haddii la gaaro 15-ka May 2026, oo muddada xilkiisu ku eg tahay, su’aashu waxay noqoneysaa: haddii aan doorasho waqtigeeda ku qabsoomin, qaabkee ayuu Villa Soomaaliya ugu sii joogi karaa isaga oo aan haysan sharciyaddii uu shalay ku adkaysan jiray? Ma darbiyada ayaa qiimo yeelanaya mise sharciga ayaa weli saldhig u ah joogitaanka madaxtooyada?
Afkii been sheegi jiray Ma hadduu runta baranayaa. Xigmadaas waxaa aad ugu caan baxay siyaasiyiinta Soomaalida, gaar ahaan madaxweynaha hadda xilka ka dagaya marka la gaaro 15ka May, 2026. Madaxweyne Xasan markii uu mucaaradka ahaa wixii fiicnaa ee uu sheegi jiray cagsigeeda ayuu hadda intii uu xilka hayay sameeyay. Tusaale kasta oo maamul xumaan ah sida sida musuqa, qabyaaladda, kala furfuridii dawlad goboleedyadii, iyo siyaasada arrimaha dibadda oo hadda meeshii ugu hooseesay ay Soomaaliya maanta taagan tahay, iyadoo midnimadii dhaawacantay kadib markii gobol ka mid ah loo aqoonsaday dawlad madax banaan, waa Soomaali land ah. Waxaa baraha bulshada iyo YouTube ka buuxa khudbooyinkiisii uu kaga hadli jiray maamul wanaag, isagoo oran jiray hadduu maalin ku darsado madaxweynihii markaas hayay, waa Maxamed Cabdullaahi Farmaajo, Filada ayaan ugu galeynaa, waana kii aasaasay garabkii hubeysnaa ee “Badbaado”.
“Afkii been sheegi jiray, ma hadduu runta baranayaa?” Xigmaddan maanta waxay si toos ah ugu muuqataa siyaasadda dalka. Madaxweyne Xasan Sheekh markii uu mucaaradka ahaa wuxuu ku hadli jiray maamul wanaag, la dagaallanka musuqmaasuqa, ilaalinta dastuurka, iyo dowlad ku dhisan wada-tashi iyo midnimo qaran. Wuxuu ballanqaaday in aan cid gaar ah loo xaglin doonin, laguna shaqeyn doono wada ogol iyo isku tanaasul. Laakiin maanta wuxuu si cad u sheegay in “cidna loo joojin doonin” — halkii laga sugayay hannaan ku dhisan wada ogol iyo is-afgarad qaran. Dastuurkii KMG ahaa, oo u baahnaa heshiis guud iyo talo qaran, waxaa muuqata in wax ka beddelkiisa loo wado si aan loo dhameyn, wada-tashi buuxa. Taasina waxay dhaawaceysaa kalsoonidii iyo midnimadii bulshada, iyadoo sii fogeynaysa dawlad goboleedyada iyo shacabka. Hoggaamiye hadal qurux badan jeediya balse ficilkiisu ka leexdo ballanqaadkii, wuxuu shacabka gelinayaa su’aal adag: hadalkii hore ma ahaa mabda’ mise wuxuu ahaa dariiq lagu gaaro kursiga?
Ugu dambeyn, dal waxaa mideeya cadaalad, wada-tashi iyo ixtiraam dastuur — ee ma mideeyo kalmad iyo awood urursi. Taariikhdu mar walba way xasuusataa farqiga u dhexeeya hadal iyo ficil.

Meta has secured a patent for an AI system that could simulate a person’s social media activity after they stop posting, including in the event of death, according to a filing granted in late December.

The patent, authored by Meta CTO Andrew Bosworth and first filed in 2023, describes a large language model that could respond to posts and interact with other users on someone’s behalf when they are absent from the platform. 

A company spokesperson told Business Insider that Meta has no plans to develop the concept further.

Agaasimaha Guud ee Wasaaradda Arrimaha Dibadda iyo Iskaashiga Caalamiga ah ee Jamhuuriyadda Somaliland, Mudane Maxamed Cabdiraxmaan Xasan, ayaa ka qaybgalay shir dood-wadaag ah oo ku saabsanaa aragtida siyaasadda iyo amniga Geeska Afrika, kaas oo ay soo qabanqaabisay Hay’adda Konrad-Adenauer-Stiftung (KAS). Hadal uu ka jeediyay shirkaas, waxa uu ku sheegay in gobolka Geeska Afrika marayo marxalad xasaasi ah oo ay saameynayaan colaado, isbeddello siyaasadeed iyo tartan juqraafi-siyaasadeed oo sii xoogaysanaya.

Mudane Maxamed Cabdiraxmaan waxa uu caddeeyay in Somaliland muddo 35 sano ah ku naalloonaysay nabad, xasillooni iyo nidaam dimuqraadi ah oo shaqaynaya. Waxa kale oo uu xusay in Somaliland door muuqda ka qaadatay sugidda amniga gobolka, arrintaas oo ay is kaashi la leenahay dalalka jaarka ah. 
Sidoo kale waxa uu tilmaamay in kobaca iskaashiga dhaqaale ee dalka, oo ay ka mid tahay horumarinta Dekedda Berbera, iyo aqoonsiga ay dhawaan jamhuuriyadda Somaliland ka heshay 

Dawladda Israa’iil ay ka tarjumayaan diblomaasiyad ku dhisan xasillooni, wada-shaqayn iyo iskaashi goboleed.
Intii uu booqashada ku guda jiray, Agaasimaha Guud waxa uu sidoo kale booqday xarunta Machadka Arrimaha Dibadda ee Itoobiya (Institute of Foreign Affairs – IFA), halkaas oo si diirran loogu soo dhaweeyay, isla markaana uu qaabilay Agaasimaha Fulinta Machadka, Mudane Jafar Bedru. Labada dhinac waxay ka wada hadleen xoojinta iskaashiga, horumarinta tababarrada diblomaasiyadda iyo is-weydaarsiga aqoonta, si loo xoojiyo iskaashiga gobolka iyo is dhaafsiga xirfadaha diblomaasiyadda.

KUSIMAHA MADAXWEYNAHA JAMHUURIYADDA AHNA GUDDOOMIYAHA GOLAHA SHACABKA OO QAABILAY WAFDI KA SOCDA URURKA JAAMACADDA CARABTA.

Muqdisho, Soomaaliya – 14 Febraayo, 2026: Kusimaha Madaxweynaha Jamhuuriyadda ahna Guddoomiyaha Golaha Shacabka ee Baarlamaanka Jamhuuriyadda Federaalka Soomaaliya, Mudane Sheekh Aadan Maxamed Nuur (Madoobe), ayaa maanta xafiiskiisa ku qaabilay wafdi heer sare ah oo ka socday Ururka Jaamacadda Carabta, Ururka u Qaabilsan Waxbarashada, Dhaqanka iyo Cilmi
Baarista (ALECSO).

Wafdiga ayaa waxaa hoggaaminayay Xoghayaha Guud ee ALECSO,  Dr. Mohamed Ould Amar, waxaana sidoo kale kulanka ka qayb galay Wasiirka Wasaaradda Waxbarashada, Hidaha iyo Tacliinta Sare ee Xukuumadda Federaalka Soomaaliya, Mudane Faarax Sheekh Cabdulqaadir, Guddoomiyaha Guddiga Horumarinta Adeegga Bulshada ee Golaha Shacabka, Xildhibaan Nadra Saalax Cabdi iyo Xoghayaha guud ee Golaha Shacabka Mudane Cabdiraxmaan Maxamed Cabdulle (Jaabiri).

Kulanka ayaa diiradda lagu saaray xoojinta iskaashiga dhinacyada waxbarashada, dhaqanka, iyo cilmi-baarista, iyadoo xubnaha wafdiga ALECSO ay Kusimaha Madaxweynaha Jamhuuriyadda ahna Guddoomiyaha Golaha Shacabka la wadaageen warbixin ku saabsan howlaha ay hay’addu ka waddo Soomaaliya, iyo sidoo kale heerka wada-shaqeynta ay la leeyihiin hay’adaha waxbarasho ee dalka.

Kusimaha Madaxweynaha Jamhuuriyadda ahna Guddoomiyaha Golaha Shacabka Mudane Sheekh Aadan Maxamed Nuur (Madoobe), ayaa uga mahadceliyey Ururka ALECSO doorka muhiimka ah ee ay ka qaadanayaan horumarinta waxbarashada, ilaalinta hidaha iyo dhaqanka, iyo sidoo kale kobcinta cilmi-baarista, asigoo wafdiga ku boorriyey in ay sii xoojiyaan taageerada ay siiyaan Soomaaliya, gaar ahaan dhinacyada tayada waxbarashada, cilmi-baarista, iyo horumarinta aqoonta jiilka cusub.

DHAMMAAD.

Agaasimaha Guud ee Wasaaradda Arrimaha Dibadda iyo Iskaashiga Caalamiga ah ee Jamhuuriyadda Somaliland, Mudane Maxamed Cabdiraxmaan Xasan, ayaa ka qaybgalay shir dood-wadaag ah oo ku saabsanaa aragtida siyaasadda iyo amniga Geeska Afrika, kaas oo ay soo qabanqaabisay Hay’adda Konrad-Adenauer-Stiftung (KAS). Hadal uu ka jeediyay shirkaas, waxa uu ku sheegay in gobolka Geeska Afrika marayo marxalad xasaasi ah oo ay saameynayaan colaado, isbeddello siyaasadeed iyo tartan juqraafi-siyaasadeed oo sii xoogaysanaya.

Mudane Maxamed Cabdiraxmaan waxa uu caddeeyay in Somaliland muddo 35 sano ah ku naalloonaysay nabad, xasillooni iyo nidaam dimuqraadi ah oo shaqaynaya. Waxa kale oo uu xusay in Somaliland door muuqda ka qaadatay sugidda amniga gobolka, arrintaas oo ay is kaashi la leenahay dalalka jaarka ah. 

Sidoo kale waxa uu tilmaamay in kobaca iskaashiga dhaqaale ee dalka, oo ay ka mid tahay horumarinta Dekedda Berbera, iyo aqoonsiga ay dhawaan jamhuuriyadda Somaliland ka heshay Dawladda Israa’iil ay ka tarjumayaan diblomaasiyad ku dhisan xasillooni, wada-shaqayn iyo iskaashi goboleed.

Intii uu booqashada ku guda jiray, Agaasimaha Guud waxa uu sidoo kale booqday xarunta Machadka Arrimaha Dibadda ee Itoobiya (Institute of Foreign Affairs – IFA), halkaas oo si diirran loogu soo dhaweeyay, isla markaana uu qaabilay Agaasimaha Fulinta Machadka, Mudane Jafar Bedru. Labada dhinac waxay ka wada hadleen xoojinta iskaashiga, horumarinta tababarrada diblomaasiyadda iyo is-weydaarsiga aqoonta, si loo xoojiyo iskaashiga gobolka iyo is dhaafsiga xirfadaha diblomaasiyadda.

Beledweyn | 12 Febraayo 2026, Wasaaradda Gargaarka & Maareynta Musiibooyinka Dowladda Hirshabelle (MoHADM) ayaa qabatay aqoon-isweydaarsi wacyigelin bulsho, kaas oo diiradda lagu saaray khataraha isbeddelka cimilada, nidaamka digniinta hore (Early Warning), iyo tallaabooyinka diyaargarowga ee lagu yareynayo saameynta musiibooyinka.

☆Ways Resignation Damages a Government:

▪︎Erosion of Public Confidence: Resignations, particularly over scandal or mismanagement, fuel public distrust in the competency and integrity of the administration.
▪︎Political Instability: Mass resignations, such as the 62 that preceded Boris Johnson's resignation in 2022, can paralyze a government.
▪︎Policy Disruptions: The abrupt departure of key personnel creates voids in leadership and expertise, hindering the implementation of government programs.
▪︎Highlighting Failure: A resignation acts as a formal acknowledgement of wrongdoing, failure, or a breach of collective responsibility.
▪︎Electoral Damage: Such events often raise fears regarding the future electoral prospects of the ruling party. 
Contextual Factors:
"Honourable" vs. Damaging: While often seen as a sign of weakness, timely resignation can sometimes be framed as an ethical act to preserve integrity.
Not a "Get Out of Jail" Card: Resignation does not absolve officials of liability for ▪︎administrative offenses or criminal actions.
Trigger Mechanism: Resignations are often used to force accountability or to protest against government interference.

Siyaasadda Qasan ee Ka Taagan Gobolka Gedo

Gobolka Gedo muddo dheer wuxuu wajahayaay khilaaf siyaasadeed iyo xaalado adag oo sababay colaad, qax iyo kala qaybsanaan bulsho. Shacabka ku nool gobolka ayaa noqday kuwa ugu badan ee dhibaatadu saameysay, iyadoo marar badan la arkay ballanqaadyo la sameeyay balse aan rumoobin.

Waxaa si weyn loo xusuustaa hadalladii iyo doodihii hore ee ay jeedin jireen rag ay ka mid yihiin Farataag iyo Abdirashiid Janan, kuwaas oo bulshada u sheegay inay dagaal kula jiraan Axmed Madoobe, iyagoo ku doodayay in ay u taagan yihiin difaaca shacabka iyo danaha gobolka. Hadalladaas waxay horseedeen xaalado adag oo ay ka dhasheen dagaallo iyo barakac ay la kulmeen bulshada Baladxaawo iyo guud ahaan gobolka.

Dagaalladaas waxaa ku naf waayay rag qiimo badan ku lahaa bulshada, oo ay ka mid ahaayeen sargaallada Farhaan Odawaa iyo Xuseen Giif, kuwaas oo loo arkayay haldoor u taagnaa difaaca dadka iyo deegaanka. Geeridooda waxay reebtay xanuun iyo su’aalo badan oo ku saabsan sababta dhabtaa ee colaadaha loo huriyay, iyo cidda ka faa’iidaysatay.

Maanta waxaa muuqata sawir ka duwan kii shalay la sawiray. Ragii shalay ku dhawaaqayay dagaal iyo mucaaradnimo ayaa hadda la arkayaa iyagoo taagan albaabka guriga Axmed Madoobe ee magaalada Muqdisho. Taasina waxay bulshada gelisay yaab iyo su’aalo badan: ma maanta ayuu noqday hoggaamiye la aqbalay, mise ballanqaadyadii hore waxay ahaayeen kuwo aan sal adag lahayn?

Arrintan waxay dad badan ku abuurtay dareen ah in siyaasadda gobolka ay noqotay mid ku dhisan dano gaar ah, halkii ay ka ahaan lahayd mid lagu hago maslaxadda shacabka. Bulshada reer Gedo iyo guud ahaan beesha Mareexaan waxay maanta isweydiinayaan jihada loo socdo iyo cidda runta ka hadleysa.

Ugu dambeyn, xaaladda maanta taagan waxay u baahan tahay in laga gudbo colaadaha, lana helo siyaasad ku dhisan run, daacadnimo, iyo masuuliyad. Shacabka waxay mudan yihiin hoggaan mideeya, kana fog hadal iyo ficil is burinaya. Su’aasha weli taagan waxay tahay: xaalka gobolka sidee loo sixi karaa, yaase qaadaya masuuliyadda wixii dhacay?

KH UDBADDA KU DHAWAAQA MUSHARRAXNIMADA MADAXWEYNE 2026
Prof. Mohamed Issak Idow
Bismillaahi Raxmaani Raxiim.

Shacabka Jamhuuriyadda Federaalka Soomaaliya meel kasta oo aad joogtaan — gudaha iyo dibadda — waxaan idiin soo gudbinayaa salaam sharaf iyo qadarin qaran.

Maanta ma aha maalin caadi ah. Waa maalin go’aan taariikhi ah leh. Ka dib tashi qoto dheer, la-talin aqoonyahanno, waxgarad, dhalinyaro, haween, ganacsato iyo qeybaha kala duwan ee bulshada, waxaan si rasmi ah ugu dhawaaqayaa in aan u taaganahay xilka Madaxweynaha Jamhuuriyadda Federaalka Soomaaliya doorashada 2026.
Go’aankani ma aha mid ku dhisan damac shaqsi.

Waa go’aan ka dhashay baahi qaran.
Muddo dheer dalkeenna wuxuu ku jiray wareeg isku mid ah:
Amni darro joogto ah
Musuq iyo maamul xumo
Khilaaf siyaasadeed oo aan dhammaad lahayn
Dhaqaale nugul iyo shaqo la’aan baahsan
Shacabka Soomaaliyeed ma mudna in ay sii joogaan xaalad aan ka tarjumayn kartidooda iyo taariikhdooda.

Haddaba maxaan ka duwanahay? Maxaan ballan qaadayaa?
1. Heshiis Qaran oo Cusub
Mudnaantayda koowaad waa in la dhiso kalsooni qaran. Waxaan qaban doonaa shir qaran oo dhab ah si loo dhammeystiro dastuurka, loo caddeeyo awood-qeybsiga, loona dejiyo hannaan doorasho oo joogto ah.

2. Amni Qaran oo Mideysan
Ciidan qaran oo hal talis leh, mushahar joogto ah qaata, kana madax bannaan saameyn siyaasadeed. Amni la’aan horumar ma jiro.

3. La-dagaallanka Musuqmaasuqa
Hantida qaranku waa amaano. Waxaan dhisi doonaa hay’ad madax-bannaan oo awood sharci leh, isla markaana miisaaniyadda iyo qandaraasyada dowladdu noqdaan kuwo si cad loo shaaciyo.

4. Dhaqaale Wax-soo-saar Leh
Mudnaanta koowaad waxay noqon doontaa:
Horumarinta beeraha, xoolaha, kalluumeysiga
Abuurista shaqooyin dhalinyarada
Maalgashi iyo hufnaan ku saabsan kheyraadka dabiiciga ah

5. Siyaasad ku dhisan Barnaamij, ma aha Qabiil

1. Heshiis Qaran oo Cusub
Mudnaantayda koowaad waa in la dhiso kalsooni qaran. Waxaan qaban doonaa shir qaran oo dhab ah si loo dhammeystiro dastuurka, loo caddeeyo awood-qeybsiga, loona dejiyo hannaan doorasho oo joogto ah.

2. Amni Qaran oo Mideysan
Ciidan qaran oo hal talis leh, mushahar joogto ah qaata, kana madax bannaan saameyn siyaasadeed. Amni la’aan horumar ma jiro.

3. La-dagaallanka Musuqmaasuqa
Hantida qaranku waa amaano. Waxaan dhisi doonaa hay’ad madax-bannaan oo awood sharci leh, isla markaana miisaaniyadda iyo qandaraasyada dowladdu noqdaan kuwo si cad loo shaaciyo.

Heshiiska doorashada waxa uu u dhexeeyaa saddex garab: laba is huwan oo ah Puntland iyo Jubbaland, Golaha Samatabixinta, iyo Dawladda Federaalka. Wejiga koowaad ee shirka wax heshiis ah lagama filayo, maadaama ragga ku sugan Xalane ay isku aag yihiin, balse ay kala damac iyo qorshe yihiin.

Tusaale Puntland iyo Jubbaland waxay rabaan nooc doorasho oo aan ka ag fogayn tii 2022kii oo ahayd doorasho maamulkeeda ay meel cidla ah ka qaateen.

Golaha samatabixinta waxay ay rabaan doorasho oo aan ahayn tii 2022, qof iyo codna ahayn lkn ay ogolyihiin in model keeda (nooceeda) hadda laga wada heshiiyo.

Waxaa shirka dhibco siyaasadeed ka soo hoyn-doonta dawladda federalka ah iyadoo carrab diirran ku oraneysa madasha mustaqbalka Soomaaliyeed marka hore soo heshiiya oo wax isla soo meeldhiga, birmadena u raaciyo anaga noocaan doorasho ayaa wadanaa wakhtigaan, Qiimahaan iyo qaab hawleedkaan ayay noogu kacaysaa.

Waxaa kaloo suuragal ah in deni iyo Axmed Madoobe ay suuqa xorta ah ka helaan qeyb ka mid ah madaxda dawlad goboleedyada ee hadda ka tirsan xisbiga JSP ka Dibna ay kusoo arooraan magaca madasha wadatashiga qaran, kolka ay madashii samatabixinta soo kala hadaafaan.

Birmade hawl ayaa qabyo u ah taas ayuuna maalinba Baal cusub soo geddin doonaa, mana tegi doono meel aan xafiiskiisa shaqada ahayn.

Waa caqligyga yar.

#Warbixin ay baahisay Reuters ayaa muujinaysa in tartan siyaasadeed iyo mid amni oo u dhexeeya Saudi Arabia iyo United Arab Emirates uu si weyn u saameeyay ajendaha shir-madaxeedka African Union ee toddobaadkan, iyadoo Geeska Afrika uu si isa soo taraysa u noqday goob ay ku tartamaan quwadaha Khaliijka.
Warbixintu waxay tilmaamaysaa in Imaaraadka Carabta sanadihii u dambeeyay xoojiyay saameyntiisa gobolka, isaga oo adeegsaday maalgelin balaayiin doollar ah, xiriir diblomaasiyadeed iyo taageero amni oo aan si weyn loo shaacin. Dhanka kale, Sacuudiga ayaa la sheegay inuu bilaabay dadaallo cusub oo uu ku dhisayo isbahaysiyo ay ka mid yihiin dalal waaweyn oo gobolka iyo caalamka ah, si uu u ilaashado saameyntiisa Badda Cas.

Hoggaamiyeyaasha Afrika ayaa inta badan isku dayaya inay ka fogaadaan qaadashada dhinac cad, iyagoo ka walaacsan in loollankan shisheeye uu sii huriyo colaadaha ka jira dalal ay ka mid yihiin Soomaaliya, Suudaan iyo Itoobiya. Khubaradu waxay ka digayaan in tartankan uu halis gelin karo xasilloonida amni iyo mid siyaasadeed ee Geeska Afrika iyo marin-biyoodka muhiimka ah ee Badda Cas.

Haldoorka Dhalinyarada Daa’uud oo Qabtay Shirkii Labaad ee Istiraatiijiga ahaa

Haldoorka Dhalinyarada Daa’uud ayaa caawa shirkii labaad ee taxanahooda ku yeeshay magaalada Muqdisho, shir kaas oo xambaarsanaa jihayn siyaasadeed iyo aragti mideysan oo ku aaddan mustaqbalka iyo masiirka dhalinyarada.

Shirka ayaa diiradda lagu saaray xoojinta midnimada, wadatashiga, iyo dejinta hannaan hoggaamineed oo ku dhisan isla xisaabtan, hufnaan iyo mas’uuliyad wadaag. Intii uu socday kulanka, waxaa si rasmi ah loogu dhisay guddi ka kooban 10 xubnood, kuwaas oo loo igmaday in ay hoggaamiyaan qorshaha istiraatiijiga ah ee dhalinyarada, kana shaqeeyaan danahooda siyaasadeed, bulsho iyo horumarineed.

Kulanka waxaa ka soo qeyb galay qeybaha kala duwan ee dhalinyarada, masuuliyiin hore iyo kuwa haatan xilalka haya, kuwaas oo dhammaantood muujiyay baahida loo qabo in la helo aragti mideysan iyo hannaan siyaasadeed oo lagu wajaho marxaladaha kala guurka ah ee dalka.

Hadaladii laga jeediyay shirka ayaa xoogga lagu saaray:
In la abuuro madal wada-tashi oo joogto ah
In la hormariyo ka-qeybgalka dhalinyarada ee go’aan qaadashada heer degmo, gobol iyo qaran
In la xoojiyo isku duubnida iyo wadajirka bulshada.

Ugu dambeyn, shirka ayaa kusoo dhammaaday jawi is-afgarad iyo rajo siyaasadeed, iyadoo la isku raacay in guddiga la magacaabay ay si degdeg ah u bilaabaan howlaha loo igmaday, isla markaana la joogteeyo shirarka iyo wada-hadallada istiraatiijiga ah.
Shirkan labaad wuxuu astaan u yahay biseyl siyaasadeed iyo faham qoto dheer oo ay dhalinyarada Daa’uud ka qaateen kaalintooda ku aaddan hannaanka dowlad-dhiska iyo horumarka bulshada.

Doorasho Dadban iyo Doorasho Dadweyne: Khilaafka Siyaasadeed ee Soomaaliya iyo Saamayntiisa

WARBIXIN DHAB KA HADAL AH

Soomaaliya waxaa haatan ka taagan khilaaf siyaasadeed oo xooggan oo ku saabsan nooca doorashada ee dalka, iyadoo dooddu u dhaxeyso laba nidaam oo lagu muransan yahay: doorasho dadban iyo doorasho qof iyo cod ah.

Khilaafkan ayaa si toos ah u saameynaya habsami u socodka doorashooyinka, dib-u-dhiska dimuqraadiyadda, iyo mustaqbalka siyaasadeed ee dalka.

Tan iyo 1960-kii, Soomaaliya ma aysan qaban doorasho dadweyne oo dhammaystiran.

Wixii ka dambeeyay xilligaa, habka doorashooyinka ayaa marar badan sababay khilaaf, iyadoo dowladda iyo mucaaradku ku muransan yihiin qaabka ugu habboon ee doorasho loo qaban karo.

Mucaaradku waxay ku adkeysanayaan in doorasho dadban ay tahay habka kaliya ee waqtigan ku habboon, halka dowladda federaalka ku doodayso in doorasho qof iyo cod ah ay tahay tallaabo lagama maarmaan u ah xoojinta dimuqraadiyadda iyo dhisidda dastuur dhammaystiran.

Khilaafkan siyaasadeed ayaa saameyn weyn ku yeeshay habsami u socodka doorashooyinka dalka. 

Xogaha laga helay kulamada golayaasha siyaasadeed iyo la-tashiyada bulshada waxay muujinayaan in khilaafku carqaladeynayo isku-duwidda doorashooyinka iyo qorshayaasha dimuqraadiyadda.

Taariikh ahaan, doorashooyinkii xilliga 1960 iyo 1969 waxay ahaayeen kuwo dadweyne balse aan dhammaystirnayn, ka dibna nidaamyo siyaasadeed oo aan oggolaan doorasho xor ah ayaa dalka galay. 

Tan iyo burburkii dowladdii dhexe ee 1991-kii, habsami u socodka doorashooyinka ayaa sii adkaaday, waxaana soo noqnoqday nidaam doorasho dadban oo lagu saleeyay xulashada xubnaha baarlamaanka iyo madaxda maamul goboleedyada.

Xaaladdan ayaa abuurtay in shacabka Soomaaliyeed aysan helin fursad toos ah oo ay ku doortaan hoggaanka dalka, taasoo dareen gelisay dib u dhac dimuqraadiyadeed. 

Haddii khilaafkan uu sii socdo, waxaa halis gelaya wadajirka, iskaashiga danta guud, iyo kalsoonida shacabka ee nidaamka siyaasadeed.

Xalka la soo jeediyay waxaa lagu gaari karaa wada-hadal dhab ah, heshiis mideysan, iyo ka-qaybgal labada dhinac ah. 

Tani waxay muhiim u tahay in doorashooyinka mustaqbalka ay noqdaan kuwo hufan, dimuqraadiyad lagu kalsoonaan karo, isla markaana looga hortago dib u dhac siyaasadeed iyo horumarineed.

Khilaafkan siyaasadeed ee haatan taagan ayaa iftiiminaya baahida loo qabo hoggaan mideysan oo dalka u horseeda xasillooni, dib-u-dhis waara, iyo mustaqbal siyaasadeed oo lagu kalsoonaan karo.

Xilli abaar daran jirtay ayaa nin Geel, Lo' iyo Ari haystay ayaa waxuu damcay in uu xoolaha abaarta ka badbaadiyo intii karaankiisa ah.

Waxuu xaaskiisii iyo ilma koox ah oo ay dhaleen uga tagay halkii ay daganayeen ayaga oo aan haysan wax sahay oo fiican waxuuna ku yiri waxiina beekhaansada xoolahaan ayaan la xarbin sidii aan abaarta uga badbaadin lahaaye.

Isbuuc markii uu xoolahii la maqnaa ayaa waxaa u imaaday ninkii wiil uu dhalay oo kuray ahaay waxuuna u sheegay in hooyadii geeriyootay oo uu ka soo tagay ilmahii oo kaligood ah.

Ninkii ayaa labada dhafoor qabsaday inta uusan wax kale oran waxuuna wiilkii ugu jawaabay maxay u geeriyootay hooyadaa ma xilli la geeriyooda ayaa la joogaa.

Dalka waxaa ka jira abaaro aad u ba'an, amni darro iyo daganaasho la'aan siyaasadeed waxuuna qarka u saaranyahay in uu kala qaybsamo waxayna saadaaliyayaasha siyaasadeed odorosayaan in dalka yeesho laba Baarlamaan iyo laba xukuumadood oo is garab fadhiyo.

#African Peer Review Mechanism.
“Habka Dib-u-eegista Isku-dhex-yaaca ee Wadamada Afrika”

Sawirkan wuxuu muujinayaa munaasabad rasmi ah oo Soomaaliya ka dhigaysa waddanka 45-aad ee ku biirida "African Peer Review Mechanism (APRM)". 

APRM waa barnaamij ka tirsan Midowga Afrika oo wadamada Afrika ku qiimeeya horumarka, maamulka, iyo hufnaanta dowladnimada.

#Fallo: APRM iyo Horumarinta Maamulka Afrika

Afrika waxay wajahaysaa caqabado siyaasadeed iyo mid maamul oo soo jireen ah, kuwaas oo ay ka mid yihiin maamul xumo, musuqmaasuq, eex siyaasadeed, xukun kelitalisnimo, iyo hay’ado dowladeed oo aan hufnayn. Dhibaatoyinkan ayaa si toos ah u carqaladeeya horumarka bulshada iyo dhaqaalaha qaaradda, iyadoo sidoo kale xaddidaysa kalsoonida dadweynaha iyo maalgeshiga caalamiga ah.

Welina hawlahaasi waa sii socdaan wax isbedel ahna lagama gaarin ilaa intii la aas aasay barnaamijkan APRM.

Isku Shaandhayn Balaadhan Oo Ka Socota Madaxtooyada Somaliland

Warar hoose oo si weyn loo hadal hayo ayaa sheegaya in Cabdiraxmaan Maxamed Cabdillaahi (Cirro) uu wado isku shaandhayntii ugu balaadhnayd ee lagu sameeyo xukuumadda tan iyo markii la dhisay.

Ilo xog-ogaal ah oo ku dhow Madaxtooyada Somaliland ayaa xaqiijinaya in liis magacyo ah oo ay ku jiraan masuuliyiin ay bulshadu si weyn u saluugtay uu miiska saaran yahay, isla markaana la filayo in xilalka laga qaado saacadaha ama maalmaha soo socda.

Masuuliyiin badan ayaa hadda ku jira xaalad sugitaan iyo cabsi ah, iyadoo qaar ka mid ah ay durba ka samreen sii joogista xukuumadda “Wadajir iyo Waxqabad.

Wararka la helayo waxay tilmaamayaan in magacaabisyo cusub oo lama filaan ah lagu dhawaaqi doono, isla markaana ay suuragal tahay in xubno laga keeno xisbiyada mucaaradka si loo xoojiyo wada-shaqaynta iyo midnimada siyaasadeed.

Isku shaandhayntan ayaa la filayaa inay beddesho jihada siyaasadeed ee Somaliland, islamarkaana noqoto fariin cad oo ku socota masuuliyiinta waxqabadkoodu liito.

Halka Hoose Nagula Wadaag Masuulkee Jeclaan Lahayd In La Bedelo?

Wasaaradda Arrimaha Gudaha iyo Dowladaha Hoose ee Hirshabelle ayaa si rasmi ah magaalada Warsheikh  ugu soo gebogebeysay tababar lagu xoojinayey awoodda iyo hufnaanta Guddiga Kormeerka Bulshada Rayidka (CSOCs) ee Degmada Warsheikh, kaas oo ay taageero ka geysatay hay’adda FCA.

Tababarkan ayaa diiradda lagu saaray kor u qaadidda doorka CSOCs ee kormeerka maamulka degmooyinka, la-xisaabtanka, daahfurnaanta, iyo ka-qaybgalka bulshada, si loo xoojiyo isla xisaabtanka dowlad-hoose iyo adeeg bixinta.

Wafdi ka socda wasaaradaha biyaha ee dowladda dhexe iyo tan Koonfur Galbeed ayaa maanta ku wajahan degmada Ceelberde ee gobolka Bakool, si ay u qiimeeyaan xaaladaha abaaraha iyo horumarinta adeegyada biyaha.

Wafdigan ayaa waxaa hoggaaminaya kusimaha agaasimaha guud ee Wasaaradda Biyaha, ahna agaasimaha waaxda biyaha, Liban Aw Khalif , waxaana sidoo kale qeyb ka ah xildhibaano, mas’uuliyiin kale iyo Isku-duwayasha Caafimaadka iyo Waxbarashada ee Degmada Ceelberde  Hon Halac Suldan iyo Mohamad Mohamed Wacdi Ahmed 

Socdaalkan aha iyadoo la raacayo amarkii ka soo baxay shirkii dhowaan ka qabsoomay magaalada Dhusamareb, kaas oo diiradda lagu saaray u kuurgalidda xaaladaha abaaraha, dardar gelinta mashaariicda horumarinta biyaha, iyo sidii xal waara loogu heli lahaa baahiyaha biyo la’aaneed ee ka jira deegaanno badan oo ka tirsan Somalia.

Marku  wafdigu sogaro  Ceelberde, waxay kulamo la qaadan doonaan maamulka degmada iyo qeybaha bulshada, iyagoo si toos ah u kormeeraya ceelasha biyaha, adeegyada caafimaadka la xiriira biyaha, iyo mashaariicda horumarinta biyaha ee laga hirgelinayo degmada.

Muqdisho, 15-ka Febraayo, 2026; Xubnaha Baarlamaanka Jamhuuriyadda Federaalka Soomaaliya ayaa maanta yeeshay kulankoodii 16aad ee wadajirka ah, iyagoo sii waday doodda ku saabsan soo-jeedinta wax-ka-beddelka cutubka lixaad ee Dastuurka, kaas oo ka hadlaya Baarlamaanka Federaalka Soomaaliya.

Kulankan ayaa diiradda lagu saarayaa qodobbo muhiim ah oo la xiriira qaab-dhismeedka, waajibaadka, iyo awoodaha Baarlamaanka, iyadoo xubnuhu ay aragtiyo kala duwan ka dhiibanayaan wax-ka-beddelka la soo jeediyay.

Maskaxdu ma qaybsanto! Dakkanada laga galay Puntland!

Cabdullaahi Yuusuf markuu ku soo noqday xilka Puntland, wuxuu isla markiiba u dhaqaaqay siduu ku noqon lahaa Madaxweynaha Soomaaliya. 2003 illaa 2004 oo shirarkii Embakasi ka socdeen, Cabdullaahi goortay soo dhowdahay muddada Madaxweynaha loo oggol yahay inuu ka maqnaado dalka oo ah 2 bilood, buu imaan jiray dalka si uu u cusboonaysiisto. Puntland oo dabeecad ahaan ah madax-ka-nool waxaa dhici jirtay in muddada uu ka mashquulo ay waxyaabo badan khaldami jireen ama hormarro socda istaagi jireen.

Siciid Deni tookkadii hore goortuu bilaabay damaciisa inuu noqdo Madaxweynaha Soomaaliya, waxaa bilaabatay inay hawlo badan oo qabyo ahaa ay istaageen. Deni 2021 illaa 2022, maskaxdiisu waxay jirtay Muqdisho. Sidaan hadda ka hor u taxay barnaamijyada uu qabyada kaga tagay Deni oo dhinaca dowladnimada la xiriira, waxaa sidoo kale u dheereyd kala dambeyn la’aan xubnaha dowladda ah iyo dayac amni. Taasoo ay muddo ku qaadatay qaarkood, inuu saxo. Haatan. 2025 oo dhan horjoogaha Puntland wuxuu ku mashquulsanaa barnaamijkiisa Muqdisho. Taasoo aan haddiiba dareemayo culaysyada nagu soo fool leh ee dhinaca dhaqaalaha iyo amniga.

Sida la wada ogsoon yahay, Puntland waa madax-ka-nool. Madaxweyne ku xigeenku awood ma leh. Amar laga qaadan maayo maadaama uusan lahayn awood xil-ka-qaadid. Waxaan u soo joognay Madaxweynaha ku xigeenkii hore ee Maxamed Cabdi Xaashi (AUN) oo Faroole oo Wasiirka Maaliyadda ah marna lacagta ka goosto marna u fasaxo.

Marka waxaan aamminsanahay in Madaxweynayaasha Puntland ay geff ka galayaan reer Puntland marka ay u kacaan siday uga mira dhalin lahaayeen hankooda. Inay awoodda Madaxweyne ku xigeenka kor u qaadaan ama uu tartamo xilli uu shacab yahay wax dhaama ma jiraan.

SHAQAALAHA WASAARADDA XANAANADA XOOLAHA, DHIRTA IYO DAAQA XFS OO DOORTAY GUDDI GOOB-SHAQO

Shaqaalaha Wasaaradda Xanaanada Xoolaha, Dhirta iyo Daaqa Dowladda Federaalka Soomaaliya ayaa maanta si rasmi ah u doortay Guddi Goob-Shaqo, kaas oo door muhiim ah ka qaata horumarinta xiriirka shaqo, ilaalinta xuquuqda shaqaalaha, iyo xoojinta maareynta shaqaalaha rayidka.

Doorashadan ayaa ku dhacday jawi deggen oo hufan, iyadoo ay goobjoog ka ahaayeen xubno ka socday Guddiga Qaranka ee Shaqaalaha Rayidka Dowladda Soomaaliya.

Murashaxiinta u tartamayay Guddiga Goob-Shaqo ayaa tiradoodu kor u dhaaftay tobaneeyo qof, waxaana shaqaalaha wasaaraddu si dimuqraadi ah uga dhex doorteen 7 xubnood oo metelaya danaha shaqaalaha, taasoo muujinaysa biseylka nidaamka doorasho iyo ka-qaybgalka shaqaalaha.

Ugu dambeyn, Madaxda Wasaaradda ayaa uga mahadceliyay dhammaan ka-qaybgalayaasha sida xilkasnimada leh ee ay u fuliyeen habraaca doorashada, iyagoo xubnaha la doortay kula dardaarmay in ay si daacadnimo, caddaalad iyo mas’uuliyad sare ku dheehan tahay u gutaan waajibaadka loo igmaday.

Wasiirka Arrimaha Gudaha, Federaalka iyo Dib u heshiisiinta XFS mudane xildhibaan Hon Ali Yusuf Ali - Xoosh oo ay wehliyaan Wasiirka Cadaaladda iyo Dastuurka mudane Xasan Macallin Maxamuud iyo Wasiir dowlaha Wasaaradda Arrimaha Dibadda XFS mudane Cali Balcad ayaa waxaa qado sharaf u sameeyey Ugaaska Guud ee beesha Murusade Ugaas Cabdirisaaq Ugaas Cabdullahi Ugaas Xaashi Ugaas Faracadde.

Kulanka oo sidoo kale ay qeyb ka ahaayeen guddiga qabanqaabada munaasabadda caleemo-saarka Ugaas Cabdirisaaq Faracadde ee dhowaan dhici doonta ayaa waxaa looga hadlay; dowrka hoggaanka dhaqanka ee soojireenka ah iyo kaalinta muuqata ee ay ku leeyihiin nabadeynta, dib-u-heshiisiinta iyo xal u helidda caqabadaha horyaalla dalka.

Mas’uuliyiinta XFS ayaa adkeeyey sida ay uga go’an tahay xoojinta wadashaqeynta dowladda iyo hoggaanka dhaqanka si loo dardargeliyo nabadda, caddaaladda iyo dowlad-wanaagga dalka.

Abdullahi Mohamed Ali Sanbaloolshe waa siyaasi Soomaaliyeed oo in ka badan 30 sano noloshiisa u huray u adeegidda shacabka Soomaaliyeed iyo xoojinta hay’adaha dowliga ah. Waa shaqsi lagu yaqaan dulqaad, aragti fog, iyo dadaal joogto ah oo uu ugu jiro dib-u-dhiska qaranka, gaar ahaan tan iyo burburkii dowladdii dhexe ee Soomaaliya oo dalka gelisay, marxalad adag oo ay hareeyeen kala daadsanaan siyaasadeed, amni darro, iyo caqabado bulsho.

Markii ay dowladdii dhexe burburtay horaantii sagaashamaadkii, Soomaaliya waxay wajahday mid ka mid ah waqtiyadii ugu adkaa taariikhdeeda. Hay’adihii dowliga ahaa way dumeen, kalsoonidii shacabka way yaraatay, waxaana adkaatay in la helo hoggaan mideeya ummadda. Xilliyadaas adag, Sanbaloolshe wuxuu ka mid ahaa shaqsiyaadkii aan ka quusan rajada dib-u-soo kabashada dalka. Halkii uu ka dooran lahaa inuu ka haro howlaha qaranka, wuxuu u istaagay sidii uu qayb uga noqon lahaa dadaallada lagu soo celinayo nidaam, sharci, iyo dowladnimo.

Intii lagu jiray sannadihii kala guurka iyo dadaalladii dib-u-heshiisiinta, waxaa la arkayay isaga oo ka shaqeynaya isku soo dhowaanshaha bulshada, dhiirrigelinta wadahadalka, iyo in la abuuro jawi ay Soomaalidu ku heli karto mustaqbal ka wanaagsan kii ay soo martay. Aragtiyadiisa siyaasadeed waxay mar walba ku dhisnaayeen midnimo, wadajir, iyo in la helo dowlad awood u leh inay u adeegto dadkeeda si caddaalad ah.

Sanbaloolshe waxaa lagu tilmaamaa hoggaamiye fahamsan in dowlad dhisan aysan ku imaan karin xoog keliya, balse ay ku timaaddo kalsooni, wada shaqeyn, iyo is-maqal. Taasi waa sababta uu mar walba xoogga u saarayay dib-u-dhiska hay’adaha dowliga ah iyo kor u qaadidda wadajirka bulshada. Shaqadiisu ma ahayn mid ku kooban xil gaar ah; waxay ahayd safar dheer oo ku wajahan dhismaha qaran ka gudba kala qaybsanaanta, una tallaaba xasillooni iyo horumar.

Sannadihii u dambeeyay, iyadoo Soomaaliya ay samaynaysay horumar dhinacyo badan leh—sida dib-u-habeynta dowladnimada, kobcinta amniga, iyo dhismaha xiriirro caalami ah—Sanbaloolshe wuxuu sii waday doorkiisa ku aaddan mideynta shacabka iyo xoojinta rajada qaranimo. Wuxuu aaminsanaa in mustaqbalka Soomaaliya uu ku jiro gacmaha dadkeeda, isla markaana ay muhiim tahay in jiilasha cusub lagu barbaariyo waddaniyad iyo masuuliyad.

Ilaa 2026, Sanbaloolshe waxaa loo arkaa siyaasi leh waayo-aragnimo dheer oo ka dhalatay sannado badan oo uu la soo maray marxaladaha kala duwan ee dalka. Wuxuu noqday astaan muujinaysa adkaysi iyo rumayn ah in, inkastoo caqabado badan jireen, haddana Soomaaliya ay mar walba heli karto jid ay ku gaarto midnimo iyo dowladnimo buuxda.

Taariikhdiisa siyaasadeed waxay xambaarsan tahay fariin ah in hoggaamintu aysan ahayn oo keliya qabashada xil, balse ay tahay u adeegidda dadka, ilaalinta rajada, iyo ka shaqeynta nabad waarta. Sanbaloolshe wuxuu mar walba ku dadaalayay inuu noqdo buundo isku xirta shacabka Soomaaliyeed—mid ku baaqa wadajir halkii laga kala fogaan lahaa, kana shaqeeya in dib loo dhiso kalsoonida iyo isku duubnida ummadda.

Ugu dambayn, nolol-maalmeedkiisa siyaasadeed waxaa lagu soo koobi karaa hal aragti oo weyn: Soomaaliya oo mid ah, nabad ah, kana gudubta xusuusta burburka una dhaqaaqda mustaqbal ifaya. In ka badan soddon sano oo uu u taagnaa howlahaas ayaa ka dhigaya shaqsi door muuqda ka qaatay dadaallada lagu doonayo in mar kale la mideeyo shacabka Soomaaliyeed laguna xoojiyo dowladnimada dalka.

Dowladda federaalka Soomaaliya oo uu hoggaaminayo Madaxweyne Hassan Sheikh Mohamud ayaa muujisay taageero iyo Hami weyn ay u hayso doorasho cod-bixin toos ah oo loo siman yahay, balse hirgelinteedu waxay u baahan tahay:
1. Nidaam diiwaangelin codbixiye oo lagu kalsoonaan karo
2. Xuduudo doorasho oo si cad loo qeexay
3. Guddi doorasho oo xooggan oo madaxbannaan
4. Heshiis siyaasadeed oo lala gaaro dowlad-goboleedyada federaalka.

Xalku ma aha  doorasho hal dhinac oo keliya — waa hannaan doorasho oo isku dhafan dhinacyada siyaasadda iyo dowlad-goboleedyada federaalka.
kaas oo ku dhisan wada-tashi, kalsooni iyo isu  tanaasul si loo badbaadiyo dalka iyo dadka. Islamarkaana loo ilaaliyo haybadda Qaranka.

Wasiirka Wasaaradda Waxbarashada iyo Tacliinta Sare ee Dowladda Hirshabelle, Wasiiru-Dowladaha, Wasiir-ku-xigeenka, Agaasimaha Guud, Agaasimayaasha Waaxyaha iyo dhammaan howl-wadeennada Wasaaradda Waxbarashada iyo Tacliinta Sare ee Dowladda Hirshabelle waxay tacsi iyo tiiraanyo murugo leh u dirayaan Mudane Mustaf Xaaji Aarow oo ka tirsan Waaxda HR-ka Wasaaradda, kadib geerida naxdinta leh ee ku timid xaaskiisii marxuumad #Idman_Abdirahman_Hersi, taas oo ku geeriyootay degmada Balcad ee Gobolka Shabeellaha Dhexe.

Waxaan Alle uga baryeynaa inuu marxuumadda u naxariisto, dambigeedana dhaafo, qabrigana u nuuro oo u waasiciyo, Jannatul Firdowsana ka waraabiyo. Sidoo kale ehelka, qaraabada, carruurta iyo dhammaan asxaabta ay ka baxday waxaan Alle uga baryeynaa inuu ka siiyo samir iyo iimaan,

Dowladda Federaalka Soomaaliya ayaa lagu eeddeeyay wali inay xanibaad ay ku hayso qaar kamid ah garoomada diyaaradaha ee ku yaalla Gobolka Gedo, iyadoo Madaxweyne Axmed Madoobe uu ku sugan yahay magaalada Muqdisho isla markaana la filaayo Madaxweyne Xasan Sheekh Maxamuud inuu wadahadal uu la yeesho.

Muddo sanad iyo afar bilood ah ayay xaniban yihiin garoomada diyaaradeed qaar kamid ah degmooyinka gobolka Gedo oo aysan duullimaadyada rayidka ah ka degi karin tan iyo markii ay si toos ah u dagaalameen Dowladda Dhexe iyo Dowlad Goboleedka Jubbaland.

Waxaana la xannibay bartamihii bishii Diseembar 2024, kadib dagaalkii ka dhacay deegaankii Raaskambooni ee gobolka Jubbada Hoose.

Garoomada diyaaradaha ee xaniban ee rakaabka rayidka aan ka degi karin waxaa kamid ah degmooyinka Doolow, Baardheere, Ceelwaaq iyo deegaano kale. Halka dhanka BaladXaawo marna la fasaxo marna laga xanibo duulimaadyada dhanka rayidka ah.

Bulshada gobolka Gedo ayaa la kulmay sanadkii laga soo gudbay 2025 caqabado waaweyn oo duulimaadyada la xanibay awgeed in lagu qaaliyay kharashkii ay ku raaci jireen diyaaradaha halka goobaha qaar ay diyaaradaha aysan ka degin.

Inkastoo arrimo siyaasaddeed awgeed loo xanibay duullimaadyadasi, haddana dhinaca kale Dowladda Federaalka Soomaaliya waxay la macaamilaysaa hoggaanka sarre Jubbaland Axmed Madoobe oo dowladda ku casuumtay shirka dhowaan ka dhacaya magaalada Muqdisho iyo Golaha Musataqbalka Soomaaliyeed.

Dadka falanqeeya arrimaha siyaasaddeed ayaa isweydiinaya haddii Axmed Madoobe ay dowladda Soomaaliya ku casuumtay shirka ay la qaadanayso Golaha Mustaqbalka la tacaamula gaar ah iyo mid toosna la leedahay sababta loo xanibay bulshada oo ciqaab intaasi la eg loo marsiinayo, iyadoo sababeen ciqaabtaasi dhimasho iyo dhibaatooyin kale oo dhanka nolosha ah oo shacabkaasi illaa iyo xilligaan abaaro ay haystaan sii wajahayaan. Siyaasadda Galmudug maanta waxay u baahan tahay deganaansho, wadatashi, iyo hoggaan mideeya shacabka. Doorashooyinka iyo loolanka siyaasadeed waa inay noqdaan kuwo ku dhisan sharci iyo hufnaan, si loo ilaaliyo midnimada bulshada.
Magaalooyinka sida Dhuusamareeb iyo Gaalkacyo waa inay noqdaan xarumo horumar iyo nabad ku dhisan, ma aha goob khilaaf joogto ah.
Waxaan ku baaqayaa:
✅ In la xoojiyo wada-hadalka siyaasiyiinta
✅ In dhalinyarada la siiyo door muuqda
✅ In amniga laga hormariyo dano gaar ah
✅ In lala shaqeeyo Dowladda Federaalka Soomaaliya si loo helo xasillooni buuxda
  #Galmudug
#Midnimo
#Isbedel

Siyaasadda Soomaaliya weli waxay ku jirtaa jahawareer iyo loollan sii xoogeysanaya.

Dib-u-eegista Dastuurka iyo qorshaha doorasho qof iyo cod ah ee uu hormuudka ka yahay madaxweyne Hassan Sheikh Mohamud ayaa wajahaya dhaliilo xooggan. Mucaaradku waxay ku doodaan in geeddi-socodka wax-ka-beddelka Dastuurka uusan ku dhisneyn wadatashi loo dhan yahay, islamarkaana ay jirto cabsi ku saabsan in awoodda lagu uruurinayo heer federaal.

Xiriirka u dhexeeya Dowladda Federaalka iyo dowlad-goboleedyada ayaa sii xumaanaya, iyadoo khilaafyada ku saabsan awood-qaybsiga, maamulka kheyraadka iyo amniga ay noqdeen kuwo soo noqnoqda. Qaar ka mid ah dowlad-goboleedyada waxay dareemayaan in laga tallaabsaday wada-tashigii iyo is-afgaradkii lagu dhisay nidaamka federaalka.

Dhanka dibadda, xoojinta xiriirrada lala leeyahay Turkey, United Arab Emirates iyo Ethiopia ayaa dhalisay su’aalo ku saabsan hufnaanta heshiisyada la saxiixayo, gaar ahaan kuwa la xiriira tamarta iyo difaaca, iyadoo mucaaradku ku baaqayaan in baarlamaanka si buuxda loogu soo bandhigo heshiisyadaas.

Ugu dambeyn, inkasta oo laga hadlayo doorasho qof iyo cod ah, haddana weli ma cadda sida ay ku suurageli karto iyadoo ay jiraan caqabado amni, dhaqaale iyo khilaaf siyaasadeed oo taagan. Mucaaradku waxay qabaan in marka hore la helo is-afgarad qaran oo dhab ah ka hor inta aan la qaadin tallaabooyin waaweyn oo mustaqbalka doorashooyinka saameynaya.

Murashaxiinta kale ah Mohamed Hussein Roble Hassan Ali Khaire Sharif Sheikh Ahmed Hassan Sheikh Mohamud Mohamed Abdullahi Farmaajo Abdi Farah Shirdon

Muqdisho, 15 Febraayo 2026 – Wasiirka Wasaaradda Maaliyadda iyo Horumarinta Dhaqaalaha Dowladda Hirshabelle, Mudane Cabdiraxiin Ciise Caddow, oo uu wehliyo Agaasimaha Guud ee Wasaaradda, Mudane Cabdullaahi Saalax Mudei, ayaa ka qeybgalay Kulankii 24-aad ee Wasiirrada Maaliyadda Dowlad-Goboleedyada iyo Maamulka Gobolka Banaadir, kaas oo ka furmay magaalada Muqdisho.

Kulankan oo soconaya muddo laba maalmood ah ayaa diiradda lagu saaray xoojinta wadashaqeynta iyo isku-dubbaridka hannaanka maamulka maaliyadda dalka, iyadoo la dardargelinayo dib-u-habeynta nidaamka maaliyadeed iyo horumarinta dhaqaalaha guud ee Soomaaliya.

Ajandayaasha muhiimka ah ee kulanka waxaa ka mid ah:

1: Horumarinta wadaagga kheyraadka dalka,
2: Mideynta dakhliga heer federaal iyo heer dowlad-goboleed,
3:  Xoojinta hufnaanta, isla xisaabtanka iyo joogtaynta nidaamka maaliyadeed,
4: Dardargelinta hirgelinta dib-u-habeynta maaliyadda si loo gaaro xasillooni dhaqaale oo waarta.

Wasaaradda Maaliyadda iyo Horumarinta Dhaqaalaha Dowladda Hirshabelle waxay adkeyneysaa muhiimadda ay leedahay wada-shaqeynta heer federaal iyo heer dowlad-goboleed si loo xaqiijiyo nidaam maaliyadeed oo mideysan, hufan, isla markaana kor u qaada koboca iyo horumarka dhaqaale ee dalka.

Kulanka ayaa la filayaa in laga soo saaro go’aanno iyo talooyin wax ku ool ah oo lagu sii xoojin doono dadaallada dib-u-habeynta maaliyadeed, taas oo wax weyn ka tari doonta horumarka iyo xasilloonida dhaqaale ee Soomaaliya.

— DHAMAAD —

post_text_pi:
𝐇𝐀𝐌𝐁𝐀𝐋𝐘𝐎 & 𝐃𝐔𝐂𝐎

Wasaaradda Arrimaha Gudaha Federaalka iyo Dib-u-Heshisiinta Dowladda Waqooyi-bari waxay hambalyo iyo duco u diraysaa Guddoomiyaha Ku-meel-gaadhka ah ee Golaha Deegaanka, ahna Duqa Degmada Buuhoodle, 𝐌𝐮𝐝𝐚𝐧𝐞 𝐂𝐚𝐛𝐝𝐢𝐟𝐚𝐭𝐚𝐚𝐱 𝐂𝐚𝐥𝐢 𝐂𝐚𝐰𝐢𝐥, oo caawa loo doortay xilkaas.

Wasaaraddu waxay u rajaynaysaa inuu xilkan cusub u guto si daacadnimo, xilkasnimo iyo hufnaan leh, kana shaqeeyo horumarinta degmada iyo daryeelka danaha bulshada.

Alle ha la garab galo gudashada waajibaadkiisa, hana ka dhigo mid ku guulaysta masuuliyadda loo igmaday.

Waxa maanta magaalada Cobosha ee Degmada Cusub ka qabsoontay xaflad si heer sare ah loo soo agaasimay oo lagu maamuusay qalin-jabinta dufcaddii 1aad ee ardayda ka baxday Nasru Dragon Lee Chinese Wushu Martial Art Sport Club.

Xafladdan ayaa lagu guddoonsiiyay ardaydii dhamaysay tababarka shahaadooyin iyo suunka darajada koowaad ee ciyaarta Wushu (Kung Fu). Tirada ardayda qalin-jabisay ayaa gaadhaysay ku dhowaad 100 arday, kuwaas oo muddo tababar adag soo maray, isla markaana muujiyay dadaal iyo karti ay ku gaadheen heerkan.

Waxaa xafladda ka soo qaybgalay waalidiin, masuuliyiin, dhalinyaro iyo qaybaha kala duwan ee bulshada magaalada Cobosha. Bulshada ayaa si weyn ula dhacay bandhigyada cajiibka ah ee ay carruurtu soo bandhigeen, kuwaas oo muujinayay xirfado sare, tababar joogto ah iyo horumar muuqda oo dhinaca ciyaaraha ah.

Intii ay socotay xafladdu, ardaydu waxay soo bandhigeen ciyaaro iyo farsamooyin kala duwan oo Wushu ah, taas oo soo jiidatay indhaha dadkii goobta joogay, islamarkaana muujisay heerka tayada tababarka ee naadigu bixiyo. Bandhigyadaasi waxay ahaayeen kuwo ammaan iyo sacab badan ka helay bulshada.

Macallinka naadiga ayaa munaasabadda ka jeediyay hadal uu ugu mahadcelinayo waalidiinta iyo bulshada magaalada Cobosha taageerada ay siiyeen horumarinta ciyaaraha iyo kobcinta dhalinyarada. Waxa uu sidoo kale xusay in naadigu sii wadi doono tababaridda carruurta iyo dhalinyarada si ay uga fogaadaan waxyaabaha xun, uguna koraan anshax, caafimaad iyo xirfad.

Ugu dambayn, xafladda ayaa kusoo dhammaatay jawi farxad leh iyo sawirro xusuus ah oo ay qaateen ardayda, macallimiinta iyo bulshada ka soo qayb-gashay, iyadoo la rajaynayo in dufcado kale oo badan ay mustaqbalka ka qalin-jabaan naadiga.

The tragic incident involving the young girl in Puntland highlights a deeply distressing issue of violence against children, particularly sexual violence. It's crucial to address the multiple layers surrounding such events, including societal, legal, and healthcare responses. Here are some important considerations:

### Context of the Incident
- **Victim's Age**: The victim was only six years old, emphasizing the vulnerability of children in society.
- **Nature of the Crime**: The act of rape is heinous, and the fact that it led to her death underscores the severity of the injuries inflicted.
- **Circumstances**: The perpetrator disguised themselves, indicating premeditation and a complete disregard for the victim's dignity and life.

### Response from Authorities
- **Healthcare Failures**: The poor treatment she received at the hospital raises questions about the medical response to such trauma, and whether healthcare providers are adequately trained to handle cases of sexual violence.
- **Government Action**: The silence from the Garoowe administration is concerning. Effective governance includes taking immediate action in response to such incidents, ensuring justice, and preventing future occurrences.

### Societal Implications
- **Awareness and Education**: This event highlights the need for greater awareness around child protection, and education on the rights of children.
- **Community Responsibility**: Communities must come together to support victims and advocate for stronger protections against violence, fostering an environment where children can feel safe.

### Moving Forward
- **Advocacy for Justice**: There should be calls for justice for the victim and her family, with demands for thorough investigations and accountability for the perpetrator.
- **Support Systems**: Establishing support systems for survivors of sexual violence is critical to help them cope with trauma and seek justice.
- **Legislative Changes**: Advocating for stricter laws and policies around child protection and sexual violence can help create a safer environment for children.

This heartbreaking case serves as a stark reminder of the urgent need for societal change to protect the most vulnerable among us. Addressing these issues comprehensively can help prevent such tragedies in the future.

Muqdisho-Soomaaliya 16, Febraayo, 2026: Mudanayaasha labada Aqal ee Baarlamaanka Jamhuuriyadda Federaalka Soomaaliya ayaa xarunta Golaha Shacabka ku yeeshay kalfadhiga 7-aad, kulankiisa 17-aad ee wadajirka ah, waxaana shir guddoominayey Guddoomiye kuxigeenka koowaad ee Golaha Aqalka sare Mudane Cali Shacbaan Ibraahim oo ay wehliyaan Guddoomiye kuxigeenka labaad ee  Golaha Shacabka Mudane Cabdullaahi Cumar Abshirow iyo Guddoomiye kuxigeenka labaad ee Golaha Aqalka Sare.

Kulanka wadajirka ah ee mudanayaasha labada Aqal ee Baarlamaanka Jamhuuriyadda Federaalka Soomaaliya ayaa maanta waxaa lagu sii amba qaaday ka doodista qodobada ka harsanaa cutubka lixaad ee dastuurka Kmg ah oo maanta lasoo gaba gabeeyey.

Guddoomiye kuxigeenka koowaad ee Golaha Aqalka sare Mudane Cali Shacbaan Ibraahim oo kulanka soo xiray ayaa sheegay in maanta lasoo gaba gabeeyey ka doodista cutubka lixaad islamarkaana dooda cutubka todobaad la bilaabi doono kulanka kan xiga.

Agaasimaha Guud ee Wasaaradda Arrimaha Gudaha, Federaalka & Dib u heshiisiinta Jubbaland Mudane Abdiwaxid Maxamed dhaqane ayaa Magaalada Muqdisho ugu qayab Galay Kulanka Guddiga Sare ee Mashruuca Dowlad-Kaab. 

Mashruuca Dowlad-Kaab ayaa ah mid muhiim u ah ajendaha dowlad-dhiska, gaar ahaan dhanka xoojintadowladaha hoose.
 
Tan iyo markii la bilaabay mashruuca, waxaa la gaaray horumarro muhiim ah oo ay ka mid yihiin Dhammaystirka iyo hirgelinta siyaasado iyo habraacyo heer Federaal, Dowlad-Goboleed iyo Degmo, sida Siyaasadda Qaran ee Maamul-Daadejinta, Xeerka Ururka Dowladaha Hoose, iyo istaraatiijiyadda iyo habraacyada maaliyada iyo adeeg bixinta iyo kaaboyaal dhismo, kulankan waxaa lagu Ansixinayay qorshe howleedka iyo miisaaniyadda sanada 2026

Kulanka waxaa qeyb ka ah mas’uuliyiinta  ugu saraysa Wasaaradda Arrimaha Gudaha XFS Wasaaradaha Arrimaha Gudaha Dowladd goboleedyada, gobolka Banaadir iyo hey’adaha Qaramada Midoobey.

Kalsooni darrada Muqdisho Maxay Deni iyo Axmed Madoobe uga baqayaan Madaxtooyada?

Khilaafka goobta shirka ee u dhexeeya Madaxweyne Xasan Sheekh iyo madaxda Deni iyo Axmed Madoobe maaha kaliya muran ku saabsan "meel", balse waa mid ku saabsan kalsoonida iyo amniga siyaasadeed.

1-Gorgortanka Awoodda: Deni iyo Axmed Madoobe waxay u arkaan Xalane "Garoon dhexdhexaad ah" oo ay ku dareemayaan xorriyad siyaasadeed, halka ay Villa Somalia u arkaan goob lagu dhex go'doomiyo (Isolation).

2-Cabsida Amniga: Maadaama ay dalka ka jiraan loollan xooggan oo ku saabsan hannaanka doorashada 2026, waxay ka baqayaan in Villa Somalia looga yeeriyo go’aanno aysan raalli ka ahayn ama ciidankooda ilaalada laga fogeeyo.

3-Xoog-ku-muuqasho: Madaxweyne Xasan Sheekh wuxuu rabaa inuu muujiyo in madaxtooyadu tahay halka laga go'aamiyo masiirka dalka, halka madaxda goboleedyadu ay rabaan markhaati caalami ah (Beesha Caalamka) si looga dammaanad qaado fulinta wixii lagu heshiiyo.

Inay labada dhinac ku kala adkaystaan Xalane iyo Villa Somalia waxay muujinaysaa heerka ay gaarsiisanyihiin kalsooni darrada iyo kala fogaanshaha siyaasadeed ee hadda ka jira Soomaaliya.

YEEP Somalia Hosted Youth Workshop on Empowering Youth Through PCVE Knowledge For the PCVE Day 

Yesterday, YEEP Somalia successfully hosted a youth workshop at American Corner Mogadishu under the theme “Empowering Youth Through PCVE Knowledge.” The workshop was organized in observance of PCVE Day, aiming to enhance youth awareness and understanding of Preventing and Countering Violent Extremism (PCVE) while strengthening the role of young people in peacebuilding and community resilience.

The session brought together engaged and motivated youth who participated in interactive discussions and group activities focused on understanding violent extremism, preventing radicalization, and promoting leadership, critical thinking, and positive youth engagement. The level of participation and thoughtful dialogue demonstrated the strong potential of youth to act as agents of peace and positive social change within their communities.

YEEP Somalia extends its sincere appreciation to Omar Faruk, Chairperson of the Banadir Youth Region, and Amb Amal Abdullahi representing the Somali National Youth Council, for their valuable presence and contributions. We also thank the American Corner Mogadishu team for their continued cooperation and support in facilitating a conducive learning environment.

Finally, we extend our gratitude to all youth participants whose active engagement, insights, and commitment made the workshop impactful and successful. At YEEP Somalia, we remain committed to empowering young people with the knowledge and skills necessary to prevent violent extremism and contribute to sustainable peace and development.

post_text_pi: Daawo: Khudbadda Wasiirka Arrimaha Gudaha, Federaalka iyo Dib u heshiisiinta XFS mudane Hon Ali Yusuf Ali - Xoosh oo ka hadlay kulanka daahfurka Kulanka Guddiga Sare ee Mashruuca Dowlad-Kaab.

Maamul goboleed  iyo  Federal government  farqugaas  u dhaxeye

Marqaan: Waxaa xadhiga laga jaray mashruuca korontada 24-ka saac ee laga dhaliyo Tamarta Cadceeda (Solar System), kaas oo ay ku baxday miisaaniyad dhan 168 milyan oo birr oo laga hirgaliyay magaalada Marqaan ee gobolka Doollo. 

Mashruucan oo wax weyn ka tari doona baahida korontada bulshada reer Marqaan ayaa waxaa si wadajir ah xadhiga uga jaray masuuliyiin sare oo heer dal iyo heer deegaan ah oo ay ugu horeeyaan Wasiiru-dowlaha Wasaaradda Biyaha iyoTamarta JDFI Dr./Eng. Suldaan Wali, Wasiirka Xafiiska Horumarinta Magaalooyinka iyo Dhismaha DDS Mudane Axmed Shugri iyo gudoomiyaha gobolka Doollo, Mudane C/laahi Deeq iyo masuuliyiin kale oo heer deegaan. 

Mashruucan oo awood u leh in uu soo saaro xoog koronto oo dhan 250 Kw isla markaana qayb ka ah 4 mashruuc oo dhawaan xadhiga laga jaray ayay ujeedadoodu tahay in bulshada masaafo ahaan ka fog xadhkaha korontada 24-ka saac ee laga dhaliyo biyaha in iyana la gaadhsiiyo  adeega korontada ku shaqeeya tamarta cedceeda.

Wasiiru-dowlaha Wasaaradda Biyaha iyo Tamarta JDFI iyo Wasiirka Xafiiska Horumarinta Magaalooyinka iyo Dhismaha DDS ayaa sheegay in dal ahaan qorshe loo qaatay in bulshada la gaadhsiiyo adeega korontada  oo baahi weyn loo qabo, iyadoo laga faa'iidaysanayo tamarta cedceeda oo Deegaanka Soomaalidu hodan ku yahay.

Sidoo kale, masuuliyiinta ayaa tilmaamay in mashaariicaha hormarineed ee noocan ah ay qayb ka yihiin nidaamka magaalaynta iyo horumarinta nolosha bulshada.

Warbixintaas waxaa diyaariyay guddi ka socday African Union, waxaana hoggaaminayay danjireyaal ay ka mid ahaayeen Patrick Mazimhaka. Guddigu waxay booqdeen Somaliland si ay u qiimeeyaan xaaladda siyaasadeed, amni iyo taariikhdeeda.

Maxay warbixintu sheegtay?

Warbixinta AU (2005) waxay xustay in:
 • Somaliland leedahay taariikh gumeysi oo ka duwan tii koonfurta (British Somaliland vs Italian Somalia).
 • Midowgii 1960 uu ahaa mid si degdeg ah loo galay, islamarkaana uusan helin hannaan sharci oo si buuxda loo dhameystiray labada dhinac.
 • Xilligii 1960–1990 uu jiray khilaaf siyaasadeed iyo dagaallo sababay burburkii dowladdii dhexe.
 • Somaliland ay muujisay deganaansho iyo hannaan doorashooyin ah oo ka duwan inta kale ee Soomaaliya.
 • Arrinta Somaliland aysan ahayn “gooni-isu-taag qabiil ku saleysan” balse ay leedahay dood sharci iyo taariikheed oo u gaar ah.

Si kastaba, AU ma aysan aqoonsan Somaliland dawlad madax-bannaan; waxay ku talisay in arrinta lagu xalliyo  qaab sharci ah oo Afrikaan ah. Si madax banan
