post_author_name_pi: Wasaaradda Waxbarashada, Hiddaha & Tacliinta Sare ee Hirshabelle
post_text_pi:
Nairobi, February, 16,2026:- Agaasimaha Guud ee Wasaaradda Waxbarashada iyo Tacliinta Sare ee Dowladda Hirshabelle, Mudane Axmed Cabdullaahi Bashiir Nuur, ayaa magaalada Nairobi ee caasimadda Kenya kaga qeyb galay tababar muhiim ah oo la xiriira habka qiimeynta waxbarashada dalka.

Tababarkan oo soconaya muddo afar maalmood ah, ayaa si qoto dheer loogu falanqeynayaa nidaamka National Learning Assessment, kaas oo diiradda saaraya cabbiridda tayada waxbarashada, heerka fahamka ardayda, iyo hababka lagu horumarin karo manhajka iyo wax-dhigista. Intii uu tababarku socday, waxaa laga yeeshay doodo iyo falanqeyn ballaaran oo ku saabsan caqabadaha jira, sida loo mideyn karo habka qiimeynta, iyo sida xog sax ah looga heli karo waxqabadka ardayda si loo hagaajiyo tayada waxbarashada.

Ujeeddada ugu weyn ee kulamada iyo doodahaasi waxay ahayd in la helo hab mideysan oo lagu ogaan karo heerka waxbarasho ee ardayda, si loo qorsheeyo horumar waxbarasho oo waxtar leh. Ka-qeybgalayaasha ayaa is-weydaarsaday khibrado, tusaalooyin wax ku ool ah, iyo talooyin la xiriira hirgelinta nidaamka qiimeynta waxbarashada.

Sidoo kale, shirkan waxaa ka qeyb galay Agaasimayaasha Guud ee Wasaaradaha Waxbarashada heer Federaal iyo Dowlad-goboleedyada, kuwaas oo si wadajir ah uga shaqeynaya xoojinta tayada waxbarashada dalka.

#Puntland: Faadumo Qaadi Xaashi oo ahayd gabar ka baxday Jaamacad kuna biirtay ciidanka Puntland, mudo dheerna ka tirsanayd hay’ada PMPF ayaa shaqadii laga saaray, iyadoon loo sheegin wax sabab ah oo shaqadeeda ay ku wayday sidda aan xogta ku helnay.

Faadumo oo ahayd gabdhaha firfircoon ee shaqada ciidanka ka dhex-muuqda ayaa horey looga sameeyay dhawr sheeko oo la xiriirta kaalinta haweenka ee ciidanka PL, iyadoo sheekooyinkaas mid ka mid ah ay noqotay mid caalami ah oo Afrika si weyn ugu faaftay, waxaana samaysay BBC.

Masuuliyiin kala duwan iyo ehelada Faadumo oo madaxda hay’ada la xiriiray ayaan ilaa iyo hadda wax sabab ah u sheegin sababta shaqada looga saaray Faaduma, mana jirto taageero sharci iyo mid dawladeed oo ilaa hadda ka shaqaynaya sidii dulmigga Faadumo ku dhacay wax looga qaban-lahaa, shaqadeeda dib loogu celin-lahaa.

Warar madax-banaan oo aan hellay ayaa sheegaya in madaxda hay’ada ay mudooyinkaan wadeen inay shaqaalaha qaarna lacagta ka jaraan, kuwa kalena shaqada ka saaraan sabab la’aan iyagoo uga gol-leh in xuquuqda ay muwaadiniintaas heli-jireen ay gacantooda gasho.

Hay’ada PMPF oo ah ahayd mida ugu tayada saraysa hay’ada Amnigga Puntland ayaa sanadihii lasoo dhaafay wajahaysay hoos u dhac xagga tayada iyo maamulkaba, heer ay gaartay in ciidanka ilaalada xeradda ay Albaabka xirtaan, ciidamadiina ay furimaha uga soo baxaan mushahar la’aan.

Musharax Madaxweyne Prof. Mohamed Issak Idow oo soo saarey Baaq Ku wajahan Siyaasiyiinta Soomaaliyeed

Shacabka Soomaaliyeed meel kasta oo aad joogtaan,Maanta waxaan idiinla hadlayaa anigoo qalbi furan leh, maskax degan leh, iyo damiir qaran oo ii sheegaaya in dalku u baahan yahay run, jihayn iyo xal ka weyn shaqsiyaad iyo kursi-doon.

Waxaan joognaa marxalad kale oo kala guur ah. Khilaaf siyaasadeed oo sii xoogeysanaya, kalsooni darro u dhexeysa hay’adaha dowladda, iyo is-maandhaaf federaal oo sii qoto dheer. 

Waxaa muuqata in Villa Soomaaliya ay mar kale noqotay xarun is jiid-jiid ah halkii ay ka ahaan lahayd xarun mideysa ummadda.

Anigu ma aaminsani in xal lagu heli karo dagaal siyaasadeed oo joogto ah, mana aaminsani in dowladnimo lagu dhisi karo cadaadis iyo kala fogeyn.

Waxaan si cad u leeyahay: dalka waxaa lagu badbaadin karaa oo keliya wada-hadal qaran oo dhab ah.

Madaxweyne Xasan Sheekh Maxamuud iyo Guddoomiyaha Golaha Shacabka Aadan Maxamed Nuur (Aadan Madoobe) waxaa saaran masuuliyad taariikhi ah.

 Masuuliyaddu ma ahan ilaalinta kursi, waa ilaalinta qaran. Ma ahan ku adkeysiga awood, waa dhisidda kalsooni.

Khilaafka u dhexeeya dowladda federaalka iyo maamul-goboleedyada sida Puntland iyo Jubaland ma aha mid lagu xallin karo hadallo warbaahineed ama go’aamo hal dhinac ah.

 Waxaa lagu xallin karaa oo keliya miis wadajir ah oo lagu soo celiyo ruuxdii federaalka: wadaag awood, wadaag mas’uuliyad, wadaag qaranimo.

Shacabka Soomaaliyeed,
Waan ka daalnay shirar dibadda lagu qabto oo lagu kala saaro danaha siyaasadeed. 

Waan ka daalnay in masiirkeena lagu go’aamiyo meel aan calankeenu ka taagneyn. Haddaan nahay ummad, waa inaan awood u yeelannaa inaan khilaafkeenna gudaha ku xallinno.

Haddaba jihada xalku waa tan:
In si degdeg ah loo qabto Shir Wadatashi Qaran oo aan laga hagayn dibadda, laguna casuumo dhammaan maamul-goboleedyada, mucaaradka, bulshada rayidka ah iyo aqoonyahanka.

In la sameeyo heshiis siyaasadeed oo ku saabsan hannaanka doorashooyinka, awood qaybsiga, iyo dhammeystirka dastuurka.

In la xaqiijiyo madax-bannaanida baarlamaanka iyo garsoorka si aysan u noqon laamo u janjeera hal dhinac.

In la joojiyo hadallada hurinaya kala qaybsanaanta, laguna beddelo luuqad mideysa shacabka.

Maanta ma taagna waqtigii la isku muujin lahaa xoog siyaasadeed; waa waqtigii la muujin lahaa bisayl siyaasadeed.
Waxaan shacabka ugu baaqayaa inay codkooda si nabad ah u muujiyaan, una istaagaan dowladnimo caddaalad ku dhisan. 

Waxaan siyaasiyiinta ugu baaqayaa inay ka hormariyaan jiritaanka qaranka danaha gaarka ah.

Taariikhdu ma cafiso kuwa dal burburin kara, laakiin way maamuustaa kuwa badbaadiya marka xaaladdu adkaato.

Soomaaliya ma aha kursi, ma aha xil, ma aha shaqsi.Soomaaliya waa qaran ka weyn dhammaanteen.

Waana waqtigii aan mar kale dooran lahayn jidka midnimada, caddaaladda, iyo wada-hadalka.

Mahadsanidiin.

Munaasabadda shaacinta astaanta iyo ballan-qaadka Xisbiga Barwaaqo ee doorashada 7aad ee qaranka ayaa caawa lagu qabtay magaalada Jigjiga.

Madaxweynaha DDS, Mudane Mustafe Muxumed Cumar, Afhayeenka Golaha Xildhibaanada DDS Marwo Ayaan Cabdi, masuuliyiinta Xisbiga Barwaaqo ee heer deegaan iyo taageerayaal tiro badan ayaa ka qayb-galay munaasabadda oo si heer sare ah loo soo agaasimay, laguna soo bandhigay astaanta iyo ballan-qaadka xisbiga ee doorashada 7aad ee qaranka.

Madaxweyne Mustafe Muxumed Cumar ayaa sheegay in Xisbiga Barwaaqo wax badan ka qabtay horumarinta kaabayaasha aasaasiga ah ee deegaanka. Sidoo kale, mabaa’diida xisbigu ku dhisan yihiin midnimo qaran, isla markaana dalka lagu hoggaaminayo aragti ku salaysan horumar, wadajir iyo barwaaqo.

Eng. Maxamed Shaalle, Madaxa Xisbiga Barwaaqo ee Laanta DDS, oo ka hadlay madasha, ayaa sheegay in Xisbiga Barwaaqo uu shacabka u ballanqaadayo in haddii uu ku guuleysto doorashada, la fulin doono mashaariic horumarineed oo ka jawaabaya baahiyaha dhabta ah ee bulshada.

Wuxuu xusay in Xisbiga Barwaaqo uu hore uga dhabeeyey ballanqaadyadii uu la galay shacabka, isla markaana deegaan ahaan laga hirgeliyey mashaariic waaweyn oo muuqda, kuwaas oo wax ka beddelay adeegyada iyo horumarka bulshada.
Sidoo kale, Eng. Maxamed Shaalle ayaa ugu baaqay dhammaan axsaabta siyaasadda inay ka wada shaqeeyaan sidii doorashadu ugu qabsoomi lahayd si nabad ah, xasillooni iyo is-ixtiraam ku dheehan tahay, si loo xoojiyo dimuqraadiyadda iyo wadajirka bulshada.

🗳️ Sidee Madaxweynaha Loo Doortaa?

📌 Gunaanad

Dhaqan ahaan, Taliyaha Abu Dhabi ayaa noqda madaxweyne.

Qofka ugu macquulsan ee beddeli kara Mohammed bin Zayed waa Sheikh Khalid bin Mohammed bin Zayed.

Madaxweyne-ku-xigeenka ayaa si ku meel gaar ah xilka u haya ilaa laga doorto madaxweyne cusub.

Haddii aad rabto, waxaan kuu sharixi karaa sida xilka Taliyaha Abu Dhabi laftiisa loo kala dhaxlo, maadaama taas ay si toos ah u saameyso madaxtinimada UAE.

Su’aalahan ma aha kuwo diinta lagu weerarayo. Waa kuwo lagu raadinayo faham qoto dheer. Diintu waxay leedahay labo lakab:
 1. waxyiga asalka ah
 2. Fahamka bani’aadamka ee ku dabaqmay waqtiyo kala duwan

Mararka qaar waxa u muuqda sinnaan la’aan ma aha wahyiga laftiisa, balse waa faham taariikheed oo u baahan in dib loo eego.

Qofka su’aalahan is weydiiya ma aha qof iimaan la’aan ah. Waa qof doonaya:
 • Caddaalad cad
 • Macne la fahmi karo
 • Diin la jaanqaadi karta caqli iyo xaqiiqo nololeed

Diintu ma aha cabsi oo keliya; waa faham, caddaalad iyo masuuliyad.

Dooddu waa furantahay. Fikirkaaga maxaa ka mid ah su’aalahan?

Kaaha Dhiiney hadaan isku dayo anigu anoo eegaya inta aan ka fahamsanahay iyo caqliga sidaan ayaan u dhigi lahaa. 

Aadan iyo Xaawo
Diinta Islaamka ma jirto daliil sheegaya in wadaad isku guuriyey 

#Guurku waa nidaam sharci oo loo dejiyey bani-aadamka marka bulsho la dhisay.

#Aadan iyo Xaawo waxay ahaayeen bilowga bani-aadamka; sharciyada bulsho (meher, markhaati, iwm) weli lama dejin.

Caqli ahaan: Sharciyada waxaa la sameeyaa marka bulsho jirto. Hal qoys oo bilow ah sharci uma baahna sida bulsho weyn.

2) Haddii habeenkii la soomo oo maalintii la cuno, ma la saameyn karaa sida hadda?

Soonka Islaamka waa nidaam waqti leh, laga bilaabo fajarka ilaa qorrax dhaca.
Haddii qof habeenkii oo dhan waxba cuni waayo oo maalintii wax cuno taasi ma aha soon shareeci ah.

Caqli ahaan: Soonku waa tababar rabitaan xakameyn, naxariis iyo cibaado. Ujeedadu ma aha oo kaliya gaajo, ee waa nidaam iyo adeecid.

3) Maalinta Qiyaamaha jinka iyo insigu ma is arkayaan?

Maalinta Qiyaamaha
Qur’aanku wuxuu sheegayaa in jinka iyo insiga la isu soo wada keeni doono 

Aragti culimada badankood:

#Dunida maanta waa la kala qariyey.
Aakhiro qarsoonaantaas ma jiri doonto.

Caqli ahaan: Haddii xisaab jirto, waa in markhaati iyo wada-arag jiro si caddaalad loo muujiyo waana la inoo sheegay in la hal meel la inaku xashrin doono. 

4) Muuminiinta jinka ma galaan Janno? Ma is arkayaan?

Janno
Qur’aanka (Suurat al-Rahmaan) waxaa lagu xusay in jinka iyo insiga labadaba loogu talagalay ajar iyo ciqaab.

Culimo badan waxay qabaan in jinka muuminiinta ahi galaan Janno.

Laakiin, Nooca noloshooda Jannada iyo is-aragooda insiga waa arrin aan tafsiil cad laga hayn.

Caqli ahaan: Haddii mas’uuliyad la wada leeyahay, ajar iyo ciqaabna waa la wada leeyahay.

5) Dad aan nabi loo dirin ma la cadaabi karaa?

Arrintan waxaa lagu magacaabaa “Ahl al-Fatrah”.

Culimo badan waxay qabaan:
Qof aan fariin helin si sax ah looma cadaabayo ilaa la imtixaano.

Quraanku wuxuu sheegay “Ma cadaabno ilaa aan Rasuul dirno.”

Caqli ahaan: Caddaaladdu waxay ku xirnaanaysaa wargelin iyo faham.

6) Maxaa dadka maanta loogu baahan yahay wadaad guur, halka Aadan & Xaawo aan loo baahnayn?

Kaahay sabab kale maaha ina adeer ee waa arin bulsho.

Guurka maanta wuxuu xaqiijiyaa nasab, xuquuq, iyo ilaalin.

Haddii aan nidaam la helin, jahawareer sharci iyo nasab ayaa imanaya.

Caqli ahaan: Qaanuunka waa in la caddeeyo marka khilaaf suurtagal yahay.

7) Qisaasta iyo magta (dil & diyada)

Haddii naag nin disho qisaas waa la fulin karaa.
Laakiin diyada dhaqanka fiqiga qaarkood haweeneyda waa kala bar.

Tani waxay ku salaysan tahay, 

Qaab dhaqaale oo qabiil ku dhisnaa (ninku masuul dhaqaale buuxa ahaa).

Ma diinta lafteeda mise tafsiir taariikheed?

Qaar culimada casriga ah waxay qabaan in qiimaha nafta isku mid yahay, tafsiirkuna ahaa mid bulsho gaar ah la jaanqaaday. Kolay ma aha arin quraani ah ee arin maslaxo ku salatsan. 

Caqli ahaan: Haddii qiimaha naftu isku mid tahay, caddaaladdu waxay u janjeertaa sinnaanta. Maslaxadana lama diidana.

8) Caruurta la korsado maxaa magacooda loo siin waayaa?

Islaamka wuxuu oggol yahay korin (kafaalad), balse ma oggola in la tirtiro nasabkii asalka ahaa.
Ujeedadu waa ilaalinta xaqiiqda abtirsiint, tan ugu yar arimo dhaxal iyo dhaqaale baaba imaan kara markaa soo madaxa la isla gali mayo? 

Caqli ahaan: Ilmuhu wuxuu xaq u leeyahay inuu ogaado asal ahaan halka uu ka yimid waana tan maalin walba family court loo saaran yahay wadamada reer galbeedka ee aan joogno.

9) Dhaxalka ragga badan & magta dumarka kala bar

Qur’aan 4:11 – ragga mararka qaarkood laba jeer ayey qaataan.

Sababta shareecada:

Ninku Waxaa  waajib ku ah masruuf, hoy, iwm.
Haweeneyda hantideeda waa mid gaar u ah iyada.

Laakiin maanta:
Haddii masuuliyadda dhaqaale wadajir noqoto, dood sharci-fiqi ah ayaa furan waayo anaga dumar ah ayaa masuuliyadii la wareegnay in badan oo ragga ah saarnayd.

Caqli ahaan: Qaanuun kasta wuxuu ku dhisan yahay qaab dhaqaale. Marka qaabka dhaqaale is beddelo, dood sharci ayaa furanta.

10) Ceymiska gaadiidka waa runtaa, lakin tussle ahaan, 

Wadamada qaarkood ceymis waa waajib sharci ah.culimo badan waxay oggolaadeen noocyo ceymis ah marka ay danta guud tahay.

11) Meelaha dadka lagu jirdilo

Haddii ay sharci darro yihiin waa in la xirraa.
Islaamku wuxuu mamnuucay dulmi iyo jirdil. Nabigu (NNKH) wuxuu yiri: “Ha dulmina.

Wali waa dood furan oo hadii loo baahdo culumo ka hadli karto lakin gabdha walashay ah cayda halaga daayo idinkama istahisho mana aysan idin dulmin. Waxay raadinaysaa in ay ogaato wana qayb cilmi barashada ka mid ah qofku si edeb iyo hanaan sare leh ayuu fikirkiisa u dhiiban karaa waana lagu all nabad galyaa.

Xasan masuul qaran oo ka liitaa, ma soo marin madaxnimada Soomaaliya.
● Shabaab lama uu dagaalamin ee igu sawir bay ka ahayd.
Dadkii iska dhicin lahaana wuu u hoosaasiyey.
● Ciidankii Formaajo ka tegey iyo madaxdiisiiba wuu dhammeeyey.
● Dastuurkii laysku ogaa, wuu ku falaaday.
● Dowlado iyagu aan heshiis ahayn buu dalka difaaciisa heshiisya kala duwan kala galay, arrinkaa oo horseedi kara iska hor imaado Dowlada kale oo dalka ka dhaca.
● Sumcaddii dalka wuu diley, had iyo goor  nin ay isku darejo yihiin oo asaagiis
ah buu madaxa u laalaadinayaa.
● Intuu nabad raadin lahaa wuxuu duulaan ku ekeeyey; JUBBADA HOOSE,  GOBOLKA GEDO, PUNTLAND iyo MAGAALADA BAYDHABO, Allaah mahaddise dhammaan wuu ku guul darraystay.
● Wuxuu quftay xabaalo, si uu u helo dhul bannaan, kuwaas haraadigii maydadkii ku jirey qaarkood loo dhoofiyey deegaamaday ka soo jeedeen oo dib loogu aasay.
● Wuxuu barakiyey dad degganaa dhulal Dowladdii M. Siyaad Barre ka tagtay oo dad gudaha ku barakacay ay deegaamaysteen, kuwaas oo aan dowladdiisu wax dib u dejin iyo cawil ah u samayn.
● Wuxuu ku adkeeyey dadka Soomaaliyeed safaradii caalamiga ahaa,isagoo ku soo rogey E-VISA, si khidmadaha viisihu ugu dhacaan khasnad uu isagu og yahay, dalka oo dhan.
● Wuxuu ka goostay qoondadii deeqaha DHAQAALE, WAXBARASHO, TABABARRO, KA MID AHAANSHAHA CIIDAMADA QARANKA iyo WAX KASTA OO CAALAMKU BIXIYEY, dowlad goboleedyada JUBBALAND iyo PUNTLAND ka dib markay ugu nacamlayn waayeen, waxa keligi talisnimada ah ee uu keligi walaaqanayo.
● Wuxuu Bah diley xafiiska ra'iisal wasaaraha oo lagu yimaado awood qaybsi beelaha ugu waaweyn Soomaaliya, kaas oo uu geystey asal ma doorshe uu leeyahay, oo cidduu magacooda kufadhiyo aan waxba ugu oollin.
● Hadda ayuu tolanayaa shaar keligi le'eg oon cid kale la gelin karin, ujeedkuna yahay inuu weliiiba iska joogo, sida uu ka dheegtey Madaxweyne Ismaaciil Cumar Geelle.
● Wuxuu doorashadoodii baajiyey oo sharci darro ku jooga xafiisyada, madaxda dowlad goboleedyadii la walaaqanayey, qaska iyo ku takrifalka awoodda dowladnimada Soomaaliya.

Wasiirka Arrimaha Gudaha, Federaalka iyo Dib u heshiisiinta XFS mudane xildhibaan Hon Ali Yusuf Ali - Xoosh  iyo wafdi uu hoggaaminayo oo uu qeyb ka yahay Wasiirka Wasaaradda Gaashaandhigga XFS mudane Axmed Macallin Fiqi ayna wehliyaan saraakiil sare sida Taliyaha Ciidamada Xoogga dalka Sarreeye Guuto Ibraahim Maxamed Maxamuud iyo taliyaha Turksom Sareeye Gaas Sebahattin Kalkan ayaa goordhow safar shaqo oo Xasillin iyo daadejinta adeegyada dowladnimada ee goobaha laga xoreeyey Khawaarijta la xiriira ku gaaray Sabiid iyo Caanoole.

Wafdiga ayaa halkaasi u tagay daahfurka mashaariic Xasillin ah oo lagu talogalay dadka deegaanka kadib xoreynta.

Macalin Maajid Axmed dardaaran waad Dhameysay 
Meeshii aad tagtaba Illaahay hakuu wanaajiyo Wll

Wasiirrada Arrimaha Gudaha, Gaashaandhigga, Taliyaha Ciidanka Xoogga Dalka, saraakiil Turki ah iyo masuuliyiin kale ayaa maanta gaaray deegaannada Sabiid iyo Caanoole ee Gobolka Shabeellaha Hoose, halkaas oo dib dejin loogu sameeyey qoysaskii ay Khawaarijtu ka dumiyeen guryahoodii, kana barakiciyeen deegaanadaas.

Dowladda ayaa markii ay Khawaarijta ka xoreysay deegaanadaas waxay shacabka u balan qaaday in dib loogu dhisi doono guryihii ay cadowga Khawaarijta ah ka burburiyeen, si looga shaqeeyo dib u soo kabashada bulshada.

Dadka deegaanka ayaa lagu wareejiyay guryo cusub oo loo dhisay, kadib guryahoodii ay burburiyeen kooxihii Khawaarijta ahaa ee deegaannadaas laga xoreeyey. 

Sidoo kale, waxaa la gaarsiiyay raashin iyo adeegyo gargaar oo loogu talagalay qoysaska danyarta ah ee ku nool deegaannadaas, si loo xoojiyo nolol maalmeedka bulshada,
loona dardargeliyo dib u dhiska deegaannada xorta ah.

Mogadishu, Banadir Region — Sen. Samafale Hassan Idow Muxumed (Kobac) today ordered a food aid donation to the poor living in Banadir Region, with this donation intended to benefit from the Iftar of the holy month of Ramadan that is beginning.

The food distributed consists of flour, rice, sugar, oil and dates, benefiting about 150 families including the poor, the disabled, the blind (amoolo) and the weak elderly who were not able to receive the food they needed to fast during the month of Ramadan.

Samafale Hassan Idow Muxumed said that the purpose of this aid is to support the vulnerable community at a time when they are in great need of support, noting that the games will continue, the same game with the future and other regions of the country.

“We are always concerned about our Somali people, we are committed to continuing to provide letters and documents to the needy community,” said the philanthropist.

Finally, the HKF Administration called on Somali businessmen and the community to participate in helping the needy, especially during the holy month of Ramadan, a time when charity and self-help are of great value.

Agaasimaha Guud ee Wasaaradda Arrimaha Gudaha, Federaalka iyo Dib-u-heshiisiinta ee Dowladda Federaalka Soomaaliya Mudane Abdulkadir Ali ayaa shir-guddoomiyay kulan Guddiga Farsamada ee Mashruuca SRSP.

Kulanka oo sidoo kale qeyb ka ahaayeen Xafiiska Ra’iisul Wasaaraha, SJF, UNDP iyo UNTMIS ayaa waxaa lagu falanqeeyey Mashruuca SRSP kaasi oo laga maalgeliyo  Sanduuqa  SJF oo dowladda Soomaaliya ay hirgelintiisa hormuud ka tahay iyadoo kaashaneysa UNDP isla markaana dowr ku leh xoojinta nidaamyada dowladnimada, geeddi-socodka dib-u-heshiisiinta, iyo horumarinta hay’adaha dowliga ah ee dalka. 

Doodaha kulanka ayaa diiradda lagu saaray:
1. Dib-u-eegista horumarka la gaaray tan iyo bilowgii barnaamijka

MUDANAYAASHA LABADA AQAL EE BAARLAMAANKA DALKA OO MAANTA BILAABAY KA DOODISTA CUTUBYADA 7-AAD IYO 8-AAD EE DASTUURKA KMG AH.

Muqdisho-Soomaaliya 17, Febraayo, 2026: Mudanayaasha labada aqal ee Baarlamaanka Jamhuuriyadda Federaalka Soomaaliya ayaa maanta kulan wadajir ah ku yeeshay xarunta Golaha Shacabka, waxaana shir Guddoominayey Guddoomiyaha Golaha Shacabka ee Baarlamaanka Jamhuuriyadda Federaalka Soomaaliya Mudane Sheekh Aadan Maxamed Nuur (Madoobe) oo ay wehliyaan xubnaha kale ee guddoonka labada aqal.

Ajendaha kulanka labada aqal ee maanta ayaa waxa uu ahaa dib u eegista dastuurka, marxlaadda labaad, ka doodista soo jeedimaha wax ka baddalka dastuurka gaar ahaan cutubyadiisa 7-aad iyo 8-aad, waxaana mudanayaasha labada aqal ay si gaar ah dood xasaasi ah uga yeesheen qodobada 109-aad ilaa 129-aad.

Guddoomiyaha Golaha Shacabka ee Baarlamaanka Jamhuuriyadda Federaalka Soomaaliya Mudane Sheekh Aadan Maxamed Nuur (Madoobe) oo kulanka soo xiray ayaa sheegay in dooda cutubyadan ay sii socon doonto, islamarkaana lasii amba qaadi doono kulanka kan xiga.

Taageerada Mushahar-Bixinta Shaqaalaha Rayidka Heshiis Cusub Oo Lagu Dib-u-Habaynayo Deeqaha 
=====================

Wasiirrada Maaliyadda Heer Federaal iyo Dowlad-Goboleed ayaa dib-u-habayn ku sameeyey nidaamka wadaagga deeqaha, gaar ahaan qaybta loo yaqaan “equal share”, oo ah qoondada si siman loogu qaybiyo dhammaan maamulada.

Tusaale ahaan, haddii deeqdu tahay $100 milyan, lana go’aamiyo in 25% ay noqoto “equal share”, markaas $25 milyan ayaa si isku mid ah loogu qaybinayaa Maamul kasta, iyadoon lagu salayn tirada dadka ama baahida, halka inta kale lagu qaybin karo qaabab kale sida waxqabad ama baahi gaar ah.

Agaasimaha Guud ee Isbitaalka Banadir, 𝐃𝐫. 𝐀𝐛𝐝𝐢𝐫𝐚𝐬𝐚𝐤 𝐒𝐡𝐚𝐫𝐢𝐟 𝐀𝐥𝐢, iyo xubno ka tirsan maamulka sare ee 𝑰𝒔𝒃𝒊𝒕𝒂𝒂𝒍𝒌𝒂 𝑩𝒂𝒏𝒂𝒅𝒊𝒓 ayaa booqasho rasmi ah ku tagay 𝑰𝒔𝒃𝒊𝒕𝒂𝒂𝒍𝒌𝒂 𝑯𝒐𝒓𝒚𝒂𝒂𝒍. Maamulka sare ee Isbitaalka Horyaal ayaa si heersare ah ugu soo dhaweeyay wafdiga. Kulanka dhexmaray labada isbitaal wuxuu ahaa mid muhiim ah oo lagu xoojiyay iskaashiga iyo wada-shaqeynta labada isbitaal.

Intii uu kulanku socday, labada dhinac waxay isweydaarsadeen xog ku saabsan adeegyada caafimaad ee ay bixiyaan, caqabadaha horyaalla, iyo fursadaha wadajir loogu horumarin karo tayada adeeg-bixinta. Waxa sidoo kale la soo hadal qaaday sidii loo xoojin lahaa 𝒕𝒂𝒃𝒂𝒃𝒂𝒓𝒓𝒂𝒅𝒂 𝒔𝒉𝒂𝒒𝒂𝒂𝒍𝒂𝒉𝒂 iyo 𝒊𝒔𝒘𝒆𝒚𝒅𝒂𝒂𝒓𝒔𝒊𝒈𝒂 𝒂𝒒𝒐𝒐𝒏𝒕𝒂 si loo hagaajiyo tayada adeegyada caafimaadka ee dalka.

Ugu dambeyn, wafdiga Isbitaalka Banadir ayaa booqday qaar ka mid ah qaybaha muhiimka ah ee Isbitaalka Horyaal, halkaas oo ay si toos ah ugu arkeen tayada adeegyada caafimaad iyo daryeelka bukaanka ee isbitaalka, taasoo muujinaysa heerka sare ee adeegyada caafimaad ee isbitaalku bixiyo.

Wasiirka Haweenka Koonfur Galbeed Oo Dhiirrigelisay Gabdhihii Kaalmaha Sare Ka Galay Tartanka Quraanka Kariimka.

Madaxweynaha Dowladda Koonfur Galbeed Mudane Cabdicasiis Xasan Maxamed Laftagareen ayaa Abaal marino Gudoonsiiyey ku Guulaystiyaasha Tartanka Quraanka Kariimka ee Dowlada Koonfur Galbeed oo maanta si rasmi ah loo soo xiray.

Tartankan oo ay ka qeybgaleen tartamayaal ka kala yimid degmooyinka iyo gobollada kala duwan ee Koonfur Galbeed ayaa ujeeddadiisu ahayd dhiirrigelinta barashada, xifdinta iyo ku dhaqanka Quraanka Kariimka iyo kobcinta tartanka diimeed ee dhalinyarada.

Wasiirka ayaa hadal ay ka jeedisay munaasabadda ku bogaadisay Wasaaradda Awqaafta iyo Arrimaha Diinta, culimada, macallimiinta iyo dhammaan dadkii ka shaqeeyey qabsoomidda tartanka, iyada oo tilmaantay in tartamada noocan ah ay muhiim u yihiin kobcinta aqoonta diinta iyo tarbiyadda wanaagsan ee dhalinyarada.

Marwo Shamso Maxamed Yarow ayaa si gaar ah u dhiirrigelisay gabdhihii ka qeyb-galay tartanka iyo kuwa ku guuleystay kaalmaha hore, iyadoo ku ammaanay dadaalkooda, xifdintooda iyo ku adkeysiga barashada Quraanka Kariimka.

Waxay sidoo kale xustay in Wasaaradda Haweenka ay ka shaqeyn doonto kor u qaadista doorka gabdhaha ee barashada diinta, islamarkaana ay muhiim tahay in gabdhaha lagu taageero fursadaha waxbarasho ee diimeed iyo kuwa guudba.

KHAALID MISHCAL IYO KHALIIL AL-HAYYA OO ISUGU SOO HADHAY FINAL-KA DOORASHADA HOGGAANKA CUSUB EE XAFIISKA SIYAASADDA DHAQDHAAQAAQA Xamaas ‼️

Xamaas ayaa la filayaa inay goordhow ku dhawaaqaan magaca hoggaankooda cusub, kaddib markii ay soo gabagabowday doorashadii madaxa iyo xubnaha xafiiska siyaasadda ee ururka, sida ay werisay warbaahinta carbeed ee “Asharq”.

Ilo ka tirsan Xamaas ayaa sheegay in dhawaan la shaacin doono magaca madaxa cusub ee xafiiska siyaasadda marka si rasmi ah loo dhammaystiro natiijooyinka doorashada. Waxaana la filayaa in la shaaciyo inta lagu guda jiro bisha barakaysan ee Ramadaan.

Madaxa cusub ayaa beddeli doona golihii hoggaamineed ee ku-meel-gaarka ahaa ee shanta xubnood ka koobnaa, kuwasoo xilka la wareegay kaddib dilkii loo geystay hoggaamiyihii hore ee Xamaas, Yaxya Sinwar, ahaana maskaxdii ka dambaysay weerarkii 7-da Oktoobar 2023.

Tartanka ugu dambeeya ayaa u dhexeeya laba shaqsi oo miisaan culus ku leh Xamaas: Khaliil Al-Hayya, oo hadda gadh-wadeen ka ah xafiiska siyaasadda ee Gaza, iyo Khaalid Mishcal, oo isaguna hogaaminaya siyaasadda arrimaha dibadda ee Xamaas.

Sida la sheegay, Zaahir Jabarin iyo Nizar Cawadallah ayaa horeY uga mid ahaa musharraxiinta, balse tartanka ayaa ugu dambayn ku soo koobmay Al-Hayya iyo Mishcal, iyadoo la filayo in go’aanka kama dambaysta ah la gaaro toddobaadka ugu dambeeya ee bishan Febraayo.

Doorashadan cusub ayaa timid kaddib markii uu dhaqan galay heshiiska xabbad-joojinta ee u dhexeeyay Xamaas iyo Israa’iil bishii Oktoobar ee la soo dhaafay, Kumannaan xubnood oo ka kala socda Gaza, Daanta Galbeed (oo ay ku jiraan maxaabiista), iyo dibadda ayaana ka qayb qaatay habraaca doorashada oo isugu jiray cod bixin toos ah iyo mid dadban.

Inkastoo Xamaas aanay shaacin tirada rasmiga ah ee xubnaha codeeya, haddana ilo ku sugan Gaza iyo Doha ayaa qiyaasaya in tiradu ka badan tahay 100 kun oo xubnood.

Natiijada doorashadan ayaa waxaa shaacin doona Golaha Shuurada Guud iyo Xafiiska Siyaasadda, kuwaas oo si ku-meel-gaar ah u hoggaamin doona dhaqdhaqaaqa muddo hal sano ah, ka hor inta aan la qaban doorashada xigta.

Habraaca doorashada ayaa dhigaya in madaxa Xamaas ay doortaan 86 xubnood oo ka tirsan Golaha Shuurada Guud, kuwaas oo matalaya Gaza, Daanta Galbeed iyo dibadda.

Xafiiska siyaasadda ee cusub ayaa wajihi doona go’aanno masiiri ah oo la xiriira xaaladda amni ee Gaza, xiriirka ay la leeyihiin Maamulka Falastiiniyiinta, iyo jihada siyaasadeed ee marxaladda soo socota.

Sarkaal ka tirsan xafiiska siyaasadda ayaa sheegay in ururku uu ku adkaysanayo qabashada doorashada, iyadoo ay jiraan duruufo amni iyo kuwo siyaasadeed oo aad u adag, si loo ilaaliyo hannaanka shuurro ee lagu dooranayo hoggaanka.

Khabiirka ku takhasusay arrimaha Xamaas, Yaasiir Abu Hein, ayaa sheegay in dhaqdhaqaaqu u baahan yahay “shaqsi leh aqbalid Falastiini, mid Carbeed iyo mid caalami ah” si uu u hoggaamiyo marxaladda adag ee hadda taagan.

Sidoo kale, falanqeeyayaasha ayaa tilmaamay in dalalka gobolka sida Qatar, Iiraan iyo Turkigu ay saameyn ku yeelan karaan jihada iyo doorashada hoggaanka cusub.

Xamaas weli ma aysan shaacin bayaan rasmi ah oo ku saabsan natiijada doorashada, balse wararku waxay sheegayaan in magaca madaxa cusub lagu dhawaaqi doono maalmaha soo socda.

Guddiga nabadaynta beelaha walaalaha ah ee wada dega degmooyinka Xarshin iyo Yoocaale oo ka kooban 30 Oday-dhaqameed ayaa go’aan nabadeed kasoo saarey colaadii udhaxaysay bulshada walaalaha ah.

Munaasabad si heersare ah loo soo agaasimay oo ka dhacday duleedka degmada Yoocaale (Geedka Qudhac ijaabo) ayaa lagu soo bandhigay go’aanka wajiga koowaad ee qaybta dhulka ah ee heshiiska nabadeed ee laga gaadhay colaadii ka dhacday tuulooyinka Dacawalay iyo Duud-baydaalle, munaasabadan ayaana waxaa goobjoog ka ahaa guddiga nabadaynta beelaha walaalaha ah, masuuliyiin heer deegaan ah oo uu ugu horeeyo Hogaanka Nabadgalyada DDS Mudane C/qaadir Rashiid Ducaale, odayaasha dhaqanka, culimaa’udiin, waxgarad, maamulka goboladda Faafan iyo Jarar iyo qaybaha kala duwan ee bulshada.

Guddigii Nababadaynta, Odayaasha dhaqanka iyo masuuliyiintii munaasabadani nabadaynta ka hadashay ayaa ku dheeraatey ahmiyadda ay leedahay nabadu, iyagoo xusay in nabadu tahay tiirka ugu wayn ee jiritaanka bulsho, saldhiga horumarka, koboca dhaqaalaha iyo xasiloonida nolosha bulshada iyo wada-noolaansho ku dhisan walaalnimo, isjacayl, isixtiraam iyo xidid-wadaag.

Odayaasha dhaqanka ee beelaha walaalaha ah ee wada dega degmooyinka Xarshin iyo Yoocaale ayaa si buuxda u aqbalay oo qaatey go’aanka nabadaynta ah ee ay guddiga nabadayntu soo jeediyeen, iyagoona ballanqaadey in ay ka shaqayn doonaan adkaynta nabadgalyadda, xasiloonida iyo nabad ku wada-noolaanshaha bulshada.

Wajiga koowaad ee go’aanka nabadaynta ah ee ay soo saareen Guddiga Nabadaynta Beelaha Walaalaha ah ee wada dega degmooyinka Yoocaale iyo Xarshin isaga oo muuqaal ah dhawaan la soco.

Qado siyaasadeed mise qorshe Qaran?

Maanta magaalada Muqdisho waxaa ka dhacay kulan u ekaa mid fudud ; is arag iyo qado u dhaxeysay madaxda dawladda federaalka iyo qaar ka mid ah siyaasiyiinta mucaaradka. Sawirrada la baahiyay waxay muujinayeen gacan-qaad, qosol iyo hadallo kooban oo la sheegay. Hase yeeshee, marka la dhaafo muuqaalkaas, kulanku wuxuu qeyb ka yahay geeddi-socod aad u qoto dheer; doodaha ku saabsan doorashada xigta iyo waqtiga ay dalka ka dhaceyso.

Soomaaliya waxay mar kale taagan tahay halkii ay sannad kasta istaagto marka muddo xileed dhammaad ku dhow yahay. Waxaa la is waydiinayaa: goorma ayay doorashadu dhacaysaa? Qaabkee ayay u dhici doontaa? Ma jiri doontaa muddo kordhin qarsoon ama mid cad? Mucaaradku wuxuu ku celceliyaa digniin. Bulshaduna waxay ku wareertaa laba eray oo mar kasta la maqlo,doorasho iyo waqti,iyadoo aan si dhab ah loo falanqeyn wixii dhacay muddadii xileed ee dhammaanaya.

Taariikhda dhow ee Soomaaliya waxay muujinaysaa in marka muddo xileedku gabagabo noqdo, dooddu ku koobnaato waqtiga doorashada iyo qaabka ay u dhacayso. Sannadkii 2016, 2021 iyo xilligan xaadirka ahba, muranka ugu weyn wuxuu ahaa dib u dhac iyo hannaan lagu heshiiyo. Laakiin su’aasha ka maqan doodaha badankood waa tan: maxaa u qabsoomay dalka muddadii afarta sano ahayd?

Ma la sameeyay dib-u-habeyn hay’adeed oo waara? Ma la dhisay maxkamad sare oo madax-bannaan oo khilaafaadka doorasho kala saari karta? Ma la xaqiijiyay hay’ad doorasho oo ka madaxbannaan madaxtooyada? Ma la sameeyay tiro koob dadweyne? Ma la xakameeyay xuduudaha si diiwaangelin sax ah loo sameeyo? Si loo gaaro doorashada nidaam kasta uu miiska soo saaro ee ah mid qof iyo cod ah. Jawaabaha su’aalahan intooda badan waa kuwo aan caddayn ama aan jirin.Sidaas awgeed, dooddu waxay noqotaa mid ku wareegta waqtiga oo keliya, iyadoo aan la qiimeynin waxqabadka.

Qof iyo cod: riyo mise qorshe la taaban karo?

Labadii nidaam ee u dambeeyay, waxay soo bandhigeen doonistooda doorasho qof iyo cod ah. Waa himilo qaran oo la wada jecel yahay. Laakiin himilo kastaa waxay u baahan tahay saldhig adag. Dalal badan oo maanta lagu ammaano dimuqraadiyaddooda ma aysan ku gaarin hal mar.

Tusaale ahaan, Turkey waxay doorashooyin tartan badan leh ku dhaqaaqday 1950-kii, kaddib tobanaan sano oo dib-u-dhis hay’adeed ah oo ka bilaabmay 1923 markii Jamhuuriyadda la aasaasay. Xataa markaas, nidaamka ma ahayn mid kaamil ah,ciidamadu waxay marar badan farageliyeen siyaasadda. Laakiin hay’adahac maxkamadaha, guddiyada doorashooyinka, iyo maamulka rayidka waa la dhisay, waqti dheerna waa la siiyay.

Soomaaliya maanta ma leh hay’ad doorasho oo si buuxda uga madax-bannaan madaxtooyada. Ma leh maxkamad sare oo awood iyo kalsooni ku filan u leh inay go’aan kama dambeys ah ka gaarto muran doorasho. Ma leh dhaqaale ku filan oo lagu qabto doorasho guud oo xor ah. Dawladdu ma wada maamusho dhulka oo dhan si isku mid ah. Tiro koob dadweyne oo casri ah lama hayo.

Qarin fashil, soo bandhig tanaasul

Waxaa soo noqnoqotay muuqaal ah in madaxweyne kasta marka uu xilka wareejinayo uu isu arko mid dalka u tanaasulay, mid dalkan u turay. Hadalkaas wuxuu noqday caado siyaasadeed. Laakiin inta badan lama arko warbixin qaran oo si madax-bannaan u qiimeysa muddadii xileed: maxaa qabsoomay? Maxaa la ballanqaaday oo laga booday? Halkee ayuu dalku taagan yahay? 

Taas beddelkeeda, siyaasiyiintu waxay si fiican u fahmeen dabeecadda bulshada, dadku waxay xusuustaan waxa u dambeeya. Haddii muran doorasho abuurmo, haddii khilaaf cusub la kiciyo, ama haddii khatar la muujiyo, indhaha bulshada waxay ka jeestaan wixii hore oo aan la xisaabtamin.

Arrintan kuma koobna heerka federaalka. Qaar ka mid ah madaxda dawlad-gobolleedyada marka doorasho soo dhowaato waxay abuuraan xaalad degdeg ah— hoggaamiyaha markaas wuxuu isu sawiraa difaacaha gobolkiisa. Bulshaduna waxay raacda waddada ku dhammaanayaa danaha uu siyaasigu leeyahay. Waxaa la doortaa dhibaatada uu abuuray, isaga oo isla markaas sheeganaya inuu xal u yahay.

Halista ugu weyn: wacyiga bulshada oo hooseeya

Mid ka mid ah khataraha ugu waaweyn ee Soomaaliya wajahaysa ma aha oo kaliya khilaafka siyaasadeed, balse waa wacyiga bulshada oo aan weli gaarin heer ay ku joojin karto ciyaarta dareenka. Hoggaamiyeyaasha qaarkood waxay abuuraan dhibaatooyin, waxyaabo la fog waaqica dhabta ahna waxay u muujiyaan wax suragal ah. Bulshada qaarkeedna waxay raacdaa isla hoggaamiyeyaasha burburinaya mustaqbalkooda, iyada oo aan is waydiin: Ma yahay hoggaamiye wax qabtay mise waa mid ku celcelinaya wareegii hore?
Haddii aan laga gudbin wareeggan, doorasho muran dhalisa, muddo kordhin, tanaasul la sheegto, waxqabad la’aan la illoobo; Soomaaliya waxay ku socotaa waddo mar kale ku celin karta jahawareer iyo burbur siyaasadeed.

Maxaa la gudboon siyaasiyiinta?

Siyaasiyiinta Soomaaliya waxaa laga rabaa wax ka badan hadal ku saabsan doorasho iyo waqti. Waxaa laga rabaa:

•Qorshe qaran oo la taaban karo.

•Qorshe cad oo qeexaya sida loo dhisayo hay’ado madax-bannaan: maxkamad sare, guddi doorasho, iyo hannaan xisaabtan.

•Warbixin waxqabad ; in madaxweyne kasta iyo maamul kasta soo bandhigo warbixin qaran oo si cad u muujisa wixii qabsoomay iyo wixii ka baaqday.

•Joojinta siyaasadda cabsida

•In aan bulshada lagu mashquulin khatar la buunbuuniyay si fashil loo qariyo.

•Dhisidda dhaqaale doorasho oo lagu abuurayo sanduuq qaran oo si hufan loogu diyaariyo doorashooyin mustaqbalka.

Maxaa la gudboon bulshada?

Bulshada Soomaaliyeed doorkeeda waa mid ka weyn ka qeybgalka maalinta doorashada. Waxaa laga rabaa:

•Inay su’aalo adag weydiiyaan hoggaamiyeyaasha: maxaad qabatay? Maxaad ballanqaadday? Maxaa kuu hirgeli waayay?

•Inay taageeraan hoggaamiye leh qorshe cad oo la qiyaasi karo.

Waddada Soomaaliya ku socoto

Haddii doodaha mustaqbalka Soomaaliya lagu sii wado si aan waaqici ahayn,iyadoo aan la dhisin hay’ado, aan la xisaabtamin waxqabadka, lana adeegsanayo dareen iyo khilaaf;waddadaasi waa mid si fudud dib ugu celin karta dalka qalalaase siyaasadeed iyo kala fogaansho bulsho.

Laakiin haddii maanta laga bilaabo la yiraahdo: 

“Doorasho waa muhiim, balse waxa ka horreysa waa dhismaha saldhigga ay ku taagan tahay,”
markaas waxaa jiri kara rajada ah in laga gudbo wareega aan dhammadka lahayn ee muddo xileed kasta, xilliga uu dhammanayo la soo bandhigo dooddo is ku mid ah. 

Soomaaliya maanta uma baahna oo kaliya doorasho; waxay u baahan tahay isbeddel ku bilowda run sheegid, xisaabtan, iyo qorshe qaran oo waara. Haddii kale, qadooyinka siyaasadeed ee maanta la isugu yimid waxay noqon karaan sawirro qurux badan oo daboolaya su’aal weyn oo wali taagan: qarankan halkee ayuu u socdaa?
Guddoomiyaha Golaha Sare ee Isbitaalka Shaafi 𝐏𝐫𝐨𝐟/𝐃𝐫. 𝐓𝐚𝐡𝐥𝐢𝐥 𝐀𝐛𝐝𝐢 𝐀𝐟𝐫𝐚𝐡 wuxuu bulshada Soomaaliyeed ugu hambalyeynayaa bilashada bisha barakeysan ee Ramadaan.
Galmudug oo toos ugu dhaqaaqday in ay bilatay bishii ramadaan taas oo laga arkay Baydhabo Boocane iyo goobo kale oo badan.

Dowladda Federaalka Soomaaliya ayaa si rasmi ah u dhaqan gelisay nidaamka cusub ee Electronic Travel Authorisation (ETA) laga bilaabo 15-ka Febraayo 2026, kadib qorshe hore oo loo shaaciyay in la hirgelinayo dabayaaqadii sanadkii 2025.

Nidaamkan ayaa si buuxda u xakameynaya socdaalka rakaabka  u duulaya ama ku wajahan Soomaaliya, wuxuuna ka shaqeynayaa dhammaan garoomada caalamiga ah ee dalka, oo ay ku jiraan Muqdisho, Hargeysa, Garowe iyo Boosaaso.

ETA-da cusub ayaa si toos ah ugu xiran nidaamka shirkadaha diyaaradaha ee Departure Control System (DCS) iyo nidaamka xog is-weydaarsiga rakaabka ee API/PNR, sida ay muujinayaan dukumiintiyo ay aragtay Inside Somalia.

Marka nidaamkan la hawlgeliyo, lama oggolaan doono in rakaab loo saaro diyaarad ku socota guud ahaan Soomaaliya, haddii uusan horey oggolaansho uga haysan nidaamka ETA ee Dowladda Federaalka Soomaaliya. Taas macnaheedu waa in shirkadaha diyaaradaha aysan soo saari karin “boarding pass” ilaa oggolaanshaha laga xaqiijiyo nidaamka dowladda.

Nidaamkan cusub ayaa dowladda siinaya awood ay ku aragto xogta socdaalayaasha, oo ay ka mid yihiin:

Magaca buuxa, taariikhda dhalashada iyo faahfaahinta baasaboorka

Taariikhda safarka iyo fiisayaasha hore

Faahfaahinta tigidhka iyo goobta uu ku socdo rakaabku

E-visa qof kasta wuu ku safri karaa marka la siiyo, balse ETA kaliya waxaa safri kara qofka ay si gaar ah u oggolaato Hay’adda Socdaalka ka hor duulimaadka.

Golaha sare ee Muslimiinta Austria ayaa shaaciyay in Ramadan 19ka Bisha February oo ku aaddan Khamiista uu billow yahay.

Today, KARDO AID successfully conducted a Ramadan Food Voucher Distribution under the Ramadan Mogadishu Project 2026, generously supported by Secours Islamique France.
The distribution reached 200 displaced and vulnerable households affected by drought, helping families meet their immediate food needs during the holy month of Ramadan.

On February 17, 2026, the project reached its peak as all 200 targeted households successfully redeemed their food vouchers. Each family received a comprehensive food package including: 25kg Rice, 25kg Wheat Flour, 10kg Spaghetti, 5kg Sugar, 5kg Cowpeas, 3 Liters Cooking Oil, 2kg Dates, 1kg Tea Leaves and 1kg Salt.

This activity marks a key milestone in our ongoing commitment to supporting the most vulnerable communities in Gubadley District, Banadir Region, ensuring they are well-prepared for the blessed month of Ramadan.

We extend our sincere appreciation to our dedicated team, community committees, local authorities, and our valued partner for their collaboration and support in making this initiative a success.

Madaxweynaha ayaa  ugu baaqay shacabka Soomaaliyeed inay is cafiyaan isna kaalmeeyaan fadliga bishaan barakeysan ee Ramadaan awgeed.

“Bishan Soon-qaad waxey ku soo aday xilli adag oo dalkeenna ay ka jiraan duruufo iyo abaaro saameeyey dadka iyo duunyada waxaan dadka reer Hirshabelle ugu baaqayaa iney is kaalmeeyaan,is cafiyaan hoos loo fiiriyo kuwa nugul si Alle inoogu naxariisto”

Madaxweynaha ayaa ugu dambeyntii u duceeyay Umadda Soomaaliyeed, isagoo Ilaahay uga baryay inuu ka aqbalo soonka iyo cibaaddada bishan barakeysan ee Ramadaan.

I just can't stop thinking about my last day in Cairo. Saying goodbye to all of you was so much harder than I imagined, but it was also one of the most beautiful moments of my life. Thank you just doesn't feel like enough, but I have to start there.

Thank you for being there. Seeing your faces at the airport meant the world to me. It turned a sad moment into a celebration of our friendship, and I'll carry that memory with me forever. You made my departure feel full of love instead of just full of goodbyes.

More than that, Cairo-Egypt over 10+ years. That city was my home for so long, and you were the reason it was so special. You weren't just my friends; you were my family there.

Thank you for all the adventures.
Thank you for being there in the hard times.
Thank you for the simple, everyday moments.

I hope our paths cross again soon, whether here or back in Egypt. Until then, thank you for everything.

Madaxweynaha JFS ma noqon karo qof ka yar 40 sanno, sida oo kale wasiir ma noqon kado ruux ka yar 40 sanno — Dastuurka cusub ee JFS ayaa sidaasi dhiyaga, iyada oo dowladdu sheegtey dhawaan in 70% dadkeedu yihiin dhallinyaro.

Xubnaha labada Aqal ee Baarlamaanka Jamhuuriyadda Federaalka Soomaaliya ayaa maanta yeeshay kalfadhiga 7-aad, kulankiisa 19-aad ee wadajirka ah, waxaana shir guddoominayey Guddoomiya Golaha Shacabka Mudane Sheekh Aadan Maxamed Nuur Madoobe oo uu wehelliyo Guddoomiye kuxigeenka koowaad ee Aqalka Sare Mudane Cali Shacbaan Ibraahim iyo ku xigeennada labaad Mudane Cabdullaahi Cali  Xersi Timacadde iyo Mudane Cabdullaahi Cumar Abshirow.

Ajandaha kulanka maanta, ayaa waxa uu ahaa ka doodista soo-jeedimaha wax ka beddelka dastuurka, gaar ahaan dhammaystirka doodda cutubyada 7-aad iyo 8-aad oo ka hadlaya awoodaha Madaxwaynaha Jamhuuriyadda Federaalka Soomaaliya iyo Xukuumadda, iyadoo Xildhibaannada labada Aqal ay siyaabo kala duwan uga aragti dhiibteen doodda qodobadaas muhiimka ahaa.

Guddoonka Baarlamaanka oo kulanka soo xiray ayaa ku dhawaaqay in maanta si rasmi ah loo soo gebagebeeyay doodda qodobbada 119aad illaa 129 ee Cutubyada 7aad iyo 8aad ee Dastuurka, islamarkaana maalinta Sabtiga ah la guda geli doono ka doodi.

post_text_pi:
‎𝐋𝐚𝐚𝐬𝐜𝐚𝐚𝐧𝐨𝐨𝐝 | 𝟏𝟖 𝐅𝐞𝐛𝐫𝐚𝐚𝐲𝐨 𝟐𝟎𝟐𝟔, Madaxweynaha Dowladda Waqooyi Bari, 𝐌𝐮𝐝𝐚𝐧𝐞 𝐂𝐚𝐛𝐝𝐢𝐪𝐚𝐚𝐝𝐢𝐫 𝐀𝐱𝐦𝐞𝐝 𝐀𝐰-𝐂𝐚𝐥𝐢, oo uu weheliyo Wasiirka Wasaaradda Arrimaha Gudaha, ahna Guddoomiyaha Guddida Gurmadka Abaaraha, 𝐌𝐮𝐝𝐚𝐧𝐞 𝐀𝐱𝐦𝐞𝐝 𝐂𝐚𝐥𝐢 𝐘𝐚𝐤𝐡𝐥𝐞 iyo Dhamaan Gudiga Abaaraha, ayaa si rasmi ah u daah-furay Wajigii Koowaad ee barnaamijka biyo-dhaaminta loogu gurmanayo bulshada ay abaaruhu saameeyeen.

Munaasabadda daah-furka oo ka dhacday Laascaanood, caasimadda Dowladda Waqooyi Bari, ayaa waxaa ka soo qaybgalay masuuliyiin kala duwan, waxgarad, iyo qaybo ka mid ah bulshada.
Ujeeddada barnaamijkan ayaa ah in biyo nadiif ah la gaadhsiiyo deegaannada ay sida ba’an u saameeyeen abaartu, taas oo keentay biyo-yari iyo xaalado nololeed oo adag.

Guddoomiyaha Guddida Gurmadka iyo Taakulaynta Abaaraha, Mudane Axmed Cali Yakhle, ayaa sheegay in qorshahan biyo-dhaamintu wax weyn ka tari doono baahida degdegga ah ee biyo-la’aanta, isla markaana uu rajaynayo in bulshada si buuxda uga faa’iidaysan doonto, si loo badbaadiyo nolosha dadka iyo duunyadaba.

Biyo-dhaamintan ayaa muujinaysa sida ay Dowladda Waqooyi Bari uga go’an tahay garab-istaagga iyo samatabbixinta bulshada ay abaaruhu haleeleen, iyada oo mudnaanta koowaad siinaysa daryeelka iyo badbaadada shacabka iyo xoolahaba.

Muqdisho, Soomaaliya 18, Febraayo, 2026: Guddoomiyaha Golaha Shacabka ee Baarlamaanka Jamhuuriyadda Federaalka Soomaaliya oo maanta kulan wadajir ah yeeshay ayaa sii amba qaaday ka doodista qodobada labada cutub ee 7-aad iyo 8-aad ee dastuurka KMG-ka ah, waxaana kulanka shir guddoominayey Guddoomiyaha Golaha Shacabka ee Baarlamaanka Jamhuuriyadda Federaalka Soomaaliya Mudane Sheekh Aadan Maxamed Nuur (Madoobe) oo ay wehliyaan Guddoomiye kuxigeenka koowaad ee Golaha Aqalka Sare Mudane Cali Shacbaan Ibraahim, guddoomiye kuxigeennada labada aqal.

Kulanka wadajirka ah ee maanta ayaa Xildhibaanadda labada aqal waxa ay kusii amba qaadeen ka doodista dastuurka KMG-ka ah, qodobadiisa 7-aad iyo 8-aad.

Guddoomiyaha Golaha Shacabka ee Baarlamaanka Jamhuuriyadda Federaalka Soomaaliya oo kulanka soo xiray ayaa sheegay in maanta lasoo gaba gabeeyey ka doodista cutubyada todobaad iyo sideedaad ee dastuurka, islamarkaana kulanka kan xiga la bilaabi doono ka doodista cutubka 9-aad ee dastuurka.

Manchester United Oo Mustaqbalka Rashford Ka Soo Saartay Go’aan Ay Ka Naxeen Taageerayaasha Barcelona
 

Wargeyska The Sun ayaa sheegay in Manchester United aysan doonayn inay hoos u dhigto qiimaha £30 milyan ee horay loogu heshiiyay si loo iibiyo Marcus Rashford.

Rashford ayaa xagaagii hore amaah ugu biiray Barcelona, wuxuuna ilaa hadda dhaliyay 10 gool islamarkaana sameeyay 10 caawin, inkastoo uusan si joogto ah uga mid ahayn safka koowaad. Sida ay United u aragto, tiradaasi waxay ka dhigeysaa qiimaha £30m mid macquul ah.

Wararku waxay intaas ku darayaan in caqabadda ugu weyn aysan ahayn oo kaliya lacagta kala iibsiga, balse sidoo kale mushaharka ciyaaryahanka.

United ayaa badbaadsan doonta ku dhowaad £315,000 toddobaadkii haddii heshiisku dhaco, taasoo Barcelona aysan diyaar u ahayn inay si buuxda u qaaddo.

Taasi waxay keentay in loo baahdo wada-xaajood lala galo Rashford si uu u dhimo mushaharkiisa, si heshiiska joogtada ah uu u suurtagalo.

Dhinaca United, inkastoo uu yimid tababare cusub, haddana kooxda ayaa weli diyaar u ah inay iibiso Rashford, maadaama joogitaanka Carrick aan la hubin mustaqbalka fog. Kooxda ayaa sidoo kale raadineysa:

Khad dhexe cusub kadib bixitaanka Casemiro
Weeraryahan si loo xoojiyo safka hore
Barcelona dhankeeda, mudnaanta koowaad waa:

Difaac dhexe
Weeraryahan lambarka 9 ah
Rashford ayaa lagu tilmaamay doorashada saddexaad, iyadoo kooxda reer Catalonia ay weli qiimeyneyso awooddeeda dhaqaale si ay u dhammaystirto saddexda heshiis.

Ilaa hadda, Manchester United waxay ku adkeysaneysaa qiimihii horay loo dejiyay, taasoo ka dhigeysa wada-hadallada kuwo adag.

The Premier League deleted a social media post on Wednesday after online users criticized a graphic that displayed an incomplete map of Morocco without the country's southern provinces.

The post was intended to celebrate Moroccan footballers who have played in England's top division, but social media users quickly pointed out that the map shown with the players excluded Morocco's southern territories, leading to widespread criticism online.

The graphic featured Moroccan players who have competed in the English league, including former international Mustapha Hadji, as well as more recent players such as Hakim Ziyech and Romain Saïss, with the phrase "No Room for Racism" next to the league's emblem.

Moroccan footballer Brahim Díaz celebrated his 100th victory with Real Madrid after winning over Benfica 1-0 on Tuesday at the Estádio da Luz, Real Madrid reported.

Díaz reached the milestone in his fifth season with the club, having played 145 games. His wins include 67 in La Liga, 18 in the Champions League, eight in the Copa del Rey, three in the Spanish Super Cup, three in the Club World Cup, and one in the UEFA Super Cup.

He made his Real Madrid debut in January 2019, with his most successful season coming in 2024‑25, when he notched 35 wins. Over his time at the club, Díaz has claimed seven titles and scored 22 goals.

Rare Birth in Mogadishu: Somali Mother Safely Delivers Identical Quadruplet Girls

A Somali mother has safely delivered quadruplets in Mogadishu, an exceptionally rare event in a country where access to maternal healthcare remains limited.

The babies were born on Friday morning at Banadir Maternity and Children Hospital. Hospital director Fartun Sharif confirmed the delivery through a social media post, noting that the birth went smoothly and that both the mother and her newborns are in stable condition. All four babies are girls and are identical.

The mother, Mariam Mohamed Hassan, has now given birth to seven children. She traveled approximately 120 kilometers from a rural area near the Adale district in the Middle Shabelle region to reach the hospital in the capital. Her previous pregnancy also resulted in twins.

Hassan said she only learned she was carrying quadruplets a few hours before going into labor, making the experience even more unexpected.

Quadruplet births are extremely uncommon, occurring in roughly one out of every 700,000 pregnancies. The majority of such cases worldwide are linked to fertility treatments, which account for about 90 percent of quadruplet conceptions. Twins make up the vast majority of multiple births globally, while triplets, quadruplets, and higher-order multiples represent only a small fraction.

Genetics can also play a role. Women with a family history of multiple births — particularly those who are twins themselves or have close relatives who naturally conceived multiples — may have a higher likelihood of releasing multiple eggs during ovulation.

The significance of this successful delivery is heightened by Somalia’s ongoing challenges in maternal and child healthcare. In 2012, another Somali woman, Halima Mohamed, gave birth to quadruplets in the Tarabunka displacement camp without adequate medical support, placing both her life and her babies at serious risk.

According to UNICEF, Somalia continues to face some of the highest maternal and infant mortality rates in the world. Only a small percentage of births in the country are attended by trained healthcare professionals.

In 2020, Mogadishu witnessed an even rarer event when a woman gave birth to quintuplets at the Recep Tayyip Erdoğan Training and Research Hospital, commonly known as Digfer Hospital. The Turkish-operated facility reported that both the mother and her five babies were healthy, marking the first quintuplet birth recorded at the hospital.

Together, these cases highlight both the rarity of high-order multiple births and the importance of access to skilled medical care in ensuring safe outcomes for mothers and newborns in Somalia.

Waa maxay nabadu iyo faaiidoonyinka ay leedahay?

Nabaddu waa tiirka ugu muhiimsan ee horumarka iyo farxadda nolosha. Haddii nabad jirto, wax walba way fududaadaan; haddii nabad la waayana, horumar ma jiri karo.

Nabaddu waa xaalad daganaan, xasilooni iyo is-afgarad ah oo ka dhex jirta qof, qoys, bulsho ama dal, iyadoo aan jirin dagaal, qalalaase ama colaad.

Noocyada Nabadda

1. Nabad Qofeed – Qofku markuu qalbi ahaan degan yahay, cabsi iyo walwal la’aan.

2. Nabad Qoys/Bulsho – Marka dadka wada nooli ay si is-ixtiraam iyo wada-noolaansho leh u wada joogaan.

3. Nabad Qaran – Marka dalka uusan ka jirin dagaal, amniguna sugan yahay.

Faa’iidooyinka Nabadda

1. Horumar Dhaqaale – Ganacsigu wuu kobcaa, shaqooyin baa abuurma, maalgashi baa yimaada.

2. Waxbarasho & Caafimaad Wanaagsan – Iskuullo iyo isbitaallo si nabad ah ayay u shaqeeyaan.

3. Midnimo & Wadajir – Dadku way is aaminaan, colaaduna way yaraataa.

4. Badbaado & Amni – Nolosha iyo hantidu waa sugan yihiin.

5. Horumar Diimeed & Akhlaaq – Diintu waxay ku boorisaa nabad iyo walaaltinimo (Quraankuna nabadda wuu dhiirrigeliyaa).

Buuggan wuxuu falanqeynayaa xaaladda hoggaamineed ee dalka, isaga oo iftiiminaya baahida loo qabo hoggaan leh aragti qaran, daacadnimo, karti maamul iyo cadaalad iyo arrimo kale oo aas-aas u ah horumarka Soomaaliya, waxaana ka gudoomay buugagta, Gudoomiyaha Jaamacadda Benadir iyo Golaha Tacliinta Jaamacadda iyaga oo ku bogaadiyay qoraaga kaalintiisa aqooneed iyo wacyigelinta bulshada.

Ugu dambeyntii, 𝗣𝗿𝗼𝗳. 𝗔𝗯𝗱𝗶 𝗔𝗿𝗶𝗳 𝗚𝘂𝗿𝗲, Hormuudka Kuliyadda Culuumta Xoolaha ee Jaamacadda Benadir, oo gudoonsiiyay Prof. Baadiyow laba buug cilmiyeed oo uu qoray Prof. Gure: 𝗠𝗲𝗮𝘁 𝗛𝘆𝗴𝗶𝗲𝗻𝗲 iyo 𝗧𝗲𝘅𝘁 𝗕𝗼𝗼𝗸 𝗳𝗼𝗿 𝗩𝗲𝘁𝗲𝗿𝗶𝗻𝗮𝗿𝘆 𝗣𝗮𝗿𝗮𝘀𝗶𝘁𝗼𝗹𝗼𝗴𝘆.

Xildhibaan Cabdiraxmaan Cabdishakuur iyo Difaaca Dastuurka!!!

Xildhibaan Cabdiraxmaan Cabdishakuur Warsame waxa uu noqday mid ka mid ah codadka ugu xooggan ee ka horyimid isbeddellada lagu sameeyay Dastuurka Kumeel-gaarka ah ee Soomaaliya sannadkii 2024-ka. Difaaciisu ma ahayn mid ku kooban diidmo kaliya, balse waxa uu adeegsaday doodno sharci iyo kuwo siyaasadeed.

Halkan waxaan ku falanqaynaynaa qaabkii uu u wajahay difaaca dastuurka:

1. Ilaalinta Consensus-ka (Wada-ogolka)

Cabdiraxmaan Cabdishakuur waxa uu ku dooday in dastuurku uusan ahayn dukumiinti koox ama xisbi gaar ahi leeyahay, balse uu yahay hishiis bulsho (Social Contract).

Waxa uu ku dooday in isbeddel walba oo lagu samaynayo dastuurka ay tahay in lagu gaaro wada-tashi ballaaran oo ay ka qaybgalayaan dhammaan qaybaha siyaasadda iyo maamul-goboleedyada.

Waxa uu ka digay in "isbeddel hal dhinac ah" uu horseedi karo kalsooni darro baahsan iyo burbur ku yimaada nidaamka federaalka.

2. Sharcinimada Habraaca (Procedural Legitimacy)

Xildhibaanadu waxa uu si weyn u dhaliilay habka loo maray wax ka beddelka, isagoo ku dooday:

In baarlamaanku uusan lahayn awood buuxda oo uu ku beddelo cutubyada rasmiga ah ee dastuurka isaga oo aan raacin habraacii lagu hishiiyay ee ahaa in afti dadweyne la geliyo ama maamuladu raalli ka yihiin.

Waxa uu marar badan sheegay in dastuurka loo beddelayo si "rabitaanka madaxda hadda jirta" loogu waafajiyo, halkii laga eegi lahaa danta qaranka ee fog.

3. Diidmada Nidaamka Madaxtooyada (Presidency vs. Premiership)

Mid ka mid ah qodobbada uu sida adag u difaacay waxay ahayd inaan la baabi'in xafiiska Ra'iisul Wasaaraha:

Waxa uu ku dooday in Soomaaliya ay u baahan tahay nidaam Power Sharing (awood qaybsi) leh si looga fogaado kali-talisnimo.

Waxa uu aaminsanaa in awoodda oo dhan oo lagu ururiyo gacanta Madaxweynaha ay khatar ku tahay xasilloonida dalka.

4. Kaalinta Mucaaradka iyo Baraarujinta

Cabdiraxmaan Cabdishakuur waxa uu adeegsaday baraha bulshada iyo fadhiyada baarlamaanka si uu u tusiyo shacabka Soomaaliyeed qodobbada masiiriga ah ee la rabo in la beddelo.

U mideeyo xildhibaannada kale ee qaba walaaca la midka ah isaga, isagoo u doodi jiray in "Dastuurku yahay gidaarka kaliya ee u dhexeeya dowladnimada iyo fowdada."

Gunaanad

Difaaca Cabdiraxmaan Cabdishakuur ee dastuurka waxaa loo arkayay mid ku dhisan ilaalinta dowladnimada iyo ka hortagga wax kasta oo keeni kara kala qaybsanid hor leh. In kastoo isbeddellada qaar la meel-mariyay, haddana doodiisu waxay abuurtay dareen weyn oo ku saabsan muhiimadda ay leedahay in heshiis lagu yahay sharciga dalka u yaalla.

Weli waa taagan tahay arrintii wax ka badalka Dastuurka, lamana oga halka ay ku danbayn doonto.

W/Q SAID MUUSE SHIRE

Gawrac mise Talaysi!

In Villa Somalia lagu shiraa maanta, waxay Puntland & Jubbaland u goynaysaa hal qodob oo cad waa in doodii dawladda Faderalka ee ahayd ma aqoonsanin doorashadii Jubbaland meesha laga saaray.

Jabad kasta oo October 2024-kii kala dhaqaaqii ka dhashay, Isku leyntii xoogga dalka ee Baadiyihii Raskambooni, Baladxaawo, Burburintii Garsoorka waraaqihii is qabashada, Isku dacweyntii Shisheeyaha, xayiraadihii garoomada rayidka ilaa wado kasta oo ay isla soo mareen Xassan & Axmed Madoobe, saaka waxaa laga talinayaa sidii loo qaban lahaa doorasho uusan kaligiis laheyn Madaxweyne Xassan Sheikh oo Tartamayaasha ula siman yahay.

Tani waa Taariikh kale oo toos u taabanaysa xoogga dalka.

Mucaaridka Somaliya oo ay hoggaaminayaan Madaxwayne yaasha Puntland iyo Jubbaland iyo Madaxdii hore ee Somaliya ayaa ugu dambayn aqbalay in lagu wada hadlo Villq Somaliya oo ay in badan diidanaayeen.

Waxa laga wadahadlayaa nooca Doorashada la aadayo iyo Dastuurka cusub ee Baarlamanka Somaliya doodiisu ka socoto.

Shirka u dhexeeya dawladda Federaalka iyo madasha mucaaradka ayaa la filayaa inuu maanta si rasmi ah uga furmo xarunta madaxtooyada. Muddo ayay dood ka taagnayd halka lagu qabanayo kulankan, waxaana murankaasi ka tarjumayay heerka kalsooni ee u dhexeeya dhinacyada. In maanta la isku raaco in Villa Soomaaliya lagu kulmo waxay muujinaysaa in ugu yaraan tallaabo loo qaaday dhanka is aaminaadda.

Mucaaradka, oggolaanshaha ay ku yimaadeen madaxtooyada waxay u tahay tanaasul siyaasadeed oo muuqda. Dhanka kale, go’aankaas wuxuu madaxweyne Xasan, dusha ka saarayaa mas’uuliyad dheeraad ah. Marka laguugu yimaado xafiiskaaga, lagama filayo oo keliya inaad difaacdo mowqifkii hore ee dawladda, balse waxaa lagaa sugayaa hoggaan isu keenid leh iyo rabitaan dhab ah oo lagu gaaro is afgarad. Shirku waa inuu noqdaa mid laga raadinayo xal, ma aha mid lagu adkaynayo aragti hore loo haystay.

Sidoo kale, mucaaradka waa inay maanka ku hayaan in wada hadal miro dhal ahi uusan ku imaan karin haddii dhinac kaliya uu tanaasulo. Heshiis waara wuxuu ku dhashaa isu dheellitirnaan, is qancin iyo faham guud oo ku saleysan danta dalka.

Marxalad kasta oo kala guur ah waxay u baahan tahay hoggaan ka sarreeya xisaabtan maalinle ah. Madaxweyne Xasan Sheekh iyo madasha mucaaradka labaduba waxay taagan yihiin meel taariikhdu go’aamin doonto sida loo xusuusto. Haddii danta guud laga hormariyo dano gaar ah, shirkan wuxuu noqon karaa bilow rajo cusub. Haddii kale, wuxuu ku biiri doonaa fursad kale oo taariikhdu xusi doonto in la dayacay.

Madaxweynaha dalka Soomaaliya Xasan Sheekh Maxamuud ayaa Madaxtooyada Soomaaliya ku soo dhoweeyey Madaxweynaha maamuulka Jubbaland Axmed Maxamed Islaam Madoobe kaas oo ka qayb gelaya shirka ay wada yeelanayaan mucaaridka Soomaaliya iyo Xasan Sheekh Maxamuud.

Labadan hoggaamiye ayaa la xasuustaa in ay sannad ka hor Warbaahinta isu mariyeen waarrano soo qabasho ah oo mid waliba uu ku doonayey in uu ka kale ku soo qabto si maxkamad loo soo taago.

Sidoo kale ciidamada Jubbaland iyo kuwa Xasan Sheekh ayaa ku dagaallamay deegaannada Raaskaanbooni iyo Beled-xaawo iyada oo la xasuusto in ciidanka Soomaaliya xilligaas lagaga adkaaday deegaanka Raaskaanbooni.

Axmed Madoobe ayaa hore u sheegay in aanay dawladda Soomaaliya awood u lahayn in isaga la soo qabto isaga oo si toos ah u wadan jirey hawlihiisa gaarka ah xilli ugu dambayn lagu khasbanaaday in lala heshiiyo laguna soo dhoweeyo Villa Somalia.

KENYA HAS SEEN THIS EVIL BEFORE. AND WE RECOGNIZE IT.

For 25 years now. Christian’s in Kenya have been killed in cold blood by radical jihadists. Today in Kenya they scream loudly against Israel and they claim to have colonized Kenya by numbers and land mass. Their target is everything that helps Christians. From the west to the Israel. They want to isolate us. We must stand united and guard the nation. Kenya is a Christian nation. We won’t let it go. Never. 

On August 7, 1998, Nairobi became a battlefield. In a single moment, 213 innocent souls were murdered when Al-Qaeda bombed the U.S. Embassy. Thousands were injured. Families were shattered. Kenya was bleeding.

We were not at war. But war came to us.

Then came Kikambala in 2002. Westgate Mall in 2013. Mpeketoni in 2014. Mandera in 2014. Garissa University in 2015. DusitD2 in 2019. Manda Bay in 2020. And countless smaller massacres in Mandera, Wajir, Garissa, and Lamu.

The pattern is unmistakable.

The perpetrators? Al-Shabaab — an extremist organization aligned with Al-Qaeda.

Their method is chillingly consistent:
They storm civilian spaces.
They separate Christians from others.
They execute them without mercy.

At Garissa University, 148 young students were slaughtered. They were Christians. Their only “crime” was their faith and their future.

At Mandera, bus passengers were forced to prove their religion. Those identified as Christians were shot in cold blood.

This is not random violence. This is ideological terrorism.

Kenya did not provoke this evil. Kenya simply exists as a free nation — with religious liberty, democracy, and human dignity. And that alone makes us a target.

But here is what every Kenyan must understand:

This evil is not confined to Kenya.

It is part of a global extremist ideology that has declared war on free societies, on Christians, on Jews, and on any nation that refuses to submit to its totalitarian vision.

Kenya has buried its dead. Israel has buried its dead. The United States has buried its dead. Europe has buried its dead. Africa continues to bury its dead.

The victims share no single race. No single nationality. No single language.

But they share one thing: they were targeted by the same ideology of terror.

Kenya understands what it means to wake up to sirens.
Kenya understands what it means to bury students.
Kenya understands what it means to see innocent blood on its soil.

We have lived it.

We have survived it.

And we recognize it.

This is not about politics. This is about survival. This is about recognizing evil when it appears — whether in Nairobi, Garissa, Jerusalem, or anywhere else.

Terrorism does not respect borders. It does not negotiate. It does not coexist.

It destroys.

Kenya has stood firm for decades. Our security forces have fought bravely. Our people have refused to surrender their freedom.

And we will never surrender it.

Because Kenya knows something terrorists will never understand:

Fear may visit us.
Pain may wound us.
But terror will never own us.

We have seen this evil. We recognize it. And we stand united against it.

Every single Christian ought to stand with Israel as it is our Biblical heritage. Stand up against the wicked bullies who want sharia in kenya. Against the bullies who want to convert kenya into a Somalia.

 • Target: Kenyan and U.S. military base

⸻

9. 2020–2025 – Ongoing Attacks in Northern and Coastal Kenya

Frequent attacks in:
 • Mandera
 • Wajir
 • Garissa
 • Lamu

Targets include:
 • Churches
 • Christian civilians
 • Police officers
 • Teachers
 • Public transport

⸻

Who is Responsible?

The overwhelming majority of attacks inside Kenya have been carried out by:
 • Al‑Shabaab — Somalia-based extremist group
 • Affiliated with Al‑Qaeda since 2012
 • Ideology: Islamist extremism
 • Objective: Establish strict Islamic rule and oppose Kenya’s presence in Somalia

They have explicitly targeted:
 • Christians
 • Kenyan state institutions
 • International partners

⸻

Connection to Global Terror Networks

Al-Shabaab is not an isolated group. It is part of a broader extremist network aligned ideologically and operationally with Al-Qaeda, which operates globally and opposes multiple nations, including Kenya, Israel, the United States, and others.

However, it is important to distinguish between:
 • Direct operational responsibility (specific attacks carried out locally)
 • Broader ideological alignment (shared extremist ideology across regions)

Extremist groups often share ideology, training pipelines, propaganda, and strategic goals, even when operating in different countries.

⸻

Strategic Reality for Kenya

Kenya has remained a major target because of:
 • Its military operations against Al-Shabaab in Somalia (AMISOM / ATMIS)
 • Its democratic system and religious diversity
 • Its partnerships with Western and international allies
 • Its geographic proximity to Somalia

⸻

Key Fact

Kenya has lost hundreds of civilians, including many Christians and security officers, to terrorism over the past 25 years. These attacks have consistently targeted innocent civilians regardless of nationality.

Madaxda mucaaradka oo markii hore diidmo ka muujiyay goobta shirka, ayaa ugu dambayn ku qancay inay wada-hadallada ku yeeshaan gudaha Aqalka Madaxtooyada, taas oo dhabaha u xaaraysa xallinta khilaafyada taagan.

Sidoo kale waxaa meesha ka marneen dowladaha dhanka aminga iyo siyaasadda ka taageera Soomaaliya ee ka dambeeyay imaashiyihi madaxda Jubbaland iyo Puntland ee magaalada Muqdisho.

Hay’adaha sirdoonka Kenya ayaa sheegaysa in in ka badan 1,000 oo Kenyan ah ay ku biireen dagaalka Ruushka kula jiro Yukreyn. Warbixin sirdoon oo ay baarlamaanka u soo bandhigeen Hay’adda Sirdoonka Qaranka iyo Agaasinka Baarista Dambiyada ayaa lagu sheegay in dadka la qorayo inta badan la khiyaaneeyo si ay u saxiixaan qandaraasyo milatari, isla markaana ay inta badan ku baxaan fiisaha dalxiiska, iyagoo sii maraya Istanbul iyo Abu Dhabi ka hor inta aysan ku biirin.

Mas’uuliyiintu waxay sheegeen in baaritaanno adag oo ka dhacay garoonka diyaaradaha ee Nayroobi ay qaar u sheegayan inay maraan dalal kale oo Afrikaan ah, iyadoo hay’adaha shaqaalaysiinta ee aan shatiga haysan la sheegay inay la shaqeeyaan shaqaalaha garoonka diyaaradaha ee aan sharciga lahayn. Hadda, ugu yaraan 39 Kenyan ah ayaa la dhigay isbitaallada, 28 ayaa la la’yahay iyagoo ku jira howlgal, 89 kalena waxay ku jiraan safka hore.

Isagoo warbixinta u gudbinaya xildhibaanada, hoggaamiyaha aqlabiyadda baarlamaanka Kimani Ichung’wah, ayaa shaaca ka qaaday waxa uu ugu yeeray shabakad “aad u dhib badan” oo ah saraakiil dowladeed oo khiyaano badan oo la sheegay inay la safteen kooxo ka ganacsada dadka si ay u qortaan una qaadaan dadka Kenya si ay uga dagaallamaan dagaalka Ruushka iyo Yukrayn.

Hay’adda basaasnimada ayaa faahfaahin ka bixisay sida hay’adaha shaqaalaysiinta loo sheegay inay la safteen shaqaalaha garoonka diyaaradaha ee Kenya ee musuqmaasuqa ah, saraakiisha socdaalka, saraakiisha Agaasinka Baarista Dambiyada (DCI), saraakiisha ka hortagga daroogada iyo saraakiisha Hay’adda Shaqada Qaranka si ay u fududeeyaan safarka shaqaalaha. https://www.diblomaasi.com/warbixin-ayaa-lagu-sheegay-in-ka-badan-1000-qof-oo-kenyan-ah-ay-ku-biireen-dagaalka-ruushka-ee-yukeryn/

Guddiga Madaxa-Bannaan ee Doorashooyinka Qaranka iyo Soohdimaha (GMDQS) waxa uu si rasmi ah idinku wargelinayaa in la soo gebagabeeyey dhammaan safarradii shaqo ee la xiriiray diyaar-garowga iyo hubinta hannaanka doorashooyinka golayaasha deegaanada ee dowlad-goboleedyada Koonfur-Galbeed, Hirshabeelle, Galmudug iyo Waqooyi Bari.

Iyadoo la fulinayo jadwalka rasmiga ah ee doorashooyinka, ururrada siyaasadda waxaa laga codsanayaa in ay si rasmi ah u bilaabaan ololahooda doorashada, iyaga oo si buuxda ugu hoggaansamaya shuruucda, xeerarka iyo tilmaamaha doorashooyinka ee dalka.

Degmooyinka laga qaban doono doorashada goleyaasha deegaanka waxay kala yihiin:

Dowlad-Goboleed: Koonfur Galbeed
Baydhabo, Baraawe, Afgooye, Wanlaweyn, Buur-Hakaba, Waajid, Berdaale, Qansaxdheere, Diinsoor, Xudur.

Dowlad-Goboleed: Hirshabeelle
Jawhar, Beledweyne, Matabaan, Warsheekh, Cadale, Buulo-Burte, Jalalaqsi, Balcad, Mahadaay.

Dowlad-Goboleed: Galmudug
Dhuusamareeb, Gaalkacyo, Hobyo, Goldogob, Balanbale, Cadaado, Caabudwaaq, Xeraale, Ceeldheer, Xarardheere, Guriceel iyo Masagawaay/Galcad.

Dowlad-Goboleed: Waqooyi Bari
Laascaanood, Xudun, Taleex iyo Buuhoodle.

Sidoo kale, ururrada siyaasadda waxaa lagu wargelinayaa in ay soo gudbiyaan liiska murashaxiintooda u tartamaya golayaasha deegaanada degmooyinka kor ku xusan.

Guddigu waxa uu ku adkaynayaa in dhammaan hawlaha ololaha iyo soo gudbinta murashaxiinta lagu fuliyo si waafaqsan xeerarka doorashooyinka, si loo xaqiijiyo hufnaan, isla-xisaabtan iyo tartan caddaalad ah.

post_author_name_pi: Wasaaradda Xidhiidhka Goleyaasha Iyo Arrimaha Dastuurka JSL
post_text_pi:
Shir ballaadhan oo ay yeesheen Agaasimayaasha Waaxyaha iyo Ku-xigeenadooda Wasaaradda Xidhiidhka Golayaasha iyo Arrimaha Dastuurka JSL ayaa maanta ka qabsoomay Xafiiska Wasiirka.

Shirka waxa si wadajir ah u guddoomiyay Wasiirka Wasaaradda, Wasiir Ku-xigeenka iyo Agaasimaha Guud, kuwaas oo tilmaamay in kulankani yahay mid muhiim u ah xoojinta nidaamka shaqo iyo wada shaqaynta guud ee Wasaaradda. 

Ujeeddada kulanka ayaa ahayd isbarasho rasmi ah, maadaama ay jiraan masuuliyiin cusub oo dhawaan xilalka lo magaacabay, isla markaana ay dhaceen isku-beddello iyo magacabisyo cusub oo heer waaxeed ah.

Intii uu socday shirka, Agaasimayaasha Waaxyaha iyo Ku-xigeennadooda ayaa si kooban ugu hadlay muhiimada kulanka, iyagoo adkeeyay sida ay uga go’an tahay gudashada masuuliyadda loo igmaday. 

Sidoo kale, waxa la falanqeeyay muhiimadda wada shaqaynta, isku xidhnaanta waaxyaha, iyo in la helo hannaan shaqo oo mideysan oo ku saleysan isla xisaabtan iyo hufnaan.

Ug dambayntii Wasiirka, Wasiir Ku-xigeenka iyo Agaasimaha Guud ayaa ku boorriyay masuuliyiinta cusub in ay muujiyaan hoggaan, hal-abuur iyo dadaal dheeraad ah, isla markaana ay si dhow ula shaqeeyaan bahda Wasaaradda si loo xaqiijiyo himilooyinka iyo qorshayaasha u dejisan sannadkan.

Kulanka ayaa ku soo dhammaaday jawi is-faham iyo kalsooni ku dhisan, iyadoo la isla gartay in kulamada noocan ahi noqdaan kuwo joogto ah si loo xoojiyo wada shaqaynta iyo horumarinta shaqada Wasaaradda.

Madaxweynaha ayaa soo jeediyay sidaan:-

-𝐃𝐞𝐞𝐠𝐚𝐚𝐧𝐤𝐚: Doorashooyinka golayaasha deegaanka in la qabto ka hor 15 April 2026.

-𝐅𝐞𝐝𝐞𝐫𝐚𝐚𝐥: Ugu dambeyn in lagu heshiiyo hannaanka doorashada heer qaran.

Mucaaradku maanta ma siin madaxweynaha wax jawaab ah waxaana ay yeesheen kulan ay ugu doodeen waxa ay ugu jawaabayaan madaxweynaha.

Dhankale, kale waxaa jirta kala qaybsanaan u dhexaysa golaha Mustaqbalka tusaale ahaan madaxda Puntland iyo Jubaland waxa ay doonayaan doorasho la mid ah tii 2022, halka xubnaha mucaaradka u arkaan qorshahaas mid awood badan siinaya DG ayna tahay in qorshe kale oo doorasho ka keeno.

#Update: Xogta Saxda ee Kulankii Maanta Ajandayaasha MW Xasan Shiikh hordhigay Mucaaradka & Jawaabta Mucaaradka & Kulan kale oo beri loo balamay.

Kulankan oo ku bilowday jawi deggan, soo dhoweyn iyo salaan kaddib, Madaxweyne Xasan Sheekh ayaa miiska soo saaray hindise ku saabsan hannaanka doorashooyinka dalka, oo ahaa qodobka ugu weyn ee shirku ku saabsanaa. Madaxweynuhu wuxuu soo jeediyey in ajandaha shirku uu noqdo in lagala shaqeeyo hab-raacyada doorashada dalka heerarkeeda kala duwan, oo ah mid qof iyo cod ku dhacda.

Madaxweyne Xasan ayaa horey ka aaday ajandihiisa u diyaarsanaa, isaga oo sheegay in kaas lagu dul shaqeeyo, wuxuuna xusay in doorashada dalka loo wajaho sidan:
�1. Doorashada Golayaasha Deegaanka: In dalka marka hore laga fuliyo doorashooyinka deegaanka, kuwaas oo uu sheegay in loo qabtay in la soo gebagebeeyo marka la gaaro April 15, 2026.

2. Doorashada Heer Dowlad Goboleed: In kaddib marka deegaanka la dhammaystiro, loo gudbo doorashooyinka Madaxweynayaasha dowlad goboleedyada, kuwaas oo loo marayo nidaam baarlamaani ah oo la soo doortay.

3. Heshiiska Heer Federaal: In labadaas heer kaddib ay dhinacyadu isugu yimaadaan fadhi kale oo looga heshiinayo hannaanka doorasho ee heerka Qaran (Federaalka).

Kaddib soo jeedinta Madaxweynaha, ma jirin wax ay isku raaceen dhinaca labada dhinac. Golaha Mustaqbalka, ayaa uma muujin wax soo dhoweyn ah aragtida Madaxweynaha. Halka Madaxweynuhu u sheegay qorshaha doorashada Dowlad Goboleedyada ay xilli hore maamuladda dalka iyo dowladda dhexe heshiis ka gaareen oo aan jirin kaalin uga banaan gacan kale.

Ismari waa ku saabsan in la isku raaco waxa ajande ah kaddib, Madaxweyne Xasan Sheekh ayaa codsaday in dib la isugu soo laabto kulan kale oo dhici doona berri oo Jimce ah, saacaddu marka ay tahay 2-da duhurnimo, si loo ogaado mowqifka mucaaradka.

Markii laga soo dareeray shirka, xubnaha Golaha Mustaqbalka Soomaaliya ayaa fadhi gaar ah oo dhexdooda ah yeeshay si ay isaga waraystaan wixii ay kala kulmeen madaxtooyada. Hoggaanka Puntland, Jubaland iyo Madaxda Samatabbixinta ayaa falanqaynaya hindisaha Madaxweynaha iyo waxa laga yeelayo kulanka berrito.

Kaddib shirkii ay qaateen, Golaha Mustaqbalku waxay isku raaceen in loo diro Madaxweyne Xasan Sheekh kulanka berrito ah: Madaxweynihii hore Sheekh Shariif, Madaxweynaha Puntland Siciid Deni, Ra’iisul Wasaarihii hore Xasan Cali Khayre, Xildhibaan Cabidlahi Carab iyo Xildhibaan Cabdiraxmaan Cabdishakuur, kuwaas oo noqonaya guddiga wadaxaajoodka ee mucaaradka.

Sanbalooshe: Fallaar kor loo gamay oo dhan u foorarta!

Xildhibaan Cabdullaahi Maxamed Cali Raage “Sanbaloolshe” waa siyaasi hadal miiggan oo maalmaha adag ee la is-hayo aan laga waayin goleyaasha looga doodayo masiirka dalka & jiheynta siyaasadda Qaranka, waana siyaasi aan la gabban afkaartiisa, haddii ay la qumantahay bulshada si guud ama si gaar ah ugu qallooc ku jiro.

Ka muuqashadiisa shirkii maanta ee u dhexeeyay mucaaradka & dowladda, waxa uu ka dhiganyahay in MW uu wakhtigu ka dhammaanayo Xasan Sheekh uu ka maarmi waayay difaaca & hadal kakanaanta Sanbaloolshe, maadaama uu hortegayo Cabdiraxmaan Cabdishakuur, Axmed Madoobe & Saciid Deni oo hadallada xanafta leh ee siyaasadda aan la dhuuman.

Sanbalooshe, hadda ma hayo xil weyn oo fulin, hase-ahaatee, damaca hoggaanka Hirshabeelle ayaa ku jira, MW Xasan uu hadda la olog yahayna ma cadda in uu dhisi doono, laakiin, muuqashadiisa maanta ayaa mar kale dhalisay doodda ah “Laba kacleynta Sanbalooshe ma isbedel cusub oo siyaasadeed ayey ka dhigantahay?”— Maxaase qarsoon oo soo socda?

Aan si kale kuugu dhigo, Sanbaloolshe inkasta uu fadhiyay safka dowladda, haddana waa saaxiibka Deni, Axmed Madoobe, Cumar Cabdirashiid & Shariif Xasan, taas oo loo fasiri karo in uu iibsanayo siyaasad laba af leh, oo ah mid dhexe “Xukuumadda” ama mid Gobol “Hirshabeelle” tii ay noqotaba fallaar ayaa kor loo gamay, lamana oga halka ay ku foorarto.

Madaxweyne Xasan, wuxuu wali ku adkeysanayaa in lagala dooddo sida loo horumarin karo is fahana looga gaari karo qorshaha uu billaabay ee doorasho toos ah , taasoo mar kale xubnaha golaha mucaaradka ay ku celiyeen inaysan arkin suragalnimo ay dalka uga dhici karto doorasho dadweyne oo ku billaabanaysa in madaxweynayaasha dawlad-gobolleedyada ka hor bisha May,2026 inay soo doortaan xildhibaanno ku soo baxa doorasho qof iyo cod ah , ka dibna loo gudbo habka ay ku dhacayso doorashada madaxweynaha Federaalka— xaaladan waxay dhalisay in lagu ballamo berri in dib la isugu soo laabto kulan kale oo dhici kara galinka dambe , xilli kulan gaar ah oo golaha mucaaradka ay yeesheen isla maanta lagu go’aamiyay in la soo koobo safka mucaarad oo xubno matalaya oo hab guddi ah ula fadhiisanaya in berri loo diro Villa Somalia , si loo adkeeyo wada-hadalka socda, sida ay sheegeen ilo ku dhow kulankii dawladda iyo madasha mucaaradka.

Falanqeyn Siyaasadeed: Kulankii u dhexeeyay Madasha Mustaqbalka iyo Dowladda Federaalka Soomaaliya.

Kulankii u dhexeeyay Madasha Mustaqbalka iyo Dowladda Federaalka Soomaaliya (DFS) wuxuu ahaa mid xambaarsan miisaan siyaasadeed oo culus, maadaama uu si toos ah u taabanayay laba arrimood oo saldhig u ah mustaqbalka siyaasadeed ee dalka: nooca doorasho ee la qaadanayo iyo xaaladda muddada xil-haynta qaar ka mid ah dowlad-goboleedyada.

Labada qodob ma ahayn kuwo kala go’an, balse si dhow ayay isugu xirnaayeen.

1. Nooca Doorasho iyo Waqtiga Ka Harsan DFS

Madasha iyo DFS waxay isku khilaafeen hirgelinta doorasho qof iyo cod ah (one person, one vote). Inkastoo mabda’ ahaan ay tahay himilo dimuqraadi ah, haddana waxaa caqabad ku noqday:
Waqtiga kooban ee ka harsan muddada xilka DFS (wax ka yar laba bilood).

Diyaargarowga farsamo ee aan wali si buuxda u dhameystirneyn.

Kalsoonida lagu qabo guddiga doorashada oo lagu tilmaamay mid hal dhinac u janjeera.

Arrintani waxay abuureysaa su’aal siyaasadeed oo weyn: ma la gaari karaa doorasho qof iyo cod ah iyadoo aan la helin waqti ku filan iyo is-afgarad siyaasadeed? Haddii lagu degdego, waxaa imaan karta muran sharci iyo mid siyaasadeed; haddii dib loo dhigo, waxaa dhalan karta dood ku saabsan sharciyadda sii joogista hay’adaha hadda jira.

2. Muddada Xil-haynta Dowlad-goboleedyada
Qodobka labaad wuxuu quseeyay dowlad-goboleedyada muddada dheer xilka hayay:

Galmudug

Koonfur Galbeed

Hirshabelle

Maamuladan ayaa lagu eedeeyay inay muddo ka badan tii dastuuriga ahayd xilka hayaan. 

Taasina waxay si toos ah ula xiriirtaa doodda doorashooyinka guud, maadaama haddii heer qaran lagu muransan yahay jadwal iyo hannaan doorasho, ay adkaan karto in heer dowlad-goboleed lagu helo nidaam hufan oo waqtigiisa ku dhaca.

Haddii dowlad-goboleedyada qaarkood lagu tilmaamo kuwo muddo-kordhin sameeyay, halka heer qaran laga doodayo sharciyadda iyo waqtiga doorashada, waxaa muuqata in dhibaatadu tahay mid nidaamka oo dhan saameyneysa, ma aha qodob gooni ah.

Isku Xirnaanta Labada Qodob
Labada arrimood waxay ka tarjumayaan hal su’aal oo weyn: Sidee loo heli karaa geeddi-socod doorasho oo sharciyad, kalsooni iyo waqti ku dhisan?

Haddii guddiga doorashada lagu muransan yahay, doorashada qof iyo cod ah kalsooni ma heli karto.

Haddii waqtigu ciriiri yahay, heshiis siyaasadeed lama gaari karo.

Haddii dowlad-goboleedyadu muddo kordhiyaan, kalsoonida nidaamka federaalka way daciifeysaa.

Sidaas darteed, xal kastaa waa inuu noqdaa mid wadajir ah oo ka jawaabaya saddexda tiir: waqti macquul ah, hannaan lagu wada qanacsan yahay, iyo sharciyad la isla oggol yahay.

Gunaanad

Kulanka Madasha Mustaqbalka iyo DFS wuxuu muujiyay in Soomaaliya ay ku jirto marxalad go’aan qaadasho oo xasaasi ah. 

Doorasho qof iyo cod ah waa himilo la wada jecel yahay, balse qabashadeedu waxay u baahan tahay diyaargarow, kalsooni iyo heshiis siyaasadeed oo qaran.

Haddii la helo is-afgarad mideysan, dalka wuxuu u gudbi karaa xasillooni siyaasadeed oo waarta; haddii kale, khilaafka hadda taagan wuxuu halis gelin karaa geeddi-socodka dowlad-dhisidda iyo kalsoonida dadweynaha.

Kormeerkan ayaa ujeeddadiisu ahayd mid diirada lagu saarayey ukuurkalida xaalada jiilalka, dabagalka goobaha adeegbixinta iyo mashaariicaha socda, adkaynta amniga, dardargalinta hindisayaasha horumarineed ee xisbi iyo xukuumaded, xoojinta qaabdhismeedka iskaashiga iyo qoysaska ee xisbiga barwaaqo.
Waxayna ugu horayntii masuuliyiin tageen xarunta caafimaadka degmada, dugsiga sare, goobta xanaanada dhirta (nursery site) ,ceelka biyaha ee magaalada iyo Mashruuca soler systemka magaalada galaadi 

Ugu dambayntii maamulka gobolka ayaa hogaaminta degmada galaadi la yeeshay kulan looga  arinsanaayey xaaladda jiilaalka iyo dardargalinta hawlaha shaqo.

Xeliyadda kala guurka ah ee ay jirto cakirnaan Siyaasadeed, waxa ay lahaan jirtay il-wareed inta badan lagu kalsoonaan karo oo ahaa Cabdicasiis Golafyare, hada booskaas waxaa tartan ugu jira, shaqsiyaad iyo mareego warbaahineed oo saaxada ku cusub.

In aad noqoto il-wareed lagu kalsoon yahay, waa howl u baahan dadaal iyo juhdi dheeri in aad galiso shaqsiyaadaada qofeed, madax banaanidaada fikir, joogteyn mudo dheer ah iyo xiriiro gudaha & dibada oo xoogan.

Qofkii ugu horeeyay ee qoray jiritaanka muwaadin Soomali ah, oo loo gacaliyay doowlada Itoobiya, waxa uu ahaa Cabdicasiis Golafyare, sida uu ku qoray CCW, buugiisa Adkaysi, waxa uu yiri "markii aan ogaaday jiritaanka Xogtaas, waxaan la wadaagay Cabdicasiis Golafyare, si uu bulshada ula wadaago warkaan dhiilada ah, lakiin si uu iiga aqbalo dhowr mar ayuu igu soo celiyay, in aan hubo warkaan sax ahaan-shihiisa, ana waan u xaqiijiyay, kadib ayuuna bulshada la wadaagyay".

Kulankii koowaad ee wadatashiga siyaasadeed ayaa ku soo dhammaaday is-afgaranwaa, iyadoo dhinacyadu ku kala tageen aragtiyo kala duwan.

Dhinaca GMS (Golaha Mucaaradka Soomaaliyeed) ayaa miiska soo saaray hal qodob oo mudnaan gaar ah leh, kaas oo ahaa in si wadajir ah looga heshiiyo hannaanka doorashada, isla markaana loo saaro guddi farsamo oo ka shaqeeya arrimaha doorashada qaran, maadaama dhammaan dhinacyadu goobta wada joogaan.

Dhankiisa, Madaxweyne Xasan Shiikh Maxamuud ayaa  soo jeediyay in dib loo dhigo ka hadalka doorashada heer qaran, isagoo tilmaamay in mudnaanta la siinayo qabashada doorashooyinka golayaasha deegaanka iyo xildhibaanada heer dowlad-goboleed. Soo jeedintaas ayaan helin oggolaanshaha GMS, waxaana kulanka lagu soo gabagabeeyay iyada oo aan la gaarin heshiis rasmi ah.

Wararka la helayo waxay sheegayaan in GMS ay shir gaar ah yeesheen, isla markaana ay qorsheynayeen soo saarista war-murtiyeed ku saabsan natiijada kulanka. Hase yeeshee, Madaxweyne Xasan Shiikh ayaa markale xiriir la sameeyay GMS, isaga oo ka codsaday laba qodob:

1. In aan la soo saarin war-murtiyeed waqtigan.

2. In wada-hadallada dib loo ambaqaado maalinta 
    berri ah 

GMS ayaa oggolaaday codsigaas, waxaana la filayaa in dhinacyadu markale kulmaan si loo sii wado wada-xaajoodyada.

Sida ay tilmaamayaan xogaha la helayo, Madaxweyne Xasan Shiikh Maxamuud ayaa qorsheynaya safar dibadeed maalinta Sabtida, kaas oo uu ku tagi doono Talyaaniga iyo dalal kale.
Dowladda Jarmalka oo ciidamadeeda kala baxaysa Ciraaq kadib cabsi laga qabo xiisadda Bariga Dhexe. Hoos ka akhri

Warbaahinta dalka Koonfur Afrika ayaa sheegtay in xabsi ku yaalla dalkaasi lagu xidhey wiilkii ugu yaraa caruurtii uu dhalay Madaxweynihii hore ee Zimbabwe Robert Mugabi kaasi oo lagu magacaabo Bellarmine Chatunga Mugabe.

Bellarmine ayaa la xidhey isaga iyo qof kale kadib markii nin beeralay ah lagu toogtay guriga qoyskiisa oo ku yaalla magaalada Johannesburg ee South Afrika, iyadoo ay socoto baadhis sida ay laamaha amaanku sheegeen.

Robert Mugabe oo geeriyoodey sanadkii 2019-kii ayaa dalka Zimbabwe xukumayay muddo 37 sanadood ah ka hor inta aan xilka laga qaadin sannadkii 2017.
