Beesha Caalamka oo bogaadisey wada-hadallada Dowladda Federaalka & Mucaaridka ayaa leh muddo-xileedku waa dhammaad: "Iyadoo muddooyinka dastuuriga ah ay soo dhow yihiin dhammaadkooda, isla markaana ay jiraan arrimo qaran oo mudnaan leh oo u baahan heshiis guud – oo ay ku jiraan arrimaha doorashooyinka – waxaan ku dhiirrigelinaynaa dhinacyada inay sii xoojiyaan wadahadalka iyo is-afgaradka mustaqbalka, iyagoo ku shaqeynaya niyad-wanaag, wada-jir iyo waqti ku habboon."

Shir saacado qaatay oo maanta ka dhacay xarunta Madaxtooyada ee Villa Soomaaliya ayaa lagu soo gebagabeeyay wada-hadallo u dhexeeyay madaxda Dowladda Federaalka Soomaaliya iyo xubnaha Golaha Mustaqbalka, iyadoo diiradda si gaar ah loo saaray arrimaha doorashooyinka dalka.

Kulankan oo ahaa mid xasaasi ah ayaa la sheegay in lagu falanqeeyay hannaanka doorashooyinka heer federaal iyo heer dowlad goboleed, xilli dalka uu wajahayo marxalad siyaasadeed oo muhiim ah. 

Qodobada laga dooday waxaa ka mid ahaa jadwalka doorashooyinka, qaabka ay u dhici karaan, iyo sidii loo heli lahaa hannaan ay ku wada qanacsan yihiin dhinacyada siyaasadda.

Xildhibaan Cabdullaahi Carab, oo ah xoghayaha Golaha Mustaqbalka, ayaa warbaahinta u sheegay in kulanku qaatay waqti dheer isla markaana si furan looga arinsaday arrimaha miiska saarnaa. Wuxuu tilmaamay in aan maanta la gaarin wax heshiis ah oo rasmi ah, balse sidoo kale aanu jirin wax khilaaf ah oo sii kala fogeeyay labada dhinac.

Kulanka ayaa imanaya xilli ay jiraan doodo ku saabsan nooca doorasho ee dalka aadi doono iyo doorka ay dowlad goboleedyadu ku yeelan doonaan geeddi-socodkaas. Indhaha bulshada iyo daneeyayaasha siyaasadda ayaa si gaar ah ugu jeeda natiijada kasoo baxda wada-hadalladan, maadaama ay saameyn ku yeelan karaan jihada siyaasadeed ee dalka bilaha soo socda.

Waxaa la filayaa in kulamada xiga ay si qoto dheer uga doodi doonaan qodobada weli la isku hayo, iyadoo la rajeynayo in laga gaaro is-afgarad horseeda hannaan doorasho oo loo dhan yahay.

WARCUSUB: Madaxweynaha Puntland Said Deni oo kulan afur iyo casho ah la qaatay qaybo ka mid ah shacabka reer PL ee deggan magaalada Muqdisho ayaa shaaca ka qaaday inuu markii 3aad u tartamayo xilka madaxweyne ee dawlada federaalka ah ee Soomaaliya.

Said Deni ayaa sheegay inuu ka qoomamaynayo xildhibaanadii uu soo xullay 2022, balse uu hadda ka fiirsan doono xildhibaanada uu soo xullayo doorashada DFS ee soo socota. dhaliilo badan ayuu sheegay inay uga timid, uuna fahamsan yahay, wuxuu ku faanay inuu Puntland shaqo fiican ka qabtay oo markaan ay Soomaali u baahantahay isagga.

Wuxuu ugu baaqay dadka Muqdisho jooga ee reer Puntland inay isku duubnaadaan oo han iyo qab ay yeeshaan sidiisa, sidoo kalena aysan qaadan wax aan u qalmin. Arimaha biyaha fadhiya gaalkacayo wax ka qabashadeeda oo wax laga waydiiyay si faahfaahsan ugama uusan jawaabin madaxweynuhu.

Madaxweyne Said Deni ayaa inta badan kulamada siyaasadeed ee Hotel Airport uu ka wado ee Muqdisho ka ilaaliya inay ka qayb-galaan xildhibaanada PL ku matala DFS ee isagga taageersan, kuwaas oo intooda badan aan soo laabanayn labo sababood dartood mida wax qaybsigga beelaha oo fursada u diidaysa & Deni oo aaminaad iyo kalsooni aan ku qabin qof Xamar martagay oo dadka ay isbarteen, hadii xulista baarlamaanka gacantiisa kusoo laabatana ay xubno kale sugayaaan.

Tababarka istaraatiijiyadaha doorashada qaranka 7aad ee loo qabtay hoggaaminta dhexe iyo hoose ee Xisbiga Barwaaqo ayaa si habsami leh loogu soo gebagebeeyey magaalada Tog Wajaale.

Tababarkan oo socday muddo laba cisho ah ayaa diiradda lagu saaray xoojinta fahamka iyo aqoonta hoggaaminta  dhexe iyo hoose. 

Waxaa si gaar ah loogu lafaguray qorsheynta istaraatiijiyadda doorashada, abaabulka iyo maareynta ololaha, iyo adkaynta wada shaqaynta xubnaha xisbiga.

Ka qaybgalayaashu waxay heleen faham mideysan oo ku saabsan jihada iyo qorshaha doorashada qaranka 7aad, taas oo sare u qaadaysa isku duubnida, isku xirnaanta, iyo diyaar garowga xisbiga.

Ugu dambayn, tababarkan ayaa  si guul leh ku soo dhammaaday, isla markaana wax weyn ka tari doona hirgelinta istaraatiijiyadda iyo guusha doorashada qaranka 7aad.

Heshiiskan ayaa qeyb ka ah dadaallo xooggan oo lagu xaqiijinaayo danaha labada qaran ee walaalaha ah ka dhaxeeya.

⚡ Doorasho Dhafan!

Anigu waxaan qabaa in doorashada Soomaaliya noqoto mid is ku dhafaysa doorasho dadban iyo doorasho qof iyo cod ah, iyadoo la adkaynayo habraaceeda. Waa in aanay Dawlad Goboleedyadu awood u yeelan in sameeyaan ceebtii hore. Sidoo kale, waa in aanay Dawladda Dhexe yeelan awood ay ku "manipulate"-garayso doorashada. Waa in doorashadu noqotaa mid hufan oo xor ah.

Waa in xubnaha baarlamanka ay soo doortaan eegooyin tiro badan, kuwaas oo u codeynaya xirmooyin kuraas ah. Tusaale ahaan, halkii kursi waxa uu codkiisu noqonayaa 1000 qof. Haddii la dooranayo 13 kursi oo is ku xirmo ah, waxaa wada dooranaya 13,0000 qof.

Qodobka kale ee muhiimka ah, waa in la helo korjoogayaal caalami ah (international observers), kuwaas oo report-garaynaya wixii is-dabamarin ah.

Guddiga doorashada madaxa bannaan ee hadda jira, ma haysto kalsoonida dhammaan dhinacyada. Sidaas awgeed, waa in dib loo hawl geliyo guddigii hore ee Xaliimo Yareey (reinstatement), maaddaama uu horay u magcaabay Madaxweyne Xasan Sheekh, oo ay kalsoonina ku qabaan dhammaan dhinacyadu. Sidoo kale, guddigaas waxa uu lee yahay khibrad badan oo waxa ay adduunka ka soo barteen sida loo qabto doorasho dadweyene. Waa in muddo kordhin hal sano ah loo sameeyo hay'adaha Federaalka, oo la helo Xukuumad Midnimo Qaran oo dalka gaarsiin karta doorashadaas. U gu dambayn, waa in Dawlad Goboleedyada muddo-dhaaf ah, ay galaan doorashooyin waafaqsan xeerarkooda maxaliga ah.

Ismari-Waaga Doorashooyinka oo Cirka Isku Shareeray.

Muqdisho – Xarunta Madaxtooyada ee Villa Soomaaliya waxaa maanta ka dhacay kulan siyaasadeed oo xasaasi ah, kaas oo u dhexeeyey Madaxweynaha Jamhuuriyadda Federaalka Soomaaliya, Xasan Sheekh Maxamuud, iyo Golaha Mustaqbalka Soomaaliya. Kulankan ayaa yimid xilli ay cirka isku shareertay doodda ku saabsan nooca doorasho ee dalka loo jihaynayo iyo qaabka nidaamka dowladeed ee mustaqbalka.

Wararka laga helayo kulanka ayaa sheegaya in Madaxweynaha uu soo bandhigay qorshe ku saleysan qabashada doorasho qof iyo cod ah. Qorshuhu wuxuu dhigaya in marka hore la qabto doorashooyinka golayaasha deegaanka, lana soo gabagabeeyo ka hor 15-ka Abriil 2026, kaddibna loo gudbo doorashooyinka dowlad-goboleedyada, si loogu sii gogol xaadho doorashada heer federaal.

Dhanka kale, xubnaha Golaha Mustaqbalka iyo siyaasiyiinta mucaaradka ayaa muujiyey diidmo iyo walaac ku saabsan jadwalka iyo habraaca la soo jeediyey. Waxay ku adkeysanayaan in arrimaha doorashooyinka iyo wax ka beddelka dastuurka lagu saleeyo wadatashi qaran iyo heshiis siyaasadeed oo loo dhan yahay, halkii laga qaadi lahaa go’aanno hal dhinac u janjeera.

Siyaasiyiinta la filayo inay door muuqda ka qaataan wada-hadallada xiga waxaa ka mid ah Madaxweynaha Puntland, Siciid Cabdullaahi Deni, iyo Raysal Wasaare hore Xasan Cali Khayre. Labaduba waxay ka mid yihiin madaxda sida cad uga aragti duwan jihada ay xukuumaddu u wado geeddi-socodka siyaasadeed.

Ismari-waaga ugu weyn wuxuu salka ku hayaa saddex qodob: nooca nidaamka dowladeed (madaxtooyo ama baarlamaani), qaabka doorashada, iyo tirada xisbiyada la oggolaanayo. Sidoo kale, muran ayaa ka taagan cidda leh awoodda ansixinta wax ka beddelka dastuurka.

Inkasta oo kulanka maanta uusan soo saarin go’aan kama dambays ah, haddana waxaa la filayaa in wada-hadalladu sii socdaan. Xaaladda siyaasadeed ee dalka ayaa weli u muuqata mid mugdi ku jirta, iyadoo go’aannada la gaaro ay si toos ah u saameyn doonaan jihada siyaasadeed ee Soomaaliya.

Kulan Midho-dhal ah oo Dhexmaray Wasiirrada Deegaanka ee Heer Federaal iyo Heer Dowlad Goboleed

Muqdisho, Soomaaliya – Maanta waxaa kulan midho-dhal ah yeeshay Wasiirka Wasaaradda Deegaanka iyo Isbedelka Cimilada ee heer Federaal ee Jamhuuriyadda Federaalka Soomaaliya, Mudane Gen.Bashiir Maxamed Axmed Goobe, iyo Wasiirka Wasaaradda Deegaanka iyo Isbedelka Cimilada ee Dowlad Goboleedka Waqooyi Bari, Mudane Siciid Maxamed Cabdiraxmaan.

Kulanka ayaa diiradda lagu saaray xaaladaha guud ee deegaanka Dowlad Goboleedka Waqooyi Bari, baahiyaha jira, iyo saamaynta baaxadda leh ee isbedelka cimiladu ku yeeshay deegaanka iyo bulshada ku dhaqan deegaannadaas. Wasiir Siciid Maxamed Cabdiraxmaan ayaa si faahfaahsan uga warbixiyey xaaladda deegaanka, caqabadaha taagan, iyo baahiyaha mudnaanta u leh in wax laga qabto.

Dhankiisa, Wasiir Gen.Bashiir Maxamed Axmed Goobe ayaa sharaxaad ka bixiyey qorshayaasha istiraatiijiyadeed ee Wasaaradda Federaalka, habraacyada shaqo, iyo dadaallada socda ee lagu xoojinayo iskaashiga heer federaal iyo heer dowlad goboleed si loo dardargeliyo wax ka qabashada arrimaha deegaanka iyo isbedelka cimilada.

Sidoo kale, labada Wasiir ayaa si wadajir ah ula kulmay wakiilka Hay’adda Cuntada Adduunka ee World Food Programme (WFP) u qaabilsan Soomaaliya, Mudane Hameed Nuru. Kulankaas ayaa lagu falanqeeyey xaaladda guud ee dalka, gaar ahaan dhinacyada la xiriira sugnaanta cunnada, saameynta isbedelka cimilada, iyo xoojinta iskaashiga ka dhexeeya Wasaaradaha iyo WFP.

Ugu dambayn, labada Wasiir ayaa hoosta ka xarriiqay muhiimadda ay leedahay wada-shaqeyn joogto ah, isku dubbarid qorshaysan, iyo xoojinta xiriirka hay’adaha dowladda iyo kuwa caalamiga ah si wax ku ool ah looga jawaabo caqabadaha deegaanka iyo cimilada, loona gaaro horumar waara oo dan u ah shacabka Soomaaliyeed.

 Dhawaan, Wasiirka Arrimaha Dibadda ee Israel Gideon Sa’ar ayaa booqday Addis Abeba bishii Maarij 2025, isagoo la kulmay Wasiirka Arrimaha Dibadda Itoobiya Gedion Timothewos si ay uga wadahadlaan iskaashiga dhinacyada siyaasadda, dhaqaalaha, iyo tignoolajiyada. Booqashada Herzog ee la qorsheeyay ayaa ku soo beegantay iyadoo ay sii kordhayaan dhaqdhaqaaqa diblumaasiyadeed ee Geeska Afrika, maalmo kadib markii Recep Tayyip Erdoğan uu sidoo kale booqday Addis Ababa oo uu kala hadlay madaxda Itoobiya arrimaha gobolka iyo iskaashiga dhaqaalaha. 

Intii uu ku guda jiray booqashadiisa, Erdogan wuxuu carrabka ku adkeeyay muhiimadda ay leedahay in la ixtiraamo madaxbannaanida iyo wadajirka dhuleed, isagoo ka digay loolanka ka baxsan juqraafiga siyaasadeed ee Geeska Afrika.

 Waxa uu dib u xaqiijiyey mawqifka Ankara ee ah in aqoonsi kasta oo Israa’iil ay siiso Somaliland aanu kobcin doonin xasilloonida gobolka halka ay israiil u aragto in Amniga geeska Africa iyo guud ahaanba caalamka ay ku jirto Aqoonsiga somaliland waxaa kale  laga yaabaa in Madaxwaynaha israiil uu yimaado Hargeysa caasimada  somaliland oo la kulmo madaxwaynaha sonaliland cabdiraxmaan maxamed cabdilaahi.  .

Mareykanka iyo wadamo badan oo reer Galbeedka ah waxaa weli la wareysan shaksiyaad kiiskaan ku lug leh oo ay kamid-yihiin masuuliyiin xil haya, kuwo heyn jiray, Tujaar caan ah iyo shakhsiyaad magac ku leh bulshada dhexdeeda.

Dowladda Federaalka ayaa shaaca ka qaadday in ay bilowday daabacadda Baasaboorka Bariga Afrika ee dalkeeda ka dib ku biiristii Ururka EAC; iyada oo dadka Soomaalidu ay dal-ku-gal la'aan ku tegi doonaan; Kenya, Uganda, Tanzania, Rwanda, Burundi iyo Suudaanta Koonfureed, tani oo kor u qaadaysa diblumaasiyadda, dhaqaalaha & isdhexgalka Soomaalida & Bariga Afrika.

Halkan waxaa ku qoran amaano iyo waxqabad muuqda oo la xiriira Cabdiqafaar Elmi Xaange, Wasiir ku‑xigeenka Wasaaradda Maaliyadda ee Soomaaliya:
✅ 1. Sharaxaad sharciyeed iyo taageero sharci
Markii Golaha Aqalka Sare ee Baarlamaanka Soomaaliya ka hor keenay afar shuruuc muhiim ah, Wasiir ku‑xigeenka Xaange ayaa si faahfaahsan ugu sharaxay xildhibaanada muhiimadda iyo ujeeddooyinka sharciga, taasoo ka tarjumeysa karti iyo faham qoto dheer oo ku saabsan xeerarka maaliyadeed ee dalka.
✅ 2. Ka qaybgal iyo wakiil rasmi ah ee shirarka caalamiga
Xaange waxa uu si firfircoon uga qayb galay shirarka heer caalami, sida African Finance Ministers Summit, halkaas oo uu la yeeshay wada‑hadallo dhinacyo badan leh mas’uuliyiinta caalamiga ah si loo xoojiyo iskaashiga iyo taageerada maaliyadeed ee Soomaaliya. �
Wakaaladda Wararka Qaranka Soomaaliyeed
✅ 3. Horumarinta iyo casriyeynta adeegyada maaliyadeed
Wasiir ku‑xigeenka ayaa si rasmi ah u daah‑furay barnaamijka SOMQR, oo ah nidaam casri ah oo dadka adeegsanaya bangiyada u oggolaanaya inay lacagaha ku diri karaan hal QR scan kaliya — taasoo qayb ka ah dadaallada lagu hagaajinayo nidaamka maaliyadda iyo adeegyada bulshada.
✅ 4. Wacyigelin iyo wadahadal la taliyey la hay’adaha maaliyadeed
Xaange waxa uu ka hadlay sida Dowladda Soomaaliya iyo Bangiga Adduunka ay uga wada shaqeynayaan taageero dhaqaale iyo mashaariic horumarineed, taas oo muujinaysa doorkiisa ku aaddan kobcinta kalsoonida bulshada iyo hay’adaha caalamiga ah.

Taliyaha hay’adda Nabad sugidda iyo Sirdoonka Qaranka Mahad Maxamed Salaad oo wata qorshahan ayaa madaxda sar sare ku qanciyay in bannaanka lagu soo heshiiyo oo war-murtiyeedka (Communiqué) oo diyaarsan la isugu soo laabta Madaxtooyada Villa Somalia.

Mahad Salaad ayaa berri booqan doona Hotel Airport oo ay degganyihiin masuuliyiinta ugu muhiimsan Golaha Mustaqbalka, wuxuuna xoogga saari doonaa inuu kala xaajooda rabitaanka Madaxweyne Xasan ee doorashada.

Villa Somalia ayaa durba miiska soo saartay 135 oday oo ah qaabkii loo galay doorashadii 2012, haddii la diido qorshaha ay wataan ee doorashada qof iyo cod.

The Story of Major General Jeff Nyagah

The defining test of Major General Jeff Nyagah's leadership came not in conference rooms or press briefings, but on the battlefields of southern Somalia during Operation Linda Nchi.

When Kenya launched the historic incursion into Somalia to neutralize extremist threats and secure its borders, Nyagah was among the commanders entrusted with leading troops on the ground. Operating in hostile terrain under constant threat, he coordinated complex movements, maintained discipline under fire, and ensured mission focus in an unpredictable combat environment.

Operation Linda Nchi brought out his calm authority, tactical clarity, and deep sense of responsibility for the men and women under his command. It was here that his reputation as a reliable field commander was firmly cemented.

Following the success of Linda Nchi, Nyagah continued serving in Somalia under the African Union Mission in Somalia (AMISOM). Beyond combat operations, the mission demanded cooperation with regional forces, protection of civilians, and support for stabilization efforts. These experiences sharpened his understanding that modern warfare requires both strength and restraint - force balanced with humanity.

Born in Loitoktok, Kajiado District, Nyagah's journey to senior command had begun years earlier. He joined the Kenya Defence Forces in the early 1990s as a cadet, steadily rising through the ranks through discipline, professionalism, and competence. Alongside field experience, he strengthened his leadership foundation through formal education at institutions including the University of Nairobi and the United States Army War.

Haddii aysan jirin hannaan isla xisaabtan sida xil-ka-qaadis (impeachment) ama maxkamadeyn gaar ah, awooddu way xadgudbi kartaa. Waana nidaam kaligii talisnimo. 

2. Marka xilka laga dago, 
Haddii madaxweynihii hore aan lagu qaadi karin dacwad marka uu xilka ka dago (marka laga reebo dambiyada waaweyn ee xuquuqda aadanaha), taasi waxay daciifin kartaa cadaaladda iyo kalsoonida shacabka. Waxayna mugdi gelin kartaa mustaqbalka dalka. Waayo ratiga yari, ratiga weyn saanqaadkiisa ayuu leeyahay. 

3. Ka reebista dambiyada xuquuqda aadanaha, 
In laga reebo dambiyada culus sida xasuuq, dambiyo dagaal, ama tacaddiyo kale oo bani’aadamnimo waa arrin la jaanqaadaysa qawaaniinta caalamiga ah.
 
4. Miisaanka awoodaha,
Su’aasha ugu weyn waa: ma jiraan hay’ado madax-bannaan sida baarlamaan awood leh, garsoor madax-bannaan, iyo hay’ado la dagaallama musuqmaasuqa oo xakameeya awoodda madaxweynaha? 
 
Taasina waa maya! 

Hadii aan soo hooriyo hadalkeeyga, xasaanad xaddidan inta xilka la hayo waa arrin laga helo dalal badan, balse xasaanad ballaaran oo sii jirta marka xilka laga dago waxay keeni kartaa dhibaato sharci iyo mid kalsooni bulsho. Waxa muhiimka ahi waa in la helo nidaam awoodaha isu dheellitiran oo xaqiijiya isla xisaabtan dhab ah.

Meeshu ma aha hanti gaar ah oo qof leeyahay; waa dal ay leeyihiin shacabku, mustaqbalkiisana ay wax ka go’aamin karaan. Dastuurkuna ma aha wax taagan oo aan la taaban karin, sida aayad qur’aan ah, waa dukumeenti nool oo mar kasta wax-ka-beddel (amendment) lagu samayn karo marka loo maro habraacyada sharciyeed ee saxda ah.

Haddii bulshada ay u aragto in qodobka xasaanadda madaxweynaha u baahan yahay dib-u-eegis, waxaa jira waddo sharci ah oo taas lagu sameeyo. Arrinta xasaanadda xitaa waxaa lagu dari karaa warqadda codbixinta (ballot) si shacabka si toos ah uga dhiibtaan ra’yigooda, iyagoo dooranaya qaabka ay rabaan in xasaanaddu u ekaato, ha noqoto mid xaddidan, mid ku-meel-gaar ah, ama mid leh shuruudo cad.

Aan soo koobee, dastuurka waxaa iska leh shacabka, wax-ka-beddelkiisana iyagaa leh. Haddii rabitaan guud jiro, xasaanadda madaxweynaha waa lagu dari karaa ballot-ka si go’aan dastuuri ah loogu gaaro afti dadweyne.

Dr. Maha H

18- Wasiirka Batroolka  Daahir Shire Maxamed ayaa maalin weyn oo taariikhi ah ku tilmaamay in dalka Turkiga laga soo  sagootiyay Markabka Cagri Bey, oo howlgal shidaal qodis ka sameyn doona xeebaha  dalkeenna.

22- Dalka Turkiga ayaa laga soo sagootiyey Markabka Cağri Bey oo ku soo wajahan Soomaaliya, kaas oo howlgal shidaal qodis ah ka sameyn doona xeebaha dalkeenna.

2- Madaxweyne Xasan Sheekh Maxamuud ayaa kulan qado ah  ku maamuusay xubnaha Golaha Mustaqbalka ee ajiibay gogoshii xukuumaddu ay u fidaisay 19 bishii Jannaayo 2026.

3- Madaxweyne Xasan Sheekh Maxamuud, ayaa ugu hambalyeeyay shacabka Soomaaliyeed iyo dhammaan Ummadda Muslimiinta bilashada bisha barakeysan ee Ramadaan, isaga oo ku baaqay in loo gurmado dadka Soomaaliyeed ee ay saameeyeen abaaraha dalka ka jira.

4- Madaxweyne Xasan Sheekh Maxamuud ayaa wadahadal miro dhal ah oo khadka taleefanka ah la yeeshay Amiirka Dowladda Qatar, Mudane Sheekh Tamiim Bin Hamad Al-Thaani, iyagoo diiradda ku saaray xoojinta iyo horumarinta xiriirka istiraatiijiga ah ee ka dhexeeya labada dal.

5- Madaxweyne Xasan Sheekh Maxamuud ayaa ka qayb galay shir heer sare ah oo ku saabsanaa mustaqbalka Qaramada Midoobay, kaas oo ka qabsoomay magaalada Addis Ababa, kana mid ahaa kulan-doceedyada muhiimka ahaa ee Shir Madaxeedka Midowga Afrika.

6- Ra’iisul Wasaare  Xamsa Cabdi Barre, oo shacabka Soomaaliyeed ugu hambalyeeyay curashada bisha barakaysan ee Ramadaan, ayaa ugu baaqay bulshada Soomaaliyeed midnimo iyo wadajir, isaga oo kula dardaarmay in ay u naxariistaan dadkeenna ay abaartu saamaysay.

7- Ra’iisul Wasaare  Xamsa Cabdi Barre, ayaa qaabilay Safiirka Dawladda Qatar u qaabilsan Soomaaliya, Mudane Dr. Cabdullaahi Bin Saalim Al-Nucaymi . waxa ayna ka wada hadleen xoojinta xiriirka iskaashi ee ka dhexeeya labada dowladood ee Soomaaliya iyo Qatar.

8- Ra’iisul Wasaare Ku-Xigeenka Soomaaliya Saalax  Axmed Jaamac  ayaa khudbad muhiim ah ka jeediyay Shirka Ganacsiga Afrika,isagoo carrabka ku adkeeyey fursadaha maalgashi ee Soomaaliya ka jira dhinacyada dekadaha, beeraha iyo  kalluumeysiga.

9- Wasiirka Amniga Gudaha Cabdullaahi Sheekh Ismaaciil (Fartaag), ayaa si rasmi ah u kala wareegay Safiirka Dowladda Turkiga u fadhiya Soomaaliya qalab ciidan oo loogu talagalay cutub ka tirsan Ciidanka Booliska Gaarka ah ee Harmacad.

10- Wasiirka Warfaafinta, Dhaqanka iyo Dalxiiska Daa’uud Aweys Jaamac ayaa  daah-furay tartan cilmiyeedka bisha Ramadaan, isagoo hambalyo u diray bahda Warbaahinta Qaranka oo sanadkii 16-aad wada barnaamijka dood cilmiyeedka tartanka.

11- Wasiirka Tamarta iyo Kheyraadka Biyaha  Cabdillahi Bidhan Warsame, ayaa xqaabilay Agaasimaha cusub ee Hay’adda WFP u qaabilsan Soomaliya Hameed Nuru, iyadoo  diiradda lagu saaray xoojinta  horumarinta maamulka biyaha iyo adeegsiga hannaanka casriga ah ee xogta biyaha.

12- Wasaaradda Shaqada iyo Arrimaha Bulshada ayaa magaalada Muqdisho ku qabatay Shirka Isku-duwidda Ilaalinta Bulshada,kaas oo loogu talagalay in lagu xoojiyo wada-shaqeynta Dowladda Federaalka, Dowlad-Goboleedyada, iyo bah-wadaagta si loo dardargeliyo barnaamijyada ilaalinta bulshada.

13- Wasiirka Arrimaha Dibadda iyo Iskaashiga Caalamiga  Cabdisalaan Cabdi Cali, ayaa qaabilay Danjire Muuse Jaamac Cali oo ah Ergeyga Gaarka ah ee IGAD u qaabilsan Koonfurta Suudaan, waxa ayna ka wada hadleen xoojinta nabadda iyo iskaashiga amniga ee gobolka.

14- Wasiirada Gaashandhiga ,Arrimaha Gudaha iyo Taliyaha Ciidamada Xoogga Dalka ayaa kormeer ku tagay degaannada Sabiid iyo Caanoole ee Gobolka Shabeellaha Hoose, iyagoo dib-u-dejin rasmi ah u sameeyeey qoysaskii ay horey uga barakiciyeen kooxda Khawaarijta degaannada.

15- Wasiirka Ganacsiga iyo Warshadaha Soomaaliya, Jamaal Maxamed Xasan, ayaa magaalada Addis Ababa kulan kula qaatay Claver Gatete, oo ah Ergeyga Gaarka ah ee Qaramada Midoobay u qaabilsan Afrika, iyadoo kulanka looga hadlay dhinacyada ganacsiga iyo fursadaha maalgashiga ee ka jira Soomaaliya.

16- Wasiirka Gaashaandhigga Axmed Macallin Fiqi ayaa kulan la yeeshay Safiirka Jamhuuriyadda Dadka Shiinaha u fadhiya Soomaaliya, Danjire Wang Yu, iyagoo ka wadahadley xoojinta iskaashiga labada dal.

17- Wasiirka Arrimaha Gudaha, Federaalka iyo Dib-u Heshiisiinta  Cali Yuusuf Cali (Xoosh), ayaa si rasmi ah u furay kulanka Guddiga Sare ee Mashruuca Dowlad-Kaab, isaga tilmaamay ahmiyadda mashruucan uu u leeyahay dowlad-dhiska dalka.

18- Wasiirka Batroolka  Daahir Shire Maxamed ayaa maalin weyn oo taariikhi ah ku tilmaamay in dalka Turkiga laga soo  sagootiyay Markabka Cagri Bey, oo howlgal shidaal qodis ka sameyn doona xeebaha  dalkeenna.

19- Wasiirka Maaliyadda  Biixi Imaan Cige, ayaa  shir guddoomiyay kulankii 24-aad ee Wasiirrada Maaliyadda Dowlad Goboleedyada iyo Maamulka Gobolka Banaadir, kaas oo a diiradda lagu saaray xoojinta wada-shaqeynta iyo isku dubbaridka hannaanka maamulka maaliyadda dalka.

20- Wasiirka Warfaafinta, Dhaqanka iyo Dalxiiska  Mudane Daa’uud Aweys Jaamac. ayaa la kulmay wafdi ka socda Dowlad Goboleedka Waqooyi Bari Soomaaliya oo uu horkacayey Wasiirka Warfaafinta maamulkaasi Axmed Diiriye.

21- Wasiirka Gaashaandhigga iyo Taliyaha Ciidanka Xoogga Dalka ayaa hambalyo u diray Ciidanka Cirka Soomaaliyeed munaasabadda sannad-guurada 66-aad ee aasaaskooda, iyagoo ku bogaadiyay doorka ay ku leeyihiin difaaca dalka iyo la dagaallanka argagixisada.

22- Dalka Turkiga ayaa laga soo sagootiyey Markabka Cağri Bey oo ku soo wajahan Soomaaliya, kaas oo howlgal shidaal qodis ah ka sameyn doona xeebaha dalkeenna.

23- War-murtiyeedka Midowga Afrika ayaa si cad u cambaareeyay  aqoonsiga sharci darrada ah ee Israa’iil ay sheegtay in ay siisay gobolka Somaliland ee waqooyiga Soomaaliya , iyagoo mar kale adkeeyay mowqifkooda ku aaddan ilaalinta madax-bannaanida, midnimada iyo wadajirka dhuleed ee Jamhuuriyadda Federaalka Soomaaliya.

24- Danjiraha Soomaaliya u fadhiya Tanzania, Ilyaas Cali Xasan, ayaa si rasmi ah ugu wareejiyey madaxda amniga iyo socdaalka  ee Dowladda Soomaaliya go’aankii lagu ansixiyey naqshadda iyo daabacaadda Baasaboorka cusub ee Urur Goboleedka Bariga Afrika (EAC) ee Soomaaliya.

25- Agaasimaha Guud ee Wasaaradda Gaadiidka iyo Duulista Hawada  Cumar Cali Afrax ayaa guddoomiyay shir looga hadlay qorshaha dhismaha waddooyinka iyo nidaamka bulaacadaha ee garoonka diyaaradaha Aadan Cadde ee magaalada Muqdisho.

26- Guddoomiyaha Guddiga Madaxa-Bannaan ee Xuquuqul Insaanka Qaranka, Dr. Maryam Qaasim, ayaa kulan la qaadatay Kirsten Young oo ah madaxa Qaramada Midoobay u qaabilsan Xuquuqda Aadanaha ee Soomaaliya.

27- Danjiraha Soomaaliya u fadhiya Jarmalka, Mudane Cabdulcasiis Maxamuud Maxamed ayaa   si rasmi ah loogu guddoomay warqadihiisa aqoonsiga danjirenimo ee dalka Hungary.

Federal Government of Somalia’s Weekly Briefing
Mogadishu, Friday, 20th February, 2026

1- President Hassan Sheikh Mohamud chaired a meeting between the Federal Government of Somalia and the Future Council, held at Villa Somalia, in which existential issues were discussed, including elections, completion of the constitution, droughts, and the fight against the Kharijites (extremists).

2- President Hassan Sheikh Mohamud hosted a luncheon for the members of the Future Council who are in Mogadishu following a government invitation.

3- President Hassan Sheikh Mohamud congratulated the Somali people and the entire Muslim Ummah on the holy month of Ramadan, calling for solidarity with Somalis affected by the country’s drought.

4- President Hassan Sheikh Mohamud held a productive telephone discussion with the Amir of Qatar, Sheikh Tamim bin Hamad Al-Thani, focusing on strengthening and advancing the strategic relationship between the two countries.

5- President Hassan Sheikh Mohamud participated in a high-level meeting on the future of the United Nations, held in Addis Ababa, as part of key summit activities of the African Union Heads of State Summit.

6- Prime Minister Hamza Abdi Barre, who congratulated the Somali people on the advent of the holy month of Ramadan, urged unity and solidarity, and encouraged mercy for those affected by drought.

7- Prime Minister Hamza Abdi Barre met with the Qatar Ambassador to Somalia, Dr. Abdullahi Bin Salim Al-Nucaymi, and they discussed intensifying cooperative ties between Somalia and Qatar.

8- Deputy Prime Minister Salah Ahmed Jama delivered an important address at the Africa Trade Conference, emphasizing investment opportunities for Somalia in the areas of ports, agriculture, and fishing.

9- Interior Security Minister Abdullahi Sheikh Ismail officially has received weapons and equipment belonging to a unit of the Special Police to the Harmacad group.

10- Minister of Information, Culture and Tourism H.E. Daud Aweis Jama inaugurated the Ramadan quiz competition, congratulating the national media for the 16th year of the program’s public discussion competition.

11- Minister of Energy and Water Resources Abdullahi Bidhan Warsame welcomed the new Director of the WFP Office for Somalia, Hameed Nuru, focusing on strengthening water governance and the use of modern water data systems.

12- The Ministry of Labour and Social Affairs held a Coordination Conference on Social Protection in Mogadishu to bolster cooperation among the Federal Government, Federal Member States, and partners to accelerate social protection programs.

13- Minister of Foreign Affairs and International Cooperation Abdisalam Abdi Ali hosted Mousa Jama Ali, the Special Envoy of IGAD for South Sudan, and they discussed strengthening peace and security cooperation in the region.

14- Ministers of Defense, Interior, and the Army Chief of Staff visited the Sabiid and Caanoole areas in Lower Shabelle to formally rebuild the families displaced earlier by the Kharijites group.

15- Minister of Trade and Industry Jamal Mohamed Hassan met in Addis Ababa with Claver Gatete, the United Nations Secretary-General’s Special Envoy for Africa, to discuss trade and investment opportunities in Somalia.

16- Minister of Defense Ahmed Moalim Fiqi held a meeting with the Chinese Ambassador to Somalia, Wang Yu, to discuss boosting bilateral cooperation.

17- Minister of Interior, Federal Affairs and Reconciliation Ali Yusuf Ali officially opened the Joint High Committee for the Dowlad-Kaab project, emphasizing the importance of the project for governance.

18- Minister of Petroleum Dahir Shire Mohamed described as historic milestone, noting the departure of the ship Cagri Bey from Turkey, which will carry out oil exploration off Somali coasts.

19- Minister of Finance Bihi Iman Ige presided over the 24th meeting of Finance Ministers of the Federal Member States and the Banadir region, focusing on strengthening cooperation and coordination of the country’s financial management framework.

20- Minister of Information, Culture and Tourism H.E. Daud Aweis Jama led a delegation from the Northwest State of Somalia, led by the Information Minister Ahmed Diriye, on a visit.

21- Minister of Defense and the Army Chief of Staff sent congratulations to the Somali Air Force on the 66th anniversary of its founding, praising its role in national defense and counter-terrorism.

22- Turkey said farewell to the Cağri Bey ship, which is approaching Somalia to conduct oil exploration off the country’s shores.

23- The African Union communiqué firmly condemned the illegal recognition allegedly granted by Israel to Somaliland’s region in northern Somalia, reiterating their stance on protecting Somalia’s sovereignty, unity, and territorial integrity.

24- Somali Ambassador to Tanzania Ilyas Ali Hassan, formally handed over to the Somali governments’ officials documents allowing Somalia to print and issue the East African Community (EAC) passport.

25- The Director General of the Ministry of Transportation and Aviation, Omar Ali Afrah, chaired a meeting on the plan for constructing roads and the drainage system at Aden Adde International Airport in Mogadishu.

26- Dr. Maryam Qasim, Chairperson of the Independent National Human Rights Committee, met with Kirsten Young, the United Nations High Commissioner for Human Rights for Somalia.

27- Somali Ambassador to Germany, Ambassador Abdulaziz Mohamud Mohamed has formally presented his credentials as the ambassador to Hungary

Trump ayaa wajahaya cadaadis gudaha , iyadoo hadda maxkamada Mareykanka ay iskudayayaan inay xakameeyaan baaxada awoodda uu adeegsanayo, tallaabada u horreysa waxaa la doonayaa in gacantiisa laga saaro awoodda u sarreysa ee dunidda u adeegsanayo oo ah canshuuraha, taa oo qalqal ka dhex abuurtay Mareykanka iyo xulafadiisa. 

CNN, oo ka warramaysa xaaladda uu saakay wajahay Trump ayaa sheegtay inuu nacalad iyo aflagaado kala daalay maxkamadaha ku mashqulsan inay awoodiisa xakameeyaan, iyadoo xataa warbaahinta Mareykanka ay markii u horreysa si cad u baahinayso inuu Trump kala kulmayo burbur gudaha Mareykanka. 

Laakin wax kasta gudaha Mareykanka ugama socdaan si toosan, gaar ahaan marka la tixraaco cadaadis kasta oo gudaha looga furo Trump, waxaa ugu dambeyn la arkaa isagoo qaadanaya go’aamo uu ka war wareegan jiray. Markii muddo ay miiskiisa saarnaayeen faylal ay diyaariyeen Pentagon-ka oo la xiriiray howlgalkii Venezuela, waxa gudaha looga furay mudaharaadyo ka dhan ah howlgalkii ICE ay ka waday gobollada ay ku badanyihiin dadka soogalootiga ah, waxaana si fudud loo burburiyay qorshihiisa ka dhanka ahaa soogalootiga, tani waxay ku qasabtay inuu saxiixo howlgalkaa oo la fuliyo, ka dib waxaa dhacay shirkadaha Mareykanka ee shidaalka inay la wareegaan goobaha shidaalka ee Venezuela.

Mareykanka wuxuu leeyahay taariikh ah inay dhacdooyinka qaar ku lug yeeshaan shirkadaha, taariikhda marka dib loo raaco badanaa dagaallada uu Mareykanka qaaday in ka badan arrimo siyaasadeed waxaa ku dhex jirtay ganacsi, tusaale ahaan faylasha Epstein, waxaa lagu arkay inta uusan dhicin kacdoonkii Liibiya ee Mareykanka uu hoggaaminayay inay diyaariyeen shirkaddo ganacsi oo Mareykan ah, kuwaasoo doonayay inay la wareegaan hantida hoggaamiyihii Liibiya ee Muammar Gaddafi. Arrinta Liibiya waa iskudarka doonista shirkadaha Mareykanka iyo Israa’iil oo ka hortagaysay hamiga Gaddafi oo raadinayay nukliyeer iyo isku xirka awood ka dhan ah Israa’iil.

Caqliga manta Muqdisho ka taliyaa waxaa la yidhaahdaa #Banaadir_State ku shaqee, Kuna qudhaabo #Somalia, sidaa awadeed raga ka tagay #Puntland iyo #Jubaland ee doonaya in ay Muqdisho hadal wax kaga taraan waxa ka socdaa waa niman riyoonaya taariikhda na ka been sheegaya. 

Muqdisho waxaa lagu haysta hantidii iyo maguurtadii lagu qabsaday 1991-kii ilaa mantana wax garowshiiyaa lagama hayo dadka Muqdisho ku dhaqan madax iyo minjo toona. 

Waxaanay ku heshiis yihiin la sheegto magacii dowladii Somalia dunida na loo sawiro in halkani tahay caasimadii dalka dadka inta kalena laga xigsado sidoo kalena loogu awood sheegto xataa kuwa wakhtigu keeno sidii ku dhacday Farmaajo oo kale shalay. 

Anigu waxaan qabaa in dooda manta Muqdisho taala aanay ahayn tii loo bahnaa reer Puntland iyo Jubaland na waxaan farayaa in dooda doorashada layska ilaawo oo laga wada hadlo Muqdisho caasimad masii ahaan kartee halkii looga guuri lahaa aniga oo waliba soo jeedinaya in Caasimad cusub dalkaa loo bineeyo taaso laga yagleelayo xuduudka maamulada Puntland iyo Galmudug meesha ay iskaso galaan gaar ahaan bariga magaalada Gaalkacayo dhanka xeebta. 

“Dhashaaday sugtaa xaajadaad dhowrataa abid” waxaan idiin sheegaya in aan nin danbe oo reer kale ahi ka talin doonin Muqdisho sidoo kalena aanu kalsooni ku joogi doonin inta qiyaamaha ka hadhay marka taasi waa milil korkii lama dhayee xaqiiqada isy sheega fadlan kana dooda caasimada Somalia sidii ay u ahaan lahayd magaalo la wada leeyahay. 

Hadalkaygu midhkaasu ku kooban yahay fadlan halkan uga wac shaqsi kasoo jeeda Puntland iyo Jubaland si fariinteenu u gaadho.

Soomaaliya waxa ay muddo dheer la daalaa dhacaysay caqabado siyaasadeed iyo bulsho oo saameeyay horumarka, xasiloonida, iyo dhismaha dowladnimo waarta. 

Tan iyo burburkii dowladdii dhexe ee 1991, khilaafka u dhexeeya qaranimada iyo qabyaaladda ayaa si muuqata u saameeya jihada siyaasadeed iyo mustaqbalka dalka.

Warbixintan “Dhab ka hadal” waxay si qoto dheer u eegaysaa sida qaranimada iyo qabyaaladda ay isugu dhex galeen nolosha siyaasadeed ee Soomaaliya, saameynta ay ku leeyihiin nidaamka doorashooyinka, hoggaanka siyaasadeed, iyo rajada shacabka.

Burburkii dowladdii dhexe kadib, Soomaaliya waxa ay gashay marxalad ay bulshadu ku kala safatay habab ku dhisan qabiil iyo deegaan. 

Inkastoo la dhisay nidaam federaal ah iyo hay’ado dowladeed, qabyaaladdu weli waxay door muuqda ku leedahay go’aanada siyaasadeed. 

Qaranimada dhabta ah waxay ku dhisan tahay midnimo, dowladnimo shaqeysa, iyo maslaxadda guud, halka qabyaaladdu ay kala qaybinayso bulshada isla markaana abuureyso xiisad iyo tartan joogto ah.

Labadan aragtiyood ayaa maanta si toos ah ugu loolamaya jihada mustaqbalka Soomaaliya.

Nidaamka doorashooyinka ayaa noqday mid ka mid ah meelaha ugu cadcad ee lagu arko khilaafka u dhexeeya qaranimo iyo qabyaalad. 

Doorasho dadweyne oo qof iyo cod ah waxay muwaadiniinta siisaa awood ay si toos ah ugu doortaan hoggaankooda, taasoo sare u qaadaysa isla xisaabtan iyo sharciyad. 

Dhanka kale, doorasho dadban ayaa lagu dhaliilaa inay u furan tahay saameyn qabiil, musuqmaasuq, iyo isdaba marin siyaasadeed. 

Khilaafkan ayaa dib u dhigay hirgelinta doorashooyin dadweyne oo buuxa, taasoo saameyn ku yeelatay kalsoonida shacabka iyo xasiloonida siyaasadeed.

Waqtigan xaadirka ah, Soomaaliya waxa ka socda shirar siyaasadeed iyo wadatashiyo ay ku jiraan hoggaamiyeyaal isku haya aragtiyo kala duwan oo ku saabsan jihada dowladnimada iyo habka doorashada.

Warbixinnada laga helayo ilo siyaasadeed ayaa muujinaya in qaar ka mid ah siyaasiyiinta ay ku doodaan in nidaamka doorashooyinka dadweyne uusan weli diyaar u ahayn dalka, halka kuwo kalena ay u arkaan in dib u dhacaas uu sii fogeynayo horumarka iyo dowladnimada.

Arrintan ayaa dhalisay kala aragti duwanaansho siyaasadeed, khilaafyo soo noqnoqda, iyo hoos u dhac ku yimaada kalsoonida dadweynaha.

Soomaaliya waxaa maanta hortaal laba jiho oo cad: 
Mid ku wajahan dhismaha dowladnimo, midnimo, iyo horumar waara, iyo mid kale oo horseedi kara kala qaybsanaan, qabyaalad, iyo dib u dhac. 

Jidka dhismaha wuxuu ku saleysan yahay qaranimo, doorasho xor ah, hay’ado dowladeed oo shaqeeya, iyo nabad waarta, halka jidka burburka uu ku dhisan yahay qabyaalad, doorashooyin muran badan, dano gaar ah, iyo khilaaf joogto ah. 

Hoggaanka siyaasadeed ayaa door weyn ku leh jihada dalka, iyadoo wadaniyaddu ku saleysan tahay u adeegidda maslaxadda guud, midnimada, iyo horumarka dalka, halka daneystaha uu mudnaan siinayo dantiisa gaarka ah. 

Khilaafka u dhexeeya labadan aragtiyood ayaa si toos ah u saameeya xasiloonida, horumarka dhaqaalaha, kalsoonida bulshada, iyo nabadda guud.
Qaranimada dhabta ah waxay ku dhisan tahay midnimo, caddaalad, sinaan, rabitaanka shacabka, iyo hay’ado dowladeed oo hufan. 

Dhanka kale, qabyaalad, dano gaar ah, iyo faragelin shisheeye ayaa weli caqabad ku ah horumarka qaranimada iyo dowladnimada.

Daraasado caalami ah oo ku saabsan dowlad-dhiska ayaa muujinaya in qaranimada lagu dhiso muwaadinnimo, sharci, iyo isla xisaabtan, halka qabyaaladdu ay ku saleysan tahay xiriiryo gaar ah oo xaddidan, taasoo adkaynaysa in la dhiso nidaam mideeya dhammaan bulshada. 

Khibradaha caalamiga ah waxay tilmaamayaan in dowladnimo waarta aysan ku shaqayn karin qaab ku saleysan kala qoqob iyo dano gaar ah, balse ay u baahan tahay nidaam mideeya muwaadiniinta si siman. 

Qaybo ka mid ah bulshada iyo siyaasiyiinta weli waxay isku dayayaan in dowladnimo lagu dhiso qaab ku saleysan qabiil iyo saameyn gaar ah, taasoo su’aalo waaweyn ka keenaysa waxtarka nidaamkaas. 

Xaqiiqadu waxay tahay in dowladnimo ku dhisan qaranimo, caddaalad, iyo sharci ay tahay mid ka shaqeysa dunida maanta, halka nidaam ku saleysan kala qoqob iyo dan gaar ah uu marar badan horseedo khilaaf iyo dib u dhac.

Soomaaliya waxay taagan tahay isgoys muhiim ah: in la kala saaro micnaha iyo ujeedka qaranimada iyo qabiilka, lana fahmo faa’iidooyinka iyo khasaaraha labadaba. 

Qaranimadu waxay keentaa midnimo, xasilooni, iyo horumar, halka qabyaaladdu horseedi karto kala qaybsanaan iyo khilaaf joogto ah iyo burbur aan kabasho laheyn.

Haddii la doonayo dowladnimo waarta, bulshada iyo hoggaanka siyaasadeed waa in si cad u kala soocaan qaranimada iyo qabiilka, isla markaana doortaan nidaam ku dhisan danta guud, muwaadinnimo, iyo isla xisaabtan.

Taasi waa jidka kaliya ee lagu gaari karo xasilooni, horumar, iyo mustaqbal mideysan.

Shirka siyaasadeed ee ka socda Muqdisho haddii uu fashilmo, arrintu ma ahaan doonto oo keliya khilaaf siyaasadeed  waxay noqonaysaa dood sharci iyo inuu Burburey heshiiskii Dowladnimada Federaalka ee lagu aas aasay Jamhuuriyadda Sadexaad ee Dowlada Federaalka Soomaaliya.
Reer Puntland na waxaa u furmaya dood Sharci ah oo ay ku noqonayaan Dowlad Madax banaan.
1. Mabda’a Heshiiska Federaalka (Social Contract)
Dowladda Federaalka Soomaaliya waxay ku dhisan tahay heshiis ay galeen dowlad-goboleedyada iyo shacabka, heshiiskaas oo ah Dastuurka Ku-Meelgaarka ah. Marka awoodaha la isku raacay lagu xadgudbo ama hal dhinac si joogto ah u jebiyo heshiiska, sharci ahaan heshiiskaas wuxuu lumin Sharci ahaan shihiisa taasoo ka dhigan inaysan Sharciyad haysan Dowlada Federalkaa (material breach of constitutional compact).
2. Qodobka Federaalka iyo Awood-Qaybsiga
Dastuurku wuxuu qeexayaa in awoodaha qaarkood ay si gaar ah u leeyihiin dowlad-goboleedyada. Haddii awoodahaas si joogto ah loogu soo ururiyo xarunta dhexe, waxaa dhalanaya xaalad la yiraahdo “failure of federal arrangement” taas oo sharciyan furaysa dib-u-qiimeyn Dowlada federaalka.
3. Mabda’a Is-Aayo-Ka-Tashiga (Self-Determination)
Xeerarka caalamiga ah waxay aqoonsan yihiin in bulsho leh dhul, dad iyo maamul shaqaynaya ay ka tashan karto mustaqbalkeeda haddii nidaamkii ay qaybta ka ahayd si joogto ah ugu guuldareysto ilaalinta xuquuqdeeda siyaasadeed. Mabda’ani waxaa lagu dabaqaa marka xal gudaha ah la waayo.
4. State Succession (Kala Wareegidda Dowladnimo)
Haddii hay’addii federaalka lagu heshiiyay ay si dhab ah u shaqayn weydo, waxaa furmi kara mabda’a State Succession  oo ah in unug siyaasadeed sii wato jiritaankiisa sharciyeed isagoo ka madax bannaan nidaamkii burburay. Tani ma aha go’aan kicin ah, waa dood sharci oo ka dhalata fashilka qaab-dhismeed dowladeed.
5. Su’aasha Sharciyeed ee Dhabta ah
Haddii heshiiskii Federaalka la jebiyo:
A) Ma sharci baa in hal dhinac sii haysto magaca dowladnimo?
 B) Mise dhinacyadii heshiiska galay mid walba wuxuu dib u qaadan karaa awooddiisii?
Sidaas darteed, haddii xal siyaasadeed oo dhab ah la waayo, arrintu noqon mayso dood mucaarad iyo muxaafid waxay isu rogi doontaa dood sharci oo ku saabsan jiritaanka Jamhuuriyadda Federaalka lafteeda iyo mustaqbalka Puntland.
Taariikh ahaan dowladuhu dagaal kuma burburaan mar kasta  mararka qaar waxay ku burburaan jebinta heshiiskii lagu dhisay.
Marka halkaas ay gaarto oo uu burburo Nadaamkii Dowladnimo oo uu kooxyari u adeegsato sidii Dukaan ay leeyihiin waxaa Puntland u furmaysa dariiq Sharci ah oo ay Dowlad Madax banaan ku noqonayso Aqoonsigana ay u mareyso sifa Sharci ah oo Caalamku horey ugu heshiiyay.

Waa yahay, aan si cilmiyeysan u eigno nuxurka sharciga caalamiga ah iyo sida uu u qeexayo "State Succession" (Dhaxalka Dawladnimo), annaga oo tixraacayna heshiiskii Vienna ee 1978 iyo 1983.
1. Waa maxay "State Succession" dhanka Sharciga?
Sida ku cad Vienna Convention on Succession of States, nidaamkani maahan oo kaliya in dowlad cusub ay dhalato, balse waa "beddelka hal dawlad ay dawlad kale ku beddelayso mas'uuliyadda xiriirka caalamiga ah ee dhul gaar ah."
Marka loo eego doodaada Puntland, waxaa jira labo qaab oo sharciyan loo maro:
 A) Secession (Goni-u-goosad): Marka qayb ka mid ah dawlad jirta ay go'ansato inay ka baxdo, laakiin dawladdii hore ay wali sii jirto.
 B) Dissolution (Burbur): Marka dawladdi dexe ay gebi ahaanba dunto, markaasna qaybihii ka koobnaa ay mid walba gaarkeeda u istaagto (Sida ka dhacday Midowgii Soofiyeeti ama Yugoslavia).
2. Shuruudaha Sharciga ah ee Puntland u bannayn kara:
Si Puntland ay ugu doodo State Succession, waxaa caadiyan loo baahan yahay in la caddeeyo qodobadan:
 * Burburka Heshiiskii Federaalka: In la caddeeyo in Dowladda Federaalku ay jebisay tiirarkii lagu dhisay midnimada (sida Dastuurka), taasna ay ka dhigan tahay in "Contract"-kii bulshada uu burburay.
 A) Effective Control (Maamul Suuban): In Puntland ay leedahay xuduud cayiman, dad degan, iyo xukuumad leh awood buuxda oo ay ku maamusho dhulkeeda (taas oo Puntland ay hadda haysato).
 B) Kala-wareegga Mas'uuliyadda: In dawladda cusub ay diyaar u tahay inay la wareegto xuquuqdii iyo waajibaadkii (sida deynta, heshiisyada caalamiga ah, iyo xuduudaha) gaar ahaan hadii ay jireen Shirkado Caalamiya ama Wadamo ka waday deegaankaas Maalgakin Caalamiya ama horey uga fuliyay oo dayn ku harsanayd.
3. Caqabadda "Aqoonsiga" (Recognition)
Tani waa halka ay inta badan arrintu ku adkaato. Sharciga caalamiga ah wuxuu u qaybsamaa labo aragtiyood:
 A) Declaratory Theory: Haddii aad leedahay dhul, dad, iyo maamul, dawlad ayaad tahay, xitaa haddii aan lagugu aqoonsan.
 B) Constitutive Theory: Dawlad ma tihid ilaa ay dawladaha kale ku aqoonsadaan.

Xaqiiqda Soomaaliya: Beesha Caalamka (UN, AU, IGAD) waxay wali u arkaan Soomaaliya hal unug oo caalami ah, hadana waxaa xaqiiq ah taas awalba Puntland iyo Soomaali oo dhan ayaa aaminsanayd balse hada xaqiiqda jirta ayaa ah inaysan Soomaaliya ku socon wado ay dib ugu hanan karto Qaranimadeedii sidaas darteed Caalamku wuxuu ku khasban yahay inuu aqbalo xaqiiqda jirta. Hadaba, Puntland waxay u baahan doontaa olole diblomaasiyadeed oo aad u xooggan si ay u qanciso dowlado saameyn leh inay durbadiiba ku qanciso inay Aqoonsadaan mana ahan mid ku adkaan doonta waayo waa xaqiiq cad oo aan la inkiri karin hadii Dowladnimo Soomaaliyeed la waayay inay Puntland iyo cidii kaleba aayaheeda ka tashato.

Sirdoonka PL Waa inay wax ka qabtaan ninkan oo dad badan isaga dhigay inuu ka tirsan yahay ciidamada qalabka sida ee Puntland lkn aakhirkii la sheegayo in uusan ka mid ahayn Ciidanka. Sidoo kale marar wuxuu tabiyay in ciidankii Puntland ee dagaalka ku dhaawacmay la dayacay asagoo iska dhigaya inuu u qareemayo ciidanka taas oo aan waxba ka jirin.

Loolan siyaasadeed oo aan bannaaka oolin, laakiin mararka qaar ka saameyn badan khilaafyada muuqda ayaa u dhaxeeya muddo 15 sano ah Madaxweyne hore Maxamed Farmaajo iyo Guddoomiye hore Baarlamaan Shariif Xasan, kaas oo soo billowday sanaddkii 2011-kii markaas oo ay ka wada tirsanaayeen dowladdii KMG aheyd ee Madaxweyne Shariif Sheekh Axmed.

Farmaajo oo ahaa qurbjoog aan wax badan ka fahamsaneen wax ged gedinta siyaasadda Somalia, ayaa noqday RW xukuumaddii uu ula baxay Tayo, taas oo shaqeyneysay intii u dhaxeysay Nofeembar 2010 ilaa Juun 2011-kii, waxuuna muddadaas oo ku kasbaday taageero shacab iyo middii ciidamadda, isagoo la yimid qorshe soo jiitay shacab iyo ciidan, lkn waxay is qabteen Shariif Xasan oo ahaa guddoomiyihii Baarlamanka ee xilligaas, waxaana aakhirkii xafiiska laga saaray Farmaajo kaddib heshiiskii Kampala Accord.

6-sano kaddib Farmaajo ayee u suuragashay inuu dalka Madaxweyne ka noqdo (2017) waxuuna sanad kaddib (2018), isagana hawada ku cunay Shariif Xasan oo ahaa Madaxweynihii 1-aad ee maamulka Koonfur Galbeed, Shariif Xasan isma kallifin sidii Farmaajo 2011, waayo wuxuu ahaa nin yaqaan dakanadiisa oo qaatay in maanta laga gacan sarreyo wuuna baxay sida muuqaalka aad ka arki karto.

3-sano kaddib (2021) ayuu mar kale Shariif Xasan oo ah nin farsama badan la yimid qariirad kursiga looga tuuri karo Farmaajo, taas oo u shaqeysay 2022 sida uu muuqaalkaan ku sheegayo Agaasime ku xigeenkii hore ee Villa Somalia Abdinur Mohamed Ahmed.

Hadda ciyaartu waa 2-1 oo Shariif Xasan ku hoggaaminayo, dhinac kastana waa ogyahay wuxuu geystay.

Dr. Abuukar Nuur Xuseyn.

Maanta oo ay taariikhdu ahayd 13/06/2018, waxaa Kuliyada Caafimaadka ee Qabridahar ka qabsoontay munaasabad xil-wareejin ah oo si habsami leh loo agaasimay. Xilwareejintan waxaa xilka kula wareegay si ku-meel-gaar ah Maareeye-ku-xigeenkii kuliyadda, Mudane Cabdi Shariif Salah, kaddib markii uu xilka baneeyay Maareeyihii hore ee kuliyadda, Dr. Mohamed Ahmed Mohamed.

Munaasabadda xil-wareejinta waxaa kasoo qaybgalay Wasiirka Xafiiska Xirfadaha iyo Shaqo-abuurka, Mudane Xuseyn Gaydh Axmed iyo wafdi uu hoggaaminayay. Sidoo kale waxaa goob-joog ahaa Maareeyaha Kuliyadda Polytechnic, Mudane Cabdiqaadir Maxamed Cali, xubnaha guddiga maareynta kuliyadda, iyo marti sharaf kale.

Waxaa xusid mudan in Maareeyihii xilka baneeyay loo sameeyay casho sharaf si heer sare ah loo soo agaasimay, taas oo lagu sagootinayay laguna bogaadinhayay dadaalkii iyo shaqadii uu kuliyadda u soo qabtay. Munaasabaddaas waxaa kasoo qaybgalay masuuliyiin heer deegaan iyo heer gobol isugu jiray, oo ay ka mid ahaayeen Wasiirka Xafiiska Xirfadaha iyo Shaqo-abuurka, Guddoomiyaha Gobolka Qoraxey, Maayarka magaalada, maareeyayaasha, kuxigeenada saddexda kuliyadood, iyo Maareeyaha Cusbitaalka Guud ee magaalada.

Dhammaadkii xafladda, Maareeyihii xilka baneeyay waxaa la guddoonsiiyay shahaado sharaf ay si wadajir ah u soo agaasimeen hay’adihii wada shaqeyntu kala dhaxeysay, sida saddexda kuliyadood, Cusbitaalka Guud, Maamulka Gobolka, iyo Maamulka Magaalada. Shahaadadaasi waxaa si wadajir ah u guddoonsiiyay Wasiirka Xafiiska Mudane Xuseyn Gaydh Axmed, Guddoomiyaha Gobolka Mudane Shaafi Maxamed Cabdi, Duqa Magaalada Eng. Cabdirisaaq Cawil, iyo maareeyayaasha labada kuliyadood ee Polytechnic (POLT) iyo TTC.

Caanokacabsade🍺🪣☎️☎️🪣sida uu noqonkaro Dagaal lagu qaado Iran

Maxkamadda Sare ee dalka Mareykanka ayaa Jimcaha maanta ah gaartay go’aan taariikhi ah oo ay ku laashay canshuurihii baaxadda lahaa ee uu Madaxweyne Donald Trump kusoo rogay badeecadaha caalamka, taasoo dharbaaxo weyn ku ah udub-dhexaadka barnaamijkiisa dhaqaalaha.

Go’aankan oo muujinaya kala qeybsanaan dhif iyo naadir ah oo dhanka aragtida ah, ayay maxkamaddu cod aqlabiyad ah oo 6-3 ah ku xakameysay awoodaha fulinta ee uu si ballaaran u adeegsanayo madaxweynaha Jamhuuriga ah.

Garsoorayaasha muxaafidka ah ee kala ah Guddoomiyaha Maxkamadda John Roberts, Amy Coney Barrett iyo Neil Gorsuch ayaa la saftay saddexda garsoore ee garabka bidix, si ay u ridaan xukunkan.

Xukunkan ayaa gabi ahaanba meesha ka saaraya canshuurtii aasaasiga ahayd ee 10% ahayd ee Trump uu si iskiis ah ugu soo rogay ku dhawaad dhammaan waddamada adduunka bishii Abriil ee sanadkii 2025-ka, tallaabadaas oo uu ugu magac daray “Maalinta Xoreynta” (Liberation Day).

Sidoo kale, go’aankan wuxuu burinayaa canshuuraha kale ee aargoosiga ah ee la saaray saaxiibbada ganacsi ee ugu waaweyn Mareykanka, kuwaas oo ay ka mid yihiin Canada, Mexico, Shiinaha, Midowga Yurub, Japan, iyo Kuuriyada Koonfureed.

“Madaxweynuhu wuxuu sheeganayaa awood aan caadi ahayn oo uu iskiis ugu soo rogi karo canshuuro aan xad lahayn dhanka cadadka, waqtiga, iyo baaxaddaba,” ayuu yiri Guddoomiye Roberts oo u hadlayay aqlabiyadda maxkamadda.

“Marka la eego baaxadda, taariikhda, iyo macnaha dastuuriga ah ee awoodda uu sheeganayo, waa inuu keenaa oggolaansho cad oo ka yimid Koongareeska si uu u adeegsado,” ayuu raaciyay.

Aqlabiyadda garsoorayaasha ayaa caddeeyay in sharciga awoodaha xaaladaha degdegga ah ee sanadkii 1977-kii—kaas oo Trump uu cuskaday si uu u meelmariyo canshuurahan—uusan gaarsiisnayn heerkii oggolaanshaha Koongareeska ee loo baahnaa si loo hareermaro Dastuurka, kaas oo awoodda canshuur-qaadista siinaya oo kaliya Koongareeska.

Jawaabta kulul ee Trump

Madaxweyne Donald Trump ayaa si adag u dhaleeceeyay garsoorayaasha laashay canshuuraha, isagoo lixda xubnood ee Maxkamadda Sare ku eedeeyay inay “ka baqayaan inay sameeyaan waxa saxda ah.”

Shir jaraa’id oo uu qabtay saacado kadib markii maxkamaddu go’aanka soo saartay, madaxweynaha ayaa sheegay inuu “ceeb u dareemayo ” garsoorayaasha u codeeyay inay hor istaagaan canshuurihiisa.

Wuxuu si gaar ah farta ugu fiiqay garsoorayaasha garabka bidix ee ku biiray saddexda muxaafidka ah, isagoo ku tilmaamay inay yihiin “kuwo ceeb ku ah qarankeenna.”

“Go’aanka Maxkamadda Sare ee ku saabsan canshuuraha waa mid si qoto dheer looga niyad jabo, waana ceebeeneynaa xubnaha qaar ee maxkamadda, gabi ahaanba waan ceebeeneynaa, maadaama aysan lahayn geesinimo ay ku sameeyaan waxa u wanaagsan dalkeenna,” ayuu yiri Trump.

Go’aankan ayaa guul-darro taariikhi ku ah Trump, oo soo rogista canshuuraha ka dhigtay aalad iyo awood uu ku handado dalalka caalamlka, oo ay ku jiraan kuwo saaxiibo dhow la ah Mareykanka, sida Canada iyo Midowga Yurub.

Trump ayaa, si kastaba, ballan qaaday inuu adeegsan doono “waddooyin kale oo beddel ah” si uu dib ugu soo celiyo canshuurihiisa, isagoo soo jeediyay suurta-galnimada inuu cunaqabateyn ganacsi kusoo rogo waddamada kale.

Wuxuu ka qabtay saddex xil oo wasiirnimo dowladda Somalia ka hor inta uusan iscasillin.

Faallo Siyaasadeed Heer Caalami ah 

Tababarka wadajirka ah ee Ruushka, Shiinaha iyo Iiraan ee ka dhacaya marin-biyoodka Strait of Hormuz ma aha oo kaliya dhaqdhaqaaq ciidan, balse waa fariin siyaasadeed oo culus. Saddexdan dal waxay muujinayaan inay doonayaan nidaam caalami ah oo aan ku dhisnayn hal quwad oo keliya, balse leh awoodo badan oo is miisaamaya.

Strait of Hormuz waa halbowlaha shidaalka dunida. Sidaas darteed, cid kasta oo halkaas joogitaankeeda muujisa waxay taabaneysaa dhaqaalaha caalamka oo dhan. Tani waxay cadaadis saaraysaa Maraykanka iyo xulafadiisa, waxayna muujinaysaa in loollanka awoodaha waaweyn uu si toos ah ugu soo wareegayo badaha iyo marinnada istiraatiijiga ah.

Dhanka kale, arrintani waxay kordhin kartaa xiisadda gobolka, gaar ahaan Bariga Dhexe, halkaas oo xasaasiyad militari horey u jirtay. Haddii loollanku sii kaco, qiimaha shidaalka iyo ganacsiga caalamiga ah ayaa si toos ah u saameyn doona.
